authors_text: Chaitanya Narisetty,Emiru Tsunoo,Xuankai Chang,Yosuke Kashiwagi,Michael Hentschel,Shinji Watanabe
title: Joint Speech Recognition and Audio Captioning
title_zh: 联合语音识别和音频字幕
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures. Accepted for ICASSP 2022
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures. Accepted for ICASSP 2022
abstract: Speech samples recorded in both indoor and outdoor environments are often contaminated with secondary audio sources. Most end-to-end monaural speech recognition systems either remove these background sounds using speech enhancement or train noise-robust models. For better model interpretability and holistic understanding, we aim to bring together the growing field of automated audio captioning (AAC) and the thoroughly studied automatic speech recognition (ASR). The goal of AAC is to generate natural language descriptions of contents in audio samples. We propose several approaches for end-to-end joint modeling of ASR and AAC tasks and demonstrate their advantages over traditional approaches, which model these tasks independently. A major hurdle in evaluating our proposed approach is the lack of labeled audio datasets with both speech transcriptions and audio captions. Therefore we also create a multi-task dataset by mixing the clean speech Wall Street Journal corpus with multiple levels of background noises chosen from the AudioCaps dataset. We also perform extensive experimental evaluation and show improvements of our proposed methods as compared to existing state-of-the-art ASR and AAC methods.
summary: Speech samples recorded in both indoor and outdoor environments are often contaminated with secondary audio sources. Most end-to-end monaural speech recognition systems either remove these background sounds using speech enhancement or train noise-robust models. For better model interpretability and holistic understanding, we aim to bring together the growing field of automated audio captioning (AAC) and the thoroughly studied automatic speech recognition (ASR). The goal of AAC is to generate natural language descriptions of contents in audio samples. We propose several approaches for end-to-end joint modeling of ASR and AAC tasks and demonstrate their advantages over traditional approaches, which model these tasks independently. A major hurdle in evaluating our proposed approach is the lack of labeled audio datasets with both speech transcriptions and audio captions. Therefore we also create a multi-task dataset by mixing the clean speech Wall Street Journal corpus with multiple levels of background noises chosen from the AudioCaps dataset. We also perform extensive experimental evaluation and show improvements of our proposed methods as compared to existing state-of-the-art ASR and AAC methods.
abstract_zh: 在室内和室外环境中录制的语音样本通常会受到辅助音频源的污染。大多数端到端单声道语音识别系统要么使用语音增强来消除这些背景声音，要么训练抗噪声模型。为了更好的模型可解释性和整体理解，我们的目标是将不断发展的自动音频字幕 (AAC) 领域和经过深入研究的自动语音识别 (ASR) 结合在一起。 AAC 的目标是生成音频样本中内容的自然语言描述。我们提出了几种对 ASR 和 AAC 任务进行端到端联合建模的方法，并展示了它们相对于独立建模这些任务的传统方法的优势。评估我们提出的方法的一个主要障碍是缺乏带有语音转录和音频字幕的标记音频数据集。因此，我们还通过将干净的语音《华尔街日报》语料库与从 AudioCaps 数据集中选择的多个级别的背景噪声混合来创建多任务数据集。我们还进行了广泛的实验评估，并展示了我们提出的方法与现有最先进的 ASR 和 AAC 方法相比的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过联合建模语音识别（ASR）与音频字幕生成（AAC）任务，提升模型可解释性与环境噪声下的整体理解能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法独立处理语音识别与音频描述任务，导致模型对噪声鲁棒性不足且缺乏整体语义关联，同时缺乏包含语音转录与音频字幕的多任务数据集。
AI.method: 提出端到端联合建模框架，结合ASR与AAC任务，并构建混合干净语音（Wall Street Journal）与背景噪声（AudioCaps）的多任务数据集进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，联合建模方法在语音识别与音频字幕生成任务上均优于现有独立模型，验证了跨任务信息共享的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模ASR与AAC可提升模型性能与可解释性，所构建的多任务数据集为未来研究提供了重要资源。

Most end-to-end monaural speech recognition systems either remove these background sounds using speech enhancement or train noise-robust models. For better model interpretability and holistic understanding, we aim to bring together the growing field of automated audio captioning (AAC) and the thoroughly studied automatic speech recognition (ASR). The goal of AAC is to generate natural language descriptions of contents in audio samples. We propose several approaches for end-to-end joint modeling of ASR and AAC tasks and demonstrate their advantages over traditional approaches, which model these tasks independently. A major hurdle in evaluating our proposed approach is the lack of labeled audio datasets with both speech transcriptions and audio captions. Therefore we also create a multi-task dataset by mixing the clean speech Wall Street Journal corpus with multiple levels of background noises chosen from the AudioCaps dataset. authors_text: Jifan Zhang,Julian Katz-Samuels,Robert Nowak
title: GALAXY: Graph-based Active Learning at the Extreme
title_zh: GALAXY：基于图的极限主动学习
abstract: Active learning is a label-efficient approach to train highly effective models while interactively selecting only small subsets of unlabelled data for labelling and training. In "open world" settings, the classes of interest can make up a small fraction of the overall dataset -- most of the data may be viewed as an out-of-distribution or irrelevant class. This leads to extreme class-imbalance, and our theory and methods focus on this core issue. We propose a new strategy for active learning called GALAXY (Graph-based Active Learning At the eXtrEme), which blends ideas from graph-based active learning and deep learning. GALAXY automatically and adaptively selects more class-balanced examples for labeling than most other methods for active learning. Our theory shows that GALAXY performs a refined form of uncertainty sampling that gathers a much more class-balanced dataset than vanilla uncertainty sampling. Experimentally, we demonstrate GALAXY's superiority over existing state-of-art deep active learning algorithms in unbalanced vision classification settings generated from popular datasets.
summary: Active learning is a label-efficient approach to train highly effective models while interactively selecting only small subsets of unlabelled data for labelling and training. In "open world" settings, the classes of interest can make up a small fraction of the overall dataset -- most of the data may be viewed as an out-of-distribution or irrelevant class. This leads to extreme class-imbalance, and our theory and methods focus on this core issue. We propose a new strategy for active learning called GALAXY (Graph-based Active Learning At the eXtrEme), which blends ideas from graph-based active learning and deep learning. GALAXY automatically and adaptively selects more class-balanced examples for labeling than most other methods for active learning. Our theory shows that GALAXY performs a refined form of uncertainty sampling that gathers a much more class-balanced dataset than vanilla uncertainty sampling. Experimentally, we demonstrate GALAXY's superiority over existing state-of-art deep active learning algorithms in unbalanced vision classification settings generated from popular datasets.
abstract_zh: 主动学习是一种标签有效的方法，用于训练高效模型，同时交互式地仅选择未标记数据的小子集进行标记和训练。在“开放世界”设置中，感兴趣的类别可以构成整个数据集的一小部分——大多数数据可能被视为分布外或不相关的类别。这导致了极端的阶级失衡，我们的理论和方法集中在这个核心问题上。我们提出了一种新的主​​动学习策略，称为 GALAXY（基于图的主动学习 At the eXtrEme），它融合了基于图的主动学习和深度学习的思想。与大多数其他主动学习方法相比，GALAXY 会自动自适应地选择更多类别平衡的示例进行标记。我们的理论表明，GALAXY 执行一种改进形式的不确定性采样，它收集的数据集比普通的不确定性采样更加均衡。通过实验，我们证明了 GALAXY 在从流行数据集生成的不平衡视觉分类设置中优于现有最先进的深度主动学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的主动学习方法GALAXY，用于解决开放世界设置中极端类别不平衡问题，通过自动选择更平衡的数据集提升模型训练效率。
AI.motivation: 在开放世界场景中，目标类别仅占数据集很小比例，导致极端类别不平衡，现有主动学习方法难以有效应对这一挑战。
AI.method: GALAXY融合图基主动学习与深度学习，通过自动适应性选择机制，改进不确定性采样策略，实现更平衡的样本筛选。
AI.result: 实验表明，GALAXY在多个不平衡视觉分类任务中优于现有最先进的深度主动学习算法，显著提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: GALAXY通过图结构建模与自适应样本选择，有效缓解了极端类别不平衡问题，为开放世界主动学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Louis Primeau,Amirali Amirsoleimani,Roman Genov
title: SDEX: Monte Carlo Simulation of Stochastic Differential Equations on Memristor Crossbars
title_zh: SDEX：忆阻器横杆随机微分方程的蒙特卡罗模拟
comment: 5 pages, 3 Figures, submitted to ISCAS 2022
comments: 5 pages, 3 Figures, submitted to ISCAS 2022
abstract: Here we present stochastic differential equations (SDEs) on a memristor crossbar, where the source of gaussian noise is derived from the random conductance due to ion drift in the devices during programming. We examine the effects of line resistance on the generation of normal random vectors, showing the skew and kurtosis are within acceptable bounds. We then show the implementation of a stochastic differential equation solver for the Black-Scholes SDE, and compare the distribution with the analytic solution. We determine that the random number generation works as intended, and calculate the energy cost of the simulation.
summary: Here we present stochastic differential equations (SDEs) on a memristor crossbar, where the source of gaussian noise is derived from the random conductance due to ion drift in the devices during programming. We examine the effects of line resistance on the generation of normal random vectors, showing the skew and kurtosis are within acceptable bounds. We then show the implementation of a stochastic differential equation solver for the Black-Scholes SDE, and compare the distribution with the analytic solution. We determine that the random number generation works as intended, and calculate the energy cost of the simulation.
abstract_zh: 在这里，我们提出了忆阻器交叉开关上的随机微分方程（SDE），其中高斯噪声源源自编程期间器件中离子漂移造成的随机电导。我们检查了线路电阻对正态随机向量生成的影响，显示偏斜和峰度在可接受的范围内。然后，我们展示 Black-Scholes SDE 随机微分方程求解器的实现，并将分布与解析解进行比较。我们确定随机数生成按预期工作，并计算模拟的能源成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在忆阻器交叉阵列上通过蒙特卡洛方法模拟随机微分方程，利用器件编程时的离子漂移随机电导作为高斯噪声源。
AI.motivation: 探索利用忆阻器硬件特性实现随机微分方程模拟，解决传统方法在能效与硬件实现上的局限性。
AI.method: 基于忆阻器随机电导生成高斯噪声，分析线路电阻对随机向量分布的影响，实现Black-Scholes方程求解器并与解析解对比，计算模拟能耗。
AI.result: 随机数生成符合预期，偏度和峰度在合理范围；Black-Scholes模拟结果与解析解一致，验证了方法有效性并量化了能耗。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功利用忆阻器物理特性实现SDE模拟，为硬件加速随机计算提供了可行路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出在忆阻器交叉阵列上通过蒙特卡洛方法模拟随机微分方程，利用器件编程时的离子漂移随机电导作为高斯噪声源。
ai_content.motivation: 探索利用忆阻器硬件特性实现随机微分方程模拟，解决传统方法在能效与硬件实现上的局限性。

search_text: SDEX: Monte Carlo Simulation of Stochastic Differential Equations on Memristor Crossbars SDEX：忆阻器横杆随机微分方程的蒙特卡罗模拟 Here we present stochastic differential equations (SDEs) on a memristor crossbar, where the source of gaussian noise is derived from the random conductance due to ion drift in the devices during programming. We examine the effects of line resistance on the generation of normal random vectors, showing the skew and kurtosis are within acceptable bounds. We then show the implementation of a stochastic differential equation solver for the Black-Scholes SDE, and compare the distribution with the analytic solution. We determine that the random number generation works as intended, and calculate the energy cost of the simulation. 在这里，我们提出了忆阻器交叉开关上的随机微分方程（SDE），其中高斯噪声源源自编程期间器件中离子漂移造成的随机电导。我们检查了线路电阻对正态随机向量生成的影响，显示偏斜和峰度在可接受的范围内。然后，我们展示 Black-Scholes SDE 随机微分方程求解器的实现，并将分布与解析解进行比较。我们确定随机数生成按预期工作，并计算模拟的能源成本。 本文提出在忆阻器交叉阵列上通过蒙特卡洛方法模拟随机微分方程，利用器件编程时的离子漂移随机电导作为高斯噪声源。 Louis Primeau,Amirali Amirsoleimani,Roman Genov cs.ET

authors_text: Zhen Dai,Yury Makarychev,Ali Vakilian
title: Fair Representation Clustering with Several Protected Classes
title_zh: 具有多个受保护类别的公平表示集群
abstract: We study the problem of fair $k$-median where each cluster is required to have a fair representation of individuals from different groups. In the fair representation $k$-median problem, we are given a set of points $X$ in a metric space. Each point $x\in X$ belongs to one of $\ell$ groups. Further, we are given fair representation parameters $α_j$ and $β_j$ for each group $j\in [\ell]$. We say that a $k$-clustering $C_1, \cdots, C_k$ fairly represents all groups if the number of points from group $j$ in cluster $C_i$ is between $α_j |C_i|$ and $β_j |C_i|$ for every $j\in[\ell]$ and $i\in [k]$. The goal is to find a set $\mathcal{C}$ of $k$ centers and an assignment $φ: X\rightarrow \mathcal{C}$ such that the clustering defined by $(\mathcal{C}, φ)$ fairly represents all groups and minimizes the $\ell_1$-objective $\sum_{x\in X} d(x, φ(x))$. We present an $O(\log k)$-approximation algorithm that runs in time $n^{O(\ell)}$. Note that the known algorithms for the problem either (i) violate the fairness constraints by an additive term or (ii) run in time that is exponential in both $k$ and $\ell$. We also consider an important special case of the problem where $α_j = β_j = \frac{f_j}{f}$ and $f_j, f \in \mathbb{N}$ for all $j\in [\ell]$. For this special case, we present an $O(\log k)$-approximation algorithm that runs in $(kf)^{O(\ell)}\log n + poly(n)$ time.
summary: We study the problem of fair $k$-median where each cluster is required to have a fair representation of individuals from different groups. In the fair representation $k$-median problem, we are given a set of points $X$ in a metric space. Each point $x\in X$ belongs to one of $\ell$ groups. Further, we are given fair representation parameters $α_j$ and $β_j$ for each group $j\in [\ell]$. We say that a $k$-clustering $C_1, \cdots, C_k$ fairly represents all groups if the number of points from group $j$ in cluster $C_i$ is between $α_j |C_i|$ and $β_j |C_i|$ for every $j\in[\ell]$ and $i\in [k]$. The goal is to find a set $\mathcal{C}$ of $k$ centers and an assignment $φ: X\rightarrow \mathcal{C}$ such that the clustering defined by $(\mathcal{C}, φ)$ fairly represents all groups and minimizes the $\ell_1$-objective $\sum_{x\in X} d(x, φ(x))$. We present an $O(\log k)$-approximation algorithm that runs in time $n^{O(\ell)}$. Note that the known algorithms for the problem either (i) violate the fairness constraints by an additive term or (ii) run in time that is exponential in both $k$ and $\ell$. We also consider an important special case of the problem where $α_j = β_j = \frac{f_j}{f}$ and $f_j, f \in \mathbb{N}$ for all $j\in [\ell]$. For this special case, we present an $O(\log k)$-approximation algorithm that runs in $(kf)^{O(\ell)}\log n + poly(n)$ time.
abstract_zh: 我们研究公平 $k$ 中位数的问题，其中每个集群都需要公平地代表来自不同群体的个体。在公平表示 $k$ 中值问题中，我们在度量空间中得到一组点 $X$。 X$ 中的每个点 $x\in X$ 属于 $\ell$ 组之一。此外，我们为每个组 $j\in [\ell]$ 提供公平表示参数 $α_j$ 和 $β_j$。如果对于每个 $j\in[\ell]$ 和 $i\in [k]$，簇 $C_i$ 中组 $j$ 的点数在 $α_j |C_i|$ 和 $β_j |C_i|$ 之间，我们说 $k$ 聚类 $C_1, \cdots, C_k$ 公平地代表所有组。目标是找到 $k$ 中心的集合 $\mathcal{C}$ 和分配 $φ: X\rightarrow \mathcal{C}$，使得 $(\mathcal{C}, φ)$ 定义的聚类公平地代表所有组，并最小化 $\ell_1$ 目标 $\sum_{x\in X} d(x, φ(x))$。我们提出了一种在 $n^{O(\ell)}$ 时间内运行的 $O(\log k)$ 近似算法。请注意，该问题的已知算法要么 (i) 通过附加项违反公平性约束，要么 (ii) 在 $k$ 和 $\ell$ 中按指数运行。我们还考虑该问题的一个重要特殊情况，其中 $α_j = β_j = \frac{f_j}{f}$ 和 $f_j, f \in \mathbb{N}$ 对于所有 $j\in [\ell]$。对于这种特殊情况，我们提出了一个 $O(\log k)$ 近似算法，运行时间为 $(kf)^{O(\ell)}\log n + poly(n)$ 时间。

AI.tldr: 研究公平k-中位数聚类问题，要求每个簇中不同群体的点满足给定的公平表示比例约束。
AI.motivation: 现有的公平聚类算法要么违反公平约束（仅加性近似满足），要么运行时间对k和ℓ呈指数级。本文旨在同时满足严格公平约束并在聚类代价上实现对数近似比，且运行时间为n^{O(ℓ)}。
AI.method: 提出一种O(log k)-近似算法，利用线性规划松弛和舍入技术，将公平约束作为硬约束处理；对特殊均衡比例情况，进一步结合组合优化方法优化运行时间。
AI.result: 对一般公平k-中位数问题，给出O(log k)-近似算法，运行时间n^{O(ℓ)}；对均衡比例特例，给出相同近似比但运行时间为(kf)^{O(ℓ)} log n + poly(n)的算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在严格满足公平约束的前提下，实现了与k和ℓ无关的对数近似比，显着改进了现有工作的近似比或运行时间边界。

authors_text: Joachim Gudmundsson,Martin P. Seybold,John Pfeifer
title: Exploring Sub-skeleton Trajectories for Interpretable Recognition of Sign Language
title_zh: 探索手语可解释识别的子骨架轨迹
comment: To appear in Proc. of the 27th International Conference on Database Systems for Advanced Applications (DASFAA-2022)
comments: To appear in Proc. of the 27th International Conference on Database Systems for Advanced Applications (DASFAA-2022)
abstract: Recent advances in tracking sensors and pose estimation software enable smart systems to use trajectories of skeleton joint locations for supervised learning. We study the problem of accurately recognizing sign language words, which is key to narrowing the communication gap between hard and non-hard of hearing people. Our method explores a geometric feature space that we call `sub-skeleton' aspects of movement. We assess similarity of feature space trajectories using natural, speed invariant distance measures, which enables clear and insightful nearest neighbor classification. The simplicity and scalability of our basic method allows for immediate application in different data domains with little to no parameter tuning. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our basic method, and a boosted variation, with experiments on data from different application domains and tracking technologies. Surprisingly, our simple methods improve sign recognition over recent, state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Recent advances in tracking sensors and pose estimation software enable smart systems to use trajectories of skeleton joint locations for supervised learning. We study the problem of accurately recognizing sign language words, which is key to narrowing the communication gap between hard and non-hard of hearing people. Our method explores a geometric feature space that we call `sub-skeleton' aspects of movement. We assess similarity of feature space trajectories using natural, speed invariant distance measures, which enables clear and insightful nearest neighbor classification. The simplicity and scalability of our basic method allows for immediate application in different data domains with little to no parameter tuning. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our basic method, and a boosted variation, with experiments on data from different application domains and tracking technologies. Surprisingly, our simple methods improve sign recognition over recent, state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 跟踪传感器和姿态估计软件的最新进展使智能系统能够使用骨骼关节位置的轨迹进行监督学习。我们研究准确识别手语单词的问题，这是缩小听力障碍者与非听力障碍者之间沟通差距的关键。我们的方法探索了一个几何特征空间，我们称之为运动的“子骨架”方面。我们使用自然的、速度不变的距离测量来评估特征空间轨迹的相似性，从而实现清晰且富有洞察力的最近邻分类。我们的基本方法的简单性和可扩展性允许在不同的数据域中立即应用，几乎不需要参数调整。我们通过对来自不同应用领域和跟踪技术的数据进行实验，证明了基本方法的有效性以及增强的变体。令人惊讶的是，我们的简单方法比最近最先进的方法提高了符号识别能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于子骨架轨迹的手语识别方法，通过几何特征空间和速度不变距离度量实现可解释的分类。
AI.motivation: 为缩小听力障碍者与非听力障碍者间的沟通差距，需提升手语识别准确率并实现可解释性。
AI.method: 构建子骨架轨迹的几何特征空间，采用自然速度不变距离度量评估轨迹相似性，结合最近邻分类器进行识别。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在不同数据集和跟踪技术上优于现有先进方法，且无需复杂参数调整。
AI.conclusion: 简单方法在跨领域手语识别中表现优异，未来可扩展至更多应用场景并优化特征表示。

We demonstrate the effectiveness of our basic method, and a boosted variation, with experiments on data from different application domains and tracking technologies. Surprisingly, our simple methods improve sign recognition over recent, state-of-the-art approaches. 跟踪传感器和姿态估计软件的最新进展使智能系统能够使用骨骼关节位置的轨迹进行监督学习。我们研究准确识别手语单词的问题，这是缩小听力障碍者与非听力障碍者之间沟通差距的关键。我们的方法探索了一个几何特征空间，我们称之为运动的“子骨架”方面。我们使用自然的、速度不变的距离测量来评估特征空间轨迹的相似性，从而实现清晰且富有洞察力的最近邻分类。我们的基本方法的简单性和可扩展性允许在不同的数据域中立即应用，几乎不需要参数调整。我们通过对来自不同应用领域和跟踪技术的数据进行实验，证明了基本方法的有效性以及增强的变体。令人惊讶的是，我们的简单方法比最近最先进的方法提高了符号识别能力。 本文提出一种基于子骨架轨迹的手语识别方法，通过几何特征空间和速度不变距离度量实现可解释的分类。 Joachim Gudmundsson,Martin P. Seybold,John Pfeifer cs.CV,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Vasileios Vasilopoulos,Sebastian Castro,William Vega-Brown,Daniel E. Koditschek,Nicholas Roy
title: Technical Report: A Hierarchical Deliberative-Reactive System Architecture for Task and Motion Planning in Partially Known Environments
title_zh: 技术报告：用于部分已知环境中任务和运动规划的分层审议-反应系统架构
comment: Technical Report accompanying the paper "A Hierarchical Deliberative-Reactive System Architecture for Task and Motion Planning in Partially Known Environments" at ICRA 2022 (8 pages, 6 figures)
comments: Technical Report accompanying the paper "A Hierarchical Deliberative-Reactive System Architecture for Task and Motion Planning in Partially Known Environments" at ICRA 2022 (8 pages, 6 figures)
abstract: We describe a task and motion planning architecture for highly dynamic systems that combines a domain-independent sampling-based deliberative planning algorithm with a global reactive planner. We leverage the recent development of a reactive, vector field planner that provides guarantees of reachability to large regions of the environment even in the face of unknown or unforeseen obstacles. The reachability guarantees can be formalized using contracts that allow a deliberative planner to reason purely in terms of those contracts and synthesize a plan by choosing a sequence of reactive behaviors and their target configurations, without evaluating specific motion plans between targets. This reduces both the search depth at which plans will be found, and the number of samples required to ensure a plan exists, while crucially preserving correctness guarantees. The result is reduced computational cost of synthesizing plans, and increased robustness of generated plans to actuator noise, model misspecification, or unknown obstacles. Simulation studies show that our hierarchical planning and execution architecture can solve complex navigation and rearrangement tasks, even when faced with narrow passageways or incomplete world information.
summary: We describe a task and motion planning architecture for highly dynamic systems that combines a domain-independent sampling-based deliberative planning algorithm with a global reactive planner. We leverage the recent development of a reactive, vector field planner that provides guarantees of reachability to large regions of the environment even in the face of unknown or unforeseen obstacles. The reachability guarantees can be formalized using contracts that allow a deliberative planner to reason purely in terms of those contracts and synthesize a plan by choosing a sequence of reactive behaviors and their target configurations, without evaluating specific motion plans between targets. This reduces both the search depth at which plans will be found, and the number of samples required to ensure a plan exists, while crucially preserving correctness guarantees. The result is reduced computational cost of synthesizing plans, and increased robustness of generated plans to actuator noise, model misspecification, or unknown obstacles. Simulation studies show that our hierarchical planning and execution architecture can solve complex navigation and rearrangement tasks, even when faced with narrow passageways or incomplete world information.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种用于高度动态系统的任务和运动规划架构，它将基于域独立采样的慎思规划算法与全局反应规划器相结合。我们利用最近开发的反应式矢量场规划器，即使面对未知或不可预见的障碍，也能保证大范围环境区域的可达性。可达性保证可以使用合约来形式化，该合约允许深思熟虑的规划者纯粹根据这些合约进行推理，并通过选择一系列反应行为及其目标配置来综合计划，而无需评估目标之间的特定运动计划。这既减少了找到计划的搜索深度，也减少了确保计划存在所需的样本数量，同时至关重要地保留了正确性保证。其结果是降低了综合计划的计算成本，并提高了生成的计划对执行器噪声、模型错误指定或未知障碍的鲁棒性。模拟研究表明，即使面对狭窄的通道或不完整的世界信息，我们的分层规划和执行架构也可以解决复杂的导航和重新安排任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层的深思-反应系统架构，用于部分已知环境中的任务与运动规划，结合领域无关的采样规划算法与全局反应型规划器，以提高规划效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统规划方法在动态环境和部分已知场景中存在计算成本高、对噪声和未知障碍物不鲁棒的问题，需设计更高效且可靠的规划架构。
AI.method: 融合领域无关的采样基础深思规划算法与反应型向量场规划器，通过形式化合同保证可达性，使深思规划器仅需选择反应行为序列与目标配置，无需具体运动路径计算。
AI.result: 模拟实验表明，该架构能有效解决复杂导航与重排任务，即使在狭窄通道或环境信息不完整的情况下仍保持高鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层架构通过减少计算量和样本需求，显著降低规划成本并提升对噪声、模型误差及未知障碍的适应能力。

authors_text: Zubayer Islam,Mohamed Abdel-Aty
title: Real-time Emergency Vehicle Event Detection Using Audio Data
title_zh: 使用音频数据实时检测紧急车辆事件
abstract: In this work, we focus on detecting emergency vehicles using only audio data. Improved and quick detection can help in faster preemption of these vehicles at signalized intersections thereby reducing overall response time in case of emergencies. Important audio features were extracted from raw data and passed into extreme learning machines (ELM) for training. ELMs have been used in this work because of its simplicity and shorter run-time which can therefore be used for online learning. Recently, there have been many studies that focus on sound classification but most of the methods used are complex to train and implement. The results from this paper show that ELM can achieve similar performance with exceptionally shorter training times. The accuracy reported for ELM is about 97% for emergency vehicle detection (EVD).
summary: In this work, we focus on detecting emergency vehicles using only audio data. Improved and quick detection can help in faster preemption of these vehicles at signalized intersections thereby reducing overall response time in case of emergencies. Important audio features were extracted from raw data and passed into extreme learning machines (ELM) for training. ELMs have been used in this work because of its simplicity and shorter run-time which can therefore be used for online learning. Recently, there have been many studies that focus on sound classification but most of the methods used are complex to train and implement. The results from this paper show that ELM can achieve similar performance with exceptionally shorter training times. The accuracy reported for ELM is about 97% for emergency vehicle detection (EVD).
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们专注于仅使用音频数据检测紧急车辆。改进和快速的检测有助于在信号交叉口更快地抢占这些车辆，从而减少紧急情况下的总体响应时间。从原始数据中提取重要的音频特征，并将其传递到极限学习机（ELM）中进行训练。这项工作中使用了 ELM，因为它简单且运行时间较短，因此可用于在线学习。最近，有很多研究集中在声音分类上，但大多数使用的方法训练和实现都很复杂。本文的结果表明，ELM 可以以极短的训练时间实现类似的性能。据报告，ELM 对于紧急车辆检测 (EVD) 的准确率约为 97%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于音频数据的实时紧急车辆事件检测方法，利用改进的极端学习机（ELM）实现高效识别。
AI.motivation: 通过快速检测紧急车辆可在信号交叉口提前让行，缩短应急响应时间，而现有声学分类方法通常训练复杂且耗时。
AI.method: 从原始音频数据中提取关键声学特征，输入极端学习机（ELM）进行训练，利用其计算简单和运行快速的优势实现在线学习。
AI.result: 实验表明ELM在紧急车辆检测任务中达到约97%的准确率，且训练时间显著短于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: ELM在保持高检测精度的同时大幅降低计算开销，为实时音频事件检测提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Jingyi Xie,Rui Yu,Sooyeon Lee,Yao Lyu,Syed Masum Billah,John M. Carroll
title: Feasibility of Interactive 3D Map for Remote Sighted Assistance
title_zh: 交互式 3D 地图遥视援助的可行性
abstract: Remote sighted assistance (RSA) has emerged as a conversational assistive technology, where remote sighted workers, i.e., agents, provide real-time assistance to users with vision impairments via video-chat-like communication. Researchers found that agents' lack of environmental knowledge, the difficulty of orienting users in their surroundings, and the inability to estimate distances from users' camera feeds are key challenges to sighted agents. To address these challenges, researchers have suggested assisting agents with computer vision technologies, especially 3D reconstruction. This paper presents a high-fidelity prototype of such an RSA, where agents use interactive 3D maps with localization capability. We conducted a walkthrough study with thirteen agents and one user with simulated vision impairment using this prototype. The study revealed that, compared to baseline RSA, the agents were significantly faster in providing navigational assistance to users, and their mental workload was significantly reduced -- all indicate the feasibility and prospect of 3D maps in RSA.
summary: Remote sighted assistance (RSA) has emerged as a conversational assistive technology, where remote sighted workers, i.e., agents, provide real-time assistance to users with vision impairments via video-chat-like communication. Researchers found that agents' lack of environmental knowledge, the difficulty of orienting users in their surroundings, and the inability to estimate distances from users' camera feeds are key challenges to sighted agents. To address these challenges, researchers have suggested assisting agents with computer vision technologies, especially 3D reconstruction. This paper presents a high-fidelity prototype of such an RSA, where agents use interactive 3D maps with localization capability. We conducted a walkthrough study with thirteen agents and one user with simulated vision impairment using this prototype. The study revealed that, compared to baseline RSA, the agents were significantly faster in providing navigational assistance to users, and their mental workload was significantly reduced -- all indicate the feasibility and prospect of 3D maps in RSA.
abstract_zh: 远视辅助（RSA）已成为一种会话辅助技术，远视工作人员（即代理）通过类似视频聊天的通信方式为视力障碍用户提供实时帮助。研究人员发现，智能体缺乏环境知识、难以在周围环境中定位用户以及无法估计距用户摄像头的距离，这些都是视力正常的智能体面临的主要挑战。为了应对这些挑战，研究人员建议使用计算机视觉技术（尤其是 3D 重建）来协助智能体。本文提出了此类 RSA 的高保真原型，其中代理使用具有本地化功能的交互式 3D 地图。我们使用此原型对 13 名代理和一名模拟视力障碍的用户进行了演练研究。研究表明，与基线 RSA 相比，智能体为用户提供导航帮助的速度明显更快，并且其脑力负荷也显着减少——所有这些都表明 RSA 中 3D 地图的可行性和前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于交互式3D地图的远程视觉辅助系统原型，以提高视觉障碍用户获得导航帮助的效率。
AI.motivation: 远程视觉辅助（RSA）在实际应用中面临诸多挑战，如代理人员缺乏环境知识、难以引导用户定位及估算距离等，因此需要借助计算机视觉技术，尤其是3D重建技术，以提升RSA系统的性能。
AI.method: 本文开发了一个具有定位功能的高保真交互式3D地图原型，并通过十三名代理人员和一名模拟视觉障碍用户的走查研究来评估其效果。
AI.result: 与基准RSA系统相比，代理人员在提供导航帮助时速度显著提高，其认知负荷也显著降低，表明3D地图在RSA中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 交互式3D地图在远程视觉辅助中展现出良好的应用前景，能够有效提升代理人员的效率并减轻其认知负担。

search_text: Feasibility of Interactive 3D Map for Remote Sighted Assistance 交互式 3D 地图遥视援助的可行性 Remote sighted assistance (RSA) has emerged as a conversational assistive technology, where remote sighted workers, i.e., agents, provide real-time assistance to users with vision impairments via video-chat-like communication. Researchers found that agents' lack of environmental knowledge, the difficulty of orienting users in their surroundings, and the inability to estimate distances from users' camera feeds are key challenges to sighted agents. To address these challenges, researchers have suggested assisting agents with computer vision technologies, especially 3D reconstruction. This paper presents a high-fidelity prototype of such an RSA, where agents use interactive 3D maps with localization capability. We conducted a walkthrough study with thirteen agents and one user with simulated vision impairment using this prototype. The study revealed that, compared to baseline RSA, the agents were significantly faster in providing navigational assistance to users, and their mental workload was significantly reduced -- all indicate the feasibility and prospect of 3D maps in RSA. 远视辅助（RSA）已成为一种会话辅助技术，远视工作人员（即代理）通过类似视频聊天的通信方式为视力障碍用户提供实时帮助。研究人员发现，智能体缺乏环境知识、难以在周围环境中定位用户以及无法估计距用户摄像头的距离，这些都是视力正常的智能体面临的主要挑战。为了应对这些挑战，研究人员建议使用计算机视觉技术（尤其是 3D 重建）来协助智能体。本文提出了此类 RSA 的高保真原型，其中代理使用具有本地化功能的交互式 3D 地图。我们使用此原型对 13 名代理和一名模拟视力障碍的用户进行了演练研究。研究表明，与基线 RSA 相比，智能体为用户提供导航帮助的速度明显更快，并且其脑力负荷也显着减少——所有这些都表明 RSA 中 3D 地图的可行性和前景。 本文提出了一种基于交互式3D地图的远程视觉辅助系统原型，以提高视觉障碍用户获得导航帮助的效率。 Jingyi Xie,Rui Yu,Sooyeon Lee,Yao Lyu,Syed Masum Billah,John M. Carroll cs.HC

authors_text: Jinhua Zhu,Yingce Xia,Chang Liu,Lijun Wu,Shufang Xie,Yusong Wang,Tong Wang,Tao Qin,Wengang Zhou,Houqiang Li,Haiguang Liu,Tie-Yan Liu
title: Direct Molecular Conformation Generation
title_zh: 直接分子构象生成
comment: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (2022)
comments: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (2022)
abstract: Molecular conformation generation aims to generate three-dimensional coordinates of all the atoms in a molecule and is an important task in bioinformatics and pharmacology. Previous methods usually first predict the interatomic distances, the gradients of interatomic distances or the local structures (e.g., torsion angles) of a molecule, and then reconstruct its 3D conformation. How to directly generate the conformation without the above intermediate values is not fully explored. In this work, we propose a method that directly predicts the coordinates of atoms: (1) the loss function is invariant to roto-translation of coordinates and permutation of symmetric atoms; (2) the newly proposed model adaptively aggregates the bond and atom information and iteratively refines the coordinates of the generated conformation. Our method achieves the best results on GEOM-QM9 and GEOM-Drugs datasets. Further analysis shows that our generated conformations have closer properties (e.g., HOMO-LUMO gap) with the groundtruth conformations. In addition, our method improves molecular docking by providing better initial conformations. All the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and the great potential of the direct approach. The code is released at https://github.com/DirectMolecularConfGen/DMCG
summary: Molecular conformation generation aims to generate three-dimensional coordinates of all the atoms in a molecule and is an important task in bioinformatics and pharmacology. Previous methods usually first predict the interatomic distances, the gradients of interatomic distances or the local structures (e.g., torsion angles) of a molecule, and then reconstruct its 3D conformation. How to directly generate the conformation without the above intermediate values is not fully explored. In this work, we propose a method that directly predicts the coordinates of atoms: (1) the loss function is invariant to roto-translation of coordinates and permutation of symmetric atoms; (2) the newly proposed model adaptively aggregates the bond and atom information and iteratively refines the coordinates of the generated conformation. Our method achieves the best results on GEOM-QM9 and GEOM-Drugs datasets. Further analysis shows that our generated conformations have closer properties (e.g., HOMO-LUMO gap) with the groundtruth conformations. In addition, our method improves molecular docking by providing better initial conformations. All the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and the great potential of the direct approach. The code is released at https://github.com/DirectMolecularConfGen/DMCG
abstract_zh: 分子构象生成旨在生成分子中所有原子的三维坐标，是生物信息学和药理学的重要任务。以前的方法通常首先预测分子的原子间距离、原子间距离的梯度或局部结构（例如扭转角），然后重建其3D构象。如何在没有上述中间值的情况下直接生成构象尚未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种直接预测原子坐标的方法：（1）损失函数对于坐标的旋转平移和对称原子的排列具有不变性； （2）新提出的模型自适应地聚合键和原子信息，并迭代地细化生成的构象的坐标。我们的方法在 GEOM-QM9 和 GEOM-Drugs 数据集上取得了最佳结果。进一步的分析表明，我们生成的构象与真实构象具有更接近的属性（例如 HOMO-LUMO 间隙）。此外，我们的方法通过提供更好的初始构象来改进分子对接。所有结果都证明了我们方法的有效性以及直接方法的巨大潜力。代码发布于 https://github.com/DirectMolecularConfGen/DMCG

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种直接生成分子构象的方法，无需依赖中间变量如键长或键角。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过预测中间变量（如键长、局部结构）间接生成分子构象，过程复杂且可能引入误差，直接生成方法尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 设计旋转平移不变的损失函数，结合自适应的键和原子信息聚合，并通过迭代优化坐标生成构象。
AI.result: 在GEOM-QM9和GEOM-Drugs数据集上表现最佳，生成构象的HOMO-LUMO间隙等属性更接近真实值，并提升分子对接效果。
AI.conclusion: 直接生成方法有效且具有潜力，为分子构象生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Ben Green
title: Technology Ethics in Action: Critical and Interdisciplinary Perspectives
title_zh: 实践中的技术伦理：批判性和跨学科的视角
comment: ef:Special Issue of the Journal of Social Computing (2021)
comments: ef:Special Issue of the Journal of Social Computing (2021)
abstract: This special issue interrogates the meaning and impacts of "tech ethics": the embedding of ethics into digital technology research, development, use, and governance. In response to concerns about the social harms associated with digital technologies, many individuals and institutions have articulated the need for a greater emphasis on ethics in digital technology. Yet as more groups embrace the concept of ethics, critical discourses have emerged questioning whose ethics are being centered, whether "ethics" is the appropriate frame for improving technology, and what it means to develop "ethical" technology in practice. This interdisciplinary issue takes up these questions, interrogating the relationships among ethics, technology, and society in action. This special issue engages with the normative and contested notions of ethics itself, how ethics has been integrated with technology across domains, and potential paths forward to support more just and egalitarian technology. Rather than starting from philosophical theories, the authors in this issue orient their articles around the real-world discourses and impacts of tech ethics--i.e., tech ethics in action.
summary: This special issue interrogates the meaning and impacts of "tech ethics": the embedding of ethics into digital technology research, development, use, and governance. In response to concerns about the social harms associated with digital technologies, many individuals and institutions have articulated the need for a greater emphasis on ethics in digital technology. Yet as more groups embrace the concept of ethics, critical discourses have emerged questioning whose ethics are being centered, whether "ethics" is the appropriate frame for improving technology, and what it means to develop "ethical" technology in practice. This interdisciplinary issue takes up these questions, interrogating the relationships among ethics, technology, and society in action. This special issue engages with the normative and contested notions of ethics itself, how ethics has been integrated with technology across domains, and potential paths forward to support more just and egalitarian technology. Rather than starting from philosophical theories, the authors in this issue orient their articles around the real-world discourses and impacts of tech ethics--i.e., tech ethics in action.
abstract_zh: 本期特刊探讨了“技术伦理”的含义和影响：将伦理嵌入数字技术的研究、开发、使用和治理中。为了回应对数字技术相关社会危害的担忧，许多个人和机构都明确表示需要更加重视数字技术的道德规范。然而，随着越来越多的群体接受伦理概念，批评性话语开始质疑谁的伦理是中心，“伦理”是否是改进技术的适当框架，以及在实践中开发“伦理”技术意味着什么。这个跨学科问题探讨了这些问题，质疑伦理、技术和社会之间的关系。本期特刊涉及道德本身的规范性和有争议的概念、道德如何与跨领域的技术相结合，以及支持更加公正和平等的技术的潜在路径。本期作者不是从哲学理论出发，而是围绕现实世界的技术伦理话语和影响（即行动中的技术伦理）来撰写文章。

AI.tldr: 本文集探讨了技术伦理在数字技术研究、开发、使用和治理中的实际意义与影响，通过跨学科视角分析伦理与技术、社会的互动关系。
AI.motivation: 针对数字技术带来的社会危害，学界和业界呼吁加强技术伦理，但需批判性审视伦理框架的适用性、权力结构及实践中的挑战。
AI.method: 通过跨学科方法，聚焦现实中的技术伦理实践与争议，分析不同领域中伦理与技术的整合方式及潜在改进路径。
AI.result: 揭示了技术伦理的复杂性，质疑了伦理优先性的单一性，并提出了推动更公平、包容技术发展的可能方向。
AI.conclusion: 技术伦理需超越理论抽象，结合社会现实与权力关系进行批判性实践，以实现更公正的技术治理与创新。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 技术伦理需超越理论抽象，结合社会现实与权力关系进行批判性实践，以实现更公正的技术治理与创新。

tldr: 本文集探讨了技术伦理在数字技术研究、开发、使用和治理中的实际意义与影响，通过跨学科视角分析伦理与技术、社会的互动关系。
motivation: 针对数字技术带来的社会危害，学界和业界呼吁加强技术伦理，但需批判性审视伦理框架的适用性、权力结构及实践中的挑战。
method: 通过跨学科方法，聚焦现实中的技术伦理实践与争议，分析不同领域中伦理与技术的整合方式及潜在改进路径。
result: 揭示了技术伦理的复杂性，质疑了伦理优先性的单一性，并提出了推动更公平、包容技术发展的可能方向。
conclusion: 技术伦理需超越理论抽象，结合社会现实与权力关系进行批判性实践，以实现更公正的技术治理与创新。
search_text: Technology Ethics in Action: Critical and Interdisciplinary Perspectives 实践中的技术伦理：批判性和跨学科的视角 This special issue interrogates the meaning and impacts of "tech ethics": the embedding of ethics into digital technology research, development, use, and governance. In response to concerns about the social harms associated with digital technologies, many individuals and institutions have articulated the need for a greater emphasis on ethics in digital technology. Yet as more groups embrace the concept of ethics, critical discourses have emerged questioning whose ethics are being centered, whether "ethics" is the appropriate frame for improving technology, and what it means to develop "ethical" technology in practice. This interdisciplinary issue takes up these questions, interrogating the relationships among ethics, technology, and society in action. This special issue engages with the normative and contested notions of ethics itself, how ethics has been integrated with technology across domains, and potential paths forward to support more just and egalitarian technology. Rather than starting from philosophical theories, the authors in this issue orient their articles around the real-world discourses and impacts of tech ethics--i.e., tech ethics in action. 本期特刊探讨了“技术伦理”的含义和影响：将伦理嵌入数字技术的研究、开发、使用和治理中。为了回应对数字技术相关社会危害的担忧，许多个人和机构都明确表示需要更加重视数字技术的道德规范。然而，随着越来越多的群体接受伦理概念，批评性话语开始质疑谁的伦理是中心，“伦理”是否是改进技术的适当框架，以及在实践中开发“伦理”技术意味着什么。这个跨学科问题探讨了这些问题，质疑伦理、技术和社会之间的关系。本期特刊涉及道德本身的规范性和有争议的概念、道德如何与跨领域的技术相结合，以及支持更加公正和平等的技术的潜在路径。本期作者不是从哲学理论出发，而是围绕现实世界的技术伦理话语和影响（即行动中的技术伦理）来撰写文章。 本文集探讨了技术伦理在数字技术研究、开发、使用和治理中的实际意义与影响，通过跨学科视角分析伦理与技术、社会的互动关系。 Ben Green cs.CY,cs.AI

authors_text: Stanislas Polu,Jesse Michael Han,Kunhao Zheng,Mantas Baksys,Igor Babuschkin,Ilya Sutskever
title: Formal Mathematics Statement Curriculum Learning
title_zh: 形式数学陈述课程学习
abstract: We explore the use of expert iteration in the context of language modeling applied to formal mathematics. We show that at same compute budget, expert iteration, by which we mean proof search interleaved with learning, dramatically outperforms proof search only. We also observe that when applied to a collection of formal statements of sufficiently varied difficulty, expert iteration is capable of finding and solving a curriculum of increasingly difficult problems, without the need for associated ground-truth proofs. Finally, by applying this expert iteration to a manually curated set of problem statements, we achieve state-of-the-art on the miniF2F benchmark, automatically solving multiple challenging problems drawn from high school olympiads.
summary: We explore the use of expert iteration in the context of language modeling applied to formal mathematics. We show that at same compute budget, expert iteration, by which we mean proof search interleaved with learning, dramatically outperforms proof search only. We also observe that when applied to a collection of formal statements of sufficiently varied difficulty, expert iteration is capable of finding and solving a curriculum of increasingly difficult problems, without the need for associated ground-truth proofs. Finally, by applying this expert iteration to a manually curated set of problem statements, we achieve state-of-the-art on the miniF2F benchmark, automatically solving multiple challenging problems drawn from high school olympiads.
abstract_zh: 我们探索在应用于形式数学的语言建模背景下使用专家迭代。我们表明，在相同的计算预算下，专家迭代（即证明搜索与学习交织）的性能显着优于仅证明搜索。我们还观察到，当应用于难度足够不同的正式陈述的集合时，专家迭代能够找到并解决越来越困难的问题的课程，而不需要相关的地面事实证明。最后，通过将此专家迭代应用于手动策划的一组问题陈述，我们在 miniF2F 基准上实现了最先进的水平，自动解决了来自高中奥林匹克竞赛的多个具有挑战性的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在形式化数学领域中，通过专家迭代（将证明搜索与学习结合）提升语言模型性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统证明搜索方法在计算资源有限时效果不佳，且难以自主构建难度递增的问题集。
AI.method: 提出专家迭代框架，通过交替进行证明搜索和模型学习，利用多样化难度的问题集实现自适应训练。
AI.result: 在相同计算预算下显著优于纯证明搜索方法，并在miniF2F基准测试中达到最优表现，自动解决多个高中奥赛难题。
AI.conclusion: 专家迭代机制能有效实现形式化数学问题的课程学习，无需人工标注证明即可解决复杂问题。

authors_text: Jannis Born,Matteo Manica
title: Regression Transformer: Concurrent sequence regression and generation for molecular language modeling
title_zh: Regression Transformer：用于分子语言建模的并发序列回归和生成
comment: Updated paper, under review; Preliminary version as spotlight talk at ICLR 2022 workshop on Machine Learning for Drug Discovery
comments: Updated paper, under review; Preliminary version as spotlight talk at ICLR 2022 workshop on Machine Learning for Drug Discovery
abstract: Despite significant progress of generative models in the natural sciences, their controllability remains challenging. One fundamentally missing aspect of molecular or protein generative models is an inductive bias that can reflect continuous properties of interest. To that end, we propose the Regression Transformer (RT), a novel method that abstracts regression as a conditional sequence modeling problem. This introduces a new paradigm of multitask language models which seamlessly bridge sequence regression and conditional sequence generation. We thoroughly demonstrate that, despite using a nominal-scale training objective, the RT matches or surpasses the performance of conventional regression models in property prediction tasks of small molecules, proteins and chemical reactions. Critically, priming the same model with continuous properties yields a highly competitive conditional generative model that outperforms specialized approaches in a substructure-constrained, property-driven molecule generation benchmark. Our dichotomous approach is facilitated by a novel, alternating training scheme that enables the model to decorate seed sequences by desired properties, e.g., to optimize reaction yield. In sum, the RT is the first report of a multitask model that concurrently excels at predictive and generative tasks in biochemistry. This finds particular application in property-driven, local exploration of the chemical or protein space and could pave the road toward foundation models in material design. The code to reproduce all experiments of the paper is available at: https://github.com/IBM/regression-transformer
summary: Despite significant progress of generative models in the natural sciences, their controllability remains challenging. One fundamentally missing aspect of molecular or protein generative models is an inductive bias that can reflect continuous properties of interest. To that end, we propose the Regression Transformer (RT), a novel method that abstracts regression as a conditional sequence modeling problem. This introduces a new paradigm of multitask language models which seamlessly bridge sequence regression and conditional sequence generation. We thoroughly demonstrate that, despite using a nominal-scale training objective, the RT matches or surpasses the performance of conventional regression models in property prediction tasks of small molecules, proteins and chemical reactions. Critically, priming the same model with continuous properties yields a highly competitive conditional generative model that outperforms specialized approaches in a substructure-constrained, property-driven molecule generation benchmark. Our dichotomous approach is facilitated by a novel, alternating training scheme that enables the model to decorate seed sequences by desired properties, e.g., to optimize reaction yield. In sum, the RT is the first report of a multitask model that concurrently excels at predictive and generative tasks in biochemistry. This finds particular application in property-driven, local exploration of the chemical or protein space and could pave the road toward foundation models in material design. The code to reproduce all experiments of the paper is available at: https://github.com/IBM/regression-transformer
abstract_zh: 尽管自然科学中的生成模型取得了重大进展，但它们的可控性仍然具有挑战性。分子或蛋白质生成模型从根本上缺失的一个方面是可以反映感兴趣的连续属性的归纳偏差。为此，我们提出了回归变换器（RT），这是一种将回归抽象为条件序列建模问题的新方法。这引入了多任务语言模型的新范例，它无缝地连接序列回归和条件序列生成。我们彻底证明，尽管使用标称规模的训练目标，RT 在小分子、蛋白质和化学反应的性质预测任务中的表现仍匹配或超过传统回归模型的性能。至关重要的是，用连续属性启动同一模型会产生一个具有高度竞争力的条件生成模型，该模型在子结构约束、属性驱动的分子生成基准中优于专门方法。我们的二分方法是通过一种新颖的交替训练方案来促进的，该方案使模型能够通过所需的属性来装饰种子序列，例如，以优化反应产量。总之，RT 是第一个关于同时擅长生物化学预测和生成任务的多任务模型的报告。这在化学或蛋白质空间的属性驱动的局部探索中得到了特别的应用，并且可以为材料设计中的基础模型铺平道路。重现本文所有实验的代码位于：https://github.com/IBM/regression-transformer

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Regression Transformer（RT）的新型多任务模型，可同时处理分子语言建模中的序列回归预测与条件生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型在分子/蛋白质领域缺乏对连续属性的归纳偏置，难以实现可控的属性驱动生成。
AI.method: 将回归问题抽象为条件序列建模，通过交替训练方案实现预测与生成任务的协同优化，利用连续属性指导序列生成。
AI.result: RT在分子/蛋白质属性预测任务中达到或超越传统模型性能，且在约束子结构的生成基准测试中优于专用方法。
AI.conclusion: RT是首个在生物化学领域同时胜任预测与生成任务的多任务模型，为属性驱动的化学空间探索和材料设计奠定基础。

authors_text: Farhad Maleki,Katie Ovens,Rajiv Gupta,Caroline Reinhold,Alan Spatz,Reza Forghani
title: Generalizability of Machine Learning Models: Quantitative Evaluation of Three Methodological Pitfalls
title_zh: 机器学习模型的普遍性：三个方法论陷阱的定量评估
comment: 18 pages, 7 Figures
comments: 18 pages, 7 Figures
abstract: Purpose: Despite the potential of machine learning models, the lack of generalizability has hindered their widespread adoption in clinical practice. We investigate three methodological pitfalls: (1) violation of independence assumption, (2) model evaluation with an inappropriate performance indicator or baseline for comparison, and (3) batch effect. Materials and Methods: Using several retrospective datasets, we implement machine learning models with and without the pitfalls to quantitatively illustrate these pitfalls' effect on model generalizability. Results: Violation of independence assumption, more specifically, applying oversampling, feature selection, and data augmentation before splitting data into train, validation, and test sets, respectively, led to misleading and superficial gains in F1 scores of 71.2% in predicting local recurrence and 5.0% in predicting 3-year overall survival in head and neck cancer as well as 46.0% in distinguishing histopathological patterns in lung cancer. Further, randomly distributing data points for a subject across training, validation, and test sets led to a 21.8% superficial increase in F1 score. Also, we showed the importance of the choice of performance measures and baseline for comparison. In the presence of batch effect, a model built for pneumonia detection led to F1 score of 98.7%. However, when the same model was applied to a new dataset of normal patients, it only correctly classified 3.86% of the samples. Conclusions: These methodological pitfalls cannot be captured using internal model evaluation, and the inaccurate predictions made by such models may lead to wrong conclusions and interpretations. Therefore, understanding and avoiding these pitfalls is necessary for developing generalizable models.
summary: Purpose: Despite the potential of machine learning models, the lack of generalizability has hindered their widespread adoption in clinical practice. We investigate three methodological pitfalls: (1) violation of independence assumption, (2) model evaluation with an inappropriate performance indicator or baseline for comparison, and (3) batch effect. Materials and Methods: Using several retrospective datasets, we implement machine learning models with and without the pitfalls to quantitatively illustrate these pitfalls' effect on model generalizability. Results: Violation of independence assumption, more specifically, applying oversampling, feature selection, and data augmentation before splitting data into train, validation, and test sets, respectively, led to misleading and superficial gains in F1 scores of 71.2% in predicting local recurrence and 5.0% in predicting 3-year overall survival in head and neck cancer as well as 46.0% in distinguishing histopathological patterns in lung cancer. Further, randomly distributing data points for a subject across training, validation, and test sets led to a 21.8% superficial increase in F1 score. Also, we showed the importance of the choice of performance measures and baseline for comparison. In the presence of batch effect, a model built for pneumonia detection led to F1 score of 98.7%. However, when the same model was applied to a new dataset of normal patients, it only correctly classified 3.86% of the samples. Conclusions: These methodological pitfalls cannot be captured using internal model evaluation, and the inaccurate predictions made by such models may lead to wrong conclusions and interpretations. Therefore, understanding and avoiding these pitfalls is necessary for developing generalizable models.
abstract_zh: 目的：尽管机器学习模型具有潜力，但缺乏普遍性阻碍了其在临床实践中的广泛采用。我们研究了三个方法论陷阱：（1）违反独立性假设，（2）使用不适当的绩效指标或比较基线进行模型评估，以及（3）批次效应。材料和方法：使用多个回顾性数据集，我们实现了有或没有陷阱的机器学习模型，以定量说明这些陷阱对模型泛化性的影响。结果：违反独立性假设，更具体地说，在将数据分为训练集、验证集和测试集之前应用过采样、特征选择和数据增强，导致 F1 分数在预测局部复发方面产生误导性和肤浅的收益，在预测头颈癌的 3 年总生存率方面提高 71.2%，在预测头颈癌的 3 年总生存率方面提高 5.0%，在区分肺癌的组织病理学模式方面提高 46.0%。此外，在训练、验证和测试集中随机分配受试者的数据点导致 F1 分数表面增加 21.8%。此外，我们还展示了选择绩效衡量标准和比较基准的重要性。在存在批次效应的情况下，为肺炎检测建立的模型的 F1 分数为 98.7%。然而，当相同的模型应用于正常患者的新数据集时，它仅正确分类了 3.86% 的样本。结论：使用内部模型评估无法捕获这些方法论缺陷，并且此类模型做出的不准确预测可能会导致错误的结论和解释。因此，理解并避免这些陷阱对于开发可推广的模型是必要的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了机器学习模型在临床实践中普遍存在的泛化能力不足问题，通过量化分析三个方法学陷阱对模型泛化能力的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习模型具有潜力，但其在临床实践中的广泛应用受到泛化能力不足的阻碍，需识别导致误导性结果的方法学陷阱。
AI.method: 使用多个回顾性数据集，通过实施包含或排除三个方法学陷阱的机器学习模型，量化分析其对模型泛化能力的影响。
AI.result: 违反独立性假设导致F1分数虚高（如头颈癌局部复发预测达71.2%），批次效应使肺炎检测模型在新数据集上准确率骤降至3.86%。
AI.conclusion: 这些方法学陷阱无法通过内部模型评估发现，可能导致错误结论，因此需理解并避免这些陷阱以开发可泛化的模型。

authors_text: Calvin Bao,Siyao Li,Sarah Flores,Michael Correll,Leilani Battle
title: Recommendations for Visualization Recommendations: Exploring Preferences and Priorities in Public Health
title_zh: 可视化建议建议：探索公共卫生领域的偏好和优先事项
abstract: The promise of visualization recommendation systems is that analysts will be automatically provided with relevant and high-quality visualizations that will reduce the work of manual exploration or chart creation. However, little research to date has focused on what analysts value in the design of visualization recommendations. We interviewed 18 analysts in the public health sector and explored how they made sense of a popular in-domain dataset. in service of generating visualizations to recommend to others. We also explored how they interacted with a corpus of both automatically- and manually-generated visualization recommendations, with the goal of uncovering how the design values of these analysts are reflected in current visualization recommendation systems. We find that analysts champion simple charts with clear takeaways that are nonetheless connected with existing semantic information or domain hypotheses. We conclude by recommending that visualization recommendation designers explore ways of integrating context and expectation into their systems.
summary: The promise of visualization recommendation systems is that analysts will be automatically provided with relevant and high-quality visualizations that will reduce the work of manual exploration or chart creation. However, little research to date has focused on what analysts value in the design of visualization recommendations. We interviewed 18 analysts in the public health sector and explored how they made sense of a popular in-domain dataset. in service of generating visualizations to recommend to others. We also explored how they interacted with a corpus of both automatically- and manually-generated visualization recommendations, with the goal of uncovering how the design values of these analysts are reflected in current visualization recommendation systems. We find that analysts champion simple charts with clear takeaways that are nonetheless connected with existing semantic information or domain hypotheses. We conclude by recommending that visualization recommendation designers explore ways of integrating context and expectation into their systems.
abstract_zh: 可视化推荐系统的承诺是，分析师将自动获得相关且高质量的可视化，这将减少手动探索或图表创建的工作。然而，迄今为止，很少有研究关注分析师在可视化建议设计中的价值。我们采访了公共卫生领域的 18 名分析师，并探讨了他们如何理解流行的领域内数据集。用于生成可视化效果以推荐给其他人。我们还探讨了他们如何与自动和手动生成的可视化推荐语料库进行交互，目的是揭示这些分析师的设计价值如何反映在当前的可视化推荐系统中。我们发现分析师拥护具有清晰要点的简单图表，但这些图表仍然与现有语义信息或领域假设相关。最后，我们建议可视化推荐设计者探索将上下文和期望集成到他们的系统中的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过研究公共卫生领域分析师的偏好，探索可视化推荐系统的设计改进方向。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化推荐系统缺乏对分析师实际需求和设计偏好的深入研究，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 对18名公共卫生分析师进行访谈，分析他们对领域数据集的可视化理解及与自动/手动生成推荐的交互行为。
AI.result: 分析师偏好简洁且能传达明确结论的图表，同时需与现有语义信息或领域假设相关联。
AI.conclusion: 可视化推荐系统设计应整合上下文信息和用户预期，以提升推荐效果与实用性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过研究公共卫生领域分析师的偏好，探索可视化推荐系统的设计改进方向。

authors_text: Dianbo Liu,Alex Lamb,Xu Ji,Pascal Notsawo,Mike Mozer,Yoshua Bengio,Kenji Kawaguchi
title: Adaptive Discrete Communication Bottlenecks with Dynamic Vector Quantization
title_zh: 具有动态矢量量化的自适应离散通信瓶颈
abstract: Vector Quantization (VQ) is a method for discretizing latent representations and has become a major part of the deep learning toolkit. It has been theoretically and empirically shown that discretization of representations leads to improved generalization, including in reinforcement learning where discretization can be used to bottleneck multi-agent communication to promote agent specialization and robustness. The discretization tightness of most VQ-based methods is defined by the number of discrete codes in the representation vector and the codebook size, which are fixed as hyperparameters. In this work, we propose learning to dynamically select discretization tightness conditioned on inputs, based on the hypothesis that data naturally contains variations in complexity that call for different levels of representational coarseness. We show that dynamically varying tightness in communication bottlenecks can improve model performance on visual reasoning and reinforcement learning tasks.
summary: Vector Quantization (VQ) is a method for discretizing latent representations and has become a major part of the deep learning toolkit. It has been theoretically and empirically shown that discretization of representations leads to improved generalization, including in reinforcement learning where discretization can be used to bottleneck multi-agent communication to promote agent specialization and robustness. The discretization tightness of most VQ-based methods is defined by the number of discrete codes in the representation vector and the codebook size, which are fixed as hyperparameters. In this work, we propose learning to dynamically select discretization tightness conditioned on inputs, based on the hypothesis that data naturally contains variations in complexity that call for different levels of representational coarseness. We show that dynamically varying tightness in communication bottlenecks can improve model performance on visual reasoning and reinforcement learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 矢量量化（VQ）是一种离散化潜在表示的方法，已成为深度学习工具包的主要组成部分。理论和经验表明，表示的离散化可以提高泛化能力，包括在强化学习中，离散化可以用来限制多智能体通信，以促进智能体专业化和鲁棒性。大多数基于 VQ 的方法的离散化紧密度是由表示向量中离散代码的数量和码本大小定义的，这些代码被固定为超参数。在这项工作中，我们建议学习动态选择以输入为条件的离散化紧密度，基于这样的假设：数据自然包含复杂性的变化，需要不同级别的表示粗糙度。我们证明，动态改变通信瓶颈的紧密度可以提高模型在视觉推理和强化学习任务上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态向量量化的自适应离散通信瓶颈方法，通过根据输入数据动态调整离散化紧密度来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有向量量化方法使用固定超参数定义离散化紧密度，无法适应数据复杂度变化，导致表示灵活性不足，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 提出动态调整离散化紧密度的方法，根据输入数据复杂度动态选择代码本的使用，从而改变通信瓶颈的表示粗细。
AI.result: 动态调整通信瓶颈离散化紧密度的方法在视觉推理和强化学习任务中均提升了模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 动态调整通信瓶颈的离散化紧密度能有效提升模型性能，未来可进一步探索其在更多任务中的应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态向量量化的自适应离散通信瓶颈方法，通过根据输入数据动态调整离散化紧密度来提升模型性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有向量量化方法使用固定超参数定义离散化紧密度，无法适应数据复杂度变化，导致表示灵活性不足，影响模型性能。
ai_content.method: 提出动态调整离散化紧密度的方法，根据输入数据复杂度动态选择代码本的使用，从而改变通信瓶颈的表示粗细。
ai_content.result: 动态调整通信瓶颈离散化紧密度的方法在视觉推理和强化学习任务中均提升了模型性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 动态调整通信瓶颈的离散化紧密度能有效提升模型性能，未来可进一步探索其在更多任务中的应用。

search_text: Adaptive Discrete Communication Bottlenecks with Dynamic Vector Quantization 具有动态矢量量化的自适应离散通信瓶颈 Vector Quantization (VQ) is a method for discretizing latent representations and has become a major part of the deep learning toolkit. It has been theoretically and empirically shown that discretization of representations leads to improved generalization, including in reinforcement learning where discretization can be used to bottleneck multi-agent communication to promote agent specialization and robustness. The discretization tightness of most VQ-based methods is defined by the number of discrete codes in the representation vector and the codebook size, which are fixed as hyperparameters. In this work, we propose learning to dynamically select discretization tightness conditioned on inputs, based on the hypothesis that data naturally contains variations in complexity that call for different levels of representational coarseness. We show that dynamically varying tightness in communication bottlenecks can improve model performance on visual reasoning and reinforcement learning tasks. 矢量量化（VQ）是一种离散化潜在表示的方法，已成为深度学习工具包的主要组成部分。理论和经验表明，表示的离散化可以提高泛化能力，包括在强化学习中，离散化可以用来限制多智能体通信，以促进智能体专业化和鲁棒性。大多数基于 VQ 的方法的离散化紧密度是由表示向量中离散代码的数量和码本大小定义的，这些代码被固定为超参数。在这项工作中，我们建议学习动态选择以输入为条件的离散化紧密度，基于这样的假设：数据自然包含复杂性的变化，需要不同级别的表示粗糙度。我们证明，动态改变通信瓶颈的紧密度可以提高模型在视觉推理和强化学习任务上的性能。 本文提出了一种基于动态向量量化的自适应离散通信瓶颈方法，通过根据输入数据动态调整离散化紧密度来提升模型性能。 Dianbo Liu,Alex Lamb,Xu Ji,Pascal Notsawo,Mike Mozer,Yoshua Bengio,Kenji Kawaguchi cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: William Cai,Ro Encarnacion,Bobbie Chern,Sam Corbett-Davies,Miranda Bogen,Stevie Bergman,Sharad Goel
title: Adaptive Sampling Strategies to Construct Equitable Training Datasets
title_zh: 构建公平训练数据集的自适应采样策略
comment: 15 pages, 2 figures
comments: 15 pages, 2 figures
abstract: In domains ranging from computer vision to natural language processing, machine learning models have been shown to exhibit stark disparities, often performing worse for members of traditionally underserved groups. One factor contributing to these performance gaps is a lack of representation in the data the models are trained on. It is often unclear, however, how to operationalize representativeness in specific applications. Here we formalize the problem of creating equitable training datasets, and propose a statistical framework for addressing this problem. We consider a setting where a model builder must decide how to allocate a fixed data collection budget to gather training data from different subgroups. We then frame dataset creation as a constrained optimization problem, in which one maximizes a function of group-specific performance metrics based on (estimated) group-specific learning rates and costs per sample. This flexible approach incorporates preferences of model-builders and other stakeholders, as well as the statistical properties of the learning task. When data collection decisions are made sequentially, we show that under certain conditions this optimization problem can be efficiently solved even without prior knowledge of the learning rates. To illustrate our approach, we conduct a simulation study of polygenic risk scores on synthetic genomic data -- an application domain that often suffers from non-representative data collection. We find that our adaptive sampling strategy outperforms several common data collection heuristics, including equal and proportional sampling, demonstrating the value of strategic dataset design for building equitable models.
summary: In domains ranging from computer vision to natural language processing, machine learning models have been shown to exhibit stark disparities, often performing worse for members of traditionally underserved groups. One factor contributing to these performance gaps is a lack of representation in the data the models are trained on. It is often unclear, however, how to operationalize representativeness in specific applications. Here we formalize the problem of creating equitable training datasets, and propose a statistical framework for addressing this problem. We consider a setting where a model builder must decide how to allocate a fixed data collection budget to gather training data from different subgroups. We then frame dataset creation as a constrained optimization problem, in which one maximizes a function of group-specific performance metrics based on (estimated) group-specific learning rates and costs per sample. This flexible approach incorporates preferences of model-builders and other stakeholders, as well as the statistical properties of the learning task. When data collection decisions are made sequentially, we show that under certain conditions this optimization problem can be efficiently solved even without prior knowledge of the learning rates. To illustrate our approach, we conduct a simulation study of polygenic risk scores on synthetic genomic data -- an application domain that often suffers from non-representative data collection. We find that our adaptive sampling strategy outperforms several common data collection heuristics, including equal and proportional sampling, demonstrating the value of strategic dataset design for building equitable models.
abstract_zh: 从计算机视觉到自然语言处理等领域，机器学习模型已被证明表现出明显的差异，对于传统上服务不足的群体的成员来说往往表现更差。造成这些性能差距的因素之一是模型训练所用的数据缺乏代表性。然而，如何在特定应用中实现代表性通常并不清楚。在这里，我们形式化了创建公平训练数据集的问题，并提出了解决该问题的统计框架。我们考虑这样一种设置，模型构建者必须决定如何分配固定的数据收集预算以从不同的子组收集训练数据。然后，我们将数据集创建视为一个约束优化问题，其中基于（估计的）特定于组的学习率和每个样本的成本来最大化特定于组的性能指标的函数。这种灵活的方法结合了模型构建者和其他利益相关者的偏好，以及学习任务的统计特性。当按顺序做出数据收集决策时，我们表明，在某些条件下，即使没有学习率的先验知识，也可以有效地解决此优化问题。为了说明我们的方法，我们对合成基因组数据的多基因风险评分进行了模拟研究，这是一个经常遭受非代表性数据收集的应用领域。我们发现我们的自适应采样策略优于几种常见的数据收集启发式方法，包括等量采样和比例采样，证明了战略数据集设计对于构建公平模型的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应采样策略，通过优化数据收集预算分配来构建公平的训练数据集，以解决机器学习模型在不同群体间表现差异的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习模型在传统未充分服务群体上表现较差，主要原因是训练数据中群体代表性不足，而如何具体实现数据代表性尚不明确。
AI.method: 将数据集构建建模为约束优化问题，通过最大化基于子群体性能指标的目标函数，结合子群体学习率和样本成本进行预算分配，并提出无需先验学习率的高效求解方法。
AI.result: 在合成基因组数据的模拟研究中，自适应采样策略优于等比例采样和按比例采样等常见方法，验证了战略数据集设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化数据收集策略可有效提升模型公平性，该框架为解决非代表性数据收集问题提供了可推广的方法论支持。

authors_text: Yuyan Li,Zhixin Yan,Ye Duan,Liu Ren
title: PanoDepth: A Two-Stage Approach for Monocular Omnidirectional Depth Estimation
title_zh: PanoDepth：单目全向深度估计的两阶段方法
comment: Accepted by International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV). IEEE, 2021
comments: Accepted by International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV). IEEE, 2021
abstract: Omnidirectional 3D information is essential for a wide range of applications such as Virtual Reality, Autonomous Driving, Robotics, etc. In this paper, we propose a novel, model-agnostic, two-stage pipeline for omnidirectional monocular depth estimation. Our proposed framework PanoDepth takes one 360 image as input, produces one or more synthesized views in the first stage, and feeds the original image and the synthesized images into the subsequent stereo matching stage. In the second stage, we propose a differentiable Spherical Warping Layer to handle omnidirectional stereo geometry efficiently and effectively. By utilizing the explicit stereo-based geometric constraints in the stereo matching stage, PanoDepth can generate dense high-quality depth. We conducted extensive experiments and ablation studies to evaluate PanoDepth with both the full pipeline as well as the individual modules in each stage. Our results show that PanoDepth outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin for 360 monocular depth estimation.
summary: Omnidirectional 3D information is essential for a wide range of applications such as Virtual Reality, Autonomous Driving, Robotics, etc. In this paper, we propose a novel, model-agnostic, two-stage pipeline for omnidirectional monocular depth estimation. Our proposed framework PanoDepth takes one 360 image as input, produces one or more synthesized views in the first stage, and feeds the original image and the synthesized images into the subsequent stereo matching stage. In the second stage, we propose a differentiable Spherical Warping Layer to handle omnidirectional stereo geometry efficiently and effectively. By utilizing the explicit stereo-based geometric constraints in the stereo matching stage, PanoDepth can generate dense high-quality depth. We conducted extensive experiments and ablation studies to evaluate PanoDepth with both the full pipeline as well as the individual modules in each stage. Our results show that PanoDepth outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin for 360 monocular depth estimation.
abstract_zh: 全向 3D 信息对于虚拟现实、自动驾驶、机器人等广泛的应用至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的、与模型无关的两级管道，用于全向单目深度估计。我们提出的框架 PanoDepth 将一张 360 度图像作为输入，在第一阶段生成一个或多个合成视图，并将原始图像和合成图像输入到后续的立体匹配阶段。在第二阶段，我们提出了一个可微分的球形扭曲层来高效且有效地处理全向立体几何。通过在立体匹配阶段利用基于立体的显式几何约束，PanoDepth 可以生成密集的高质量深度。我们进行了广泛的实验和消融研究，以评估 PanoDepth 的完整流程以及每个阶段的各个模块。我们的结果表明，PanoDepth 在 360 单目深度估计方面大幅优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段单目全景深度估计方法PanoDepth，通过合成视图与立体匹配结合提升全景图像深度估计效果。
AI.motivation: 全景3D信息在虚拟现实、自动驾驶等场景中具有重要价值，但现有单目深度估计方法难以有效处理全景图像的几何特性与深度精度需求。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段生成合成视图，第二阶段通过可微球面变形层处理立体几何约束，结合显式几何信息实现高精度深度估计。
AI.result: 实验表明PanoDepth在360度单目深度估计任务中显著优于现有最先进方法，且模块化设计验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PanoDepth通过创新的两阶段架构与球面变形层设计，有效解决了全景深度估计难题，为相关应用提供了高质量深度估计方案。

search_text: PanoDepth: A Two-Stage Approach for Monocular Omnidirectional Depth Estimation PanoDepth：单目全向深度估计的两阶段方法 Omnidirectional 3D information is essential for a wide range of applications such as Virtual Reality, Autonomous Driving, Robotics, etc. In this paper, we propose a novel, model-agnostic, two-stage pipeline for omnidirectional monocular depth estimation. Our proposed framework PanoDepth takes one 360 image as input, produces one or more synthesized views in the first stage, and feeds the original image and the synthesized images into the subsequent stereo matching stage. In the second stage, we propose a differentiable Spherical Warping Layer to handle omnidirectional stereo geometry efficiently and effectively. By utilizing the explicit stereo-based geometric constraints in the stereo matching stage, PanoDepth can generate dense high-quality depth. We conducted extensive experiments and ablation studies to evaluate PanoDepth with both the full pipeline as well as the individual modules in each stage. Our results show that PanoDepth outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin for 360 monocular depth estimation. 全向 3D 信息对于虚拟现实、自动驾驶、机器人等广泛的应用至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的、与模型无关的两级管道，用于全向单目深度估计。我们提出的框架 PanoDepth 将一张 360 度图像作为输入，在第一阶段生成一个或多个合成视图，并将原始图像和合成图像输入到后续的立体匹配阶段。在第二阶段，我们提出了一个可微分的球形扭曲层来高效且有效地处理全向立体几何。通过在立体匹配阶段利用基于立体的显式几何约束，PanoDepth 可以生成密集的高质量深度。我们进行了广泛的实验和消融研究，以评估 PanoDepth 的完整流程以及每个阶段的各个模块。我们的结果表明，PanoDepth 在 360 单目深度估计方面大幅优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种两阶段单目全景深度估计方法PanoDepth，通过合成视图与立体匹配结合提升全景图像深度估计效果。 Yuyan Li,Zhixin Yan,Ye Duan,Liu Ren cs.CV

authors_text: Seth Frey,Qiankun Zhong,Beril Bulat,William D. Weisman,Caitlyn Liu,Stephen Fujimoto,Hannah M. Wang,Charles M. Schweik
title: Governing online goods: Maturity and formalization in Minecraft, Reddit, and World of Warcraft communities
title_zh: 管理在线商品：《我的世界》、Reddit 和《魔兽世界》社区的成熟度和正规化
comment: 23 pages. 4 figures
comments: 23 pages. 4 figures
abstract: Building a successful community means governing active populations and limited resources. This challenge often requires communities to design formal governance systems from scratch. But the characteristics of successful institutional designs are unclear. Communities that are more mature and established may have more elaborate formal policy systems. Alternatively, they may require less formalization precisely because of their maturity. Indeed, scholars often downplay the role that formal rules relative to unwritten rules, norms, and values. But in a community with formal rules, decisions are more consistent, transparent, and legitimate. To understand the relationship of formal institutions to community maturity and governance style, we conduct a large-scale quantitative analysis applying institutional analysis frameworks of self-governance scholar Elinor Ostrom to 80,000 communities across 3 platforms: the sandbox game Minecraft, the MMO game World of Warcraft, and Reddit. We classify communities' written rules to test predictors of institutional formalization. From this analysis we extract two major findings. First, institutional formalization, the size and complexity of an online community's governance system, is generally positively associated with maturity, as measured by age, population size, or degree of user engagement. Second, we find that online communities employ similar governance styles across platforms, strongly favoring "weak" norms to "strong" requirements. These findings suggest that designers and founders of online communities converge on styles of governance practice that are correlated with successful self-governance. With deeper insights into the patterns of successful self-governance, we can help more communities overcome the challenges of self-governance and create for their members powerful experiences of shared meaning and collective empowerment.

But the characteristics of successful institutional designs are unclear. Communities that are more mature and established may have more elaborate formal policy systems. Alternatively, they may require less formalization precisely because of their maturity. Indeed, scholars often downplay the role that formal rules relative to unwritten rules, norms, and values. But in a community with formal rules, decisions are more consistent, transparent, and legitimate. To understand the relationship of formal institutions to community maturity and governance style, we conduct a large-scale quantitative analysis applying institutional analysis frameworks of self-governance scholar Elinor Ostrom to 80,000 communities across 3 platforms: the sandbox game Minecraft, the MMO game World of Warcraft, and Reddit. We classify communities' written rules to test predictors of institutional formalization. From this analysis we extract two major findings. First, institutional formalization, the size and complexity of an online community's governance system, is generally positively associated with maturity, as measured by age, population size, or degree of user engagement. Second, we find that online communities employ similar governance styles across platforms, strongly favoring "weak" norms to "strong" requirements. These findings suggest that designers and founders of online communities converge on styles of governance practice that are correlated with successful self-governance. With deeper insights into the patterns of successful self-governance, we can help more communities overcome the challenges of self-governance and create for their members powerful experiences of shared meaning and collective empowerment.
abstract_zh: 建立一个成功的社区意味着管理活跃的人口和有限的资源。这一挑战通常需要社区从头开始设计正式的治理系统。但成功的制度设计的特征尚不清楚。更加成熟和成熟的社区可能拥有更加复杂的正式政策体系。或者，正是由于它们的成熟性，它们可能需要较少的形式化。事实上，学者们经常淡化正式规则相对于不成文规则、规范和价值观的作用。但在有正式规则的社区中，决策更加一致、透明和合法。为了了解正式制度与社区成熟度和治理风格的关系，我们采用自治学者埃莉诺·奥斯特罗姆（Elinor Ostrom）的制度分析框架，对沙盒游戏《我的世界》、MMO 游戏《魔兽世界》和 Reddit 3 个平台的 80,000 个社区进行了大规模定量分析。我们对社区的书面规则进行分类，以测试制度正规化的预测因素。从这个分析中，我们得出两个主要发现。首先，制度正规化，即在线社区治理系统的规模和复杂性，通常与成熟度呈正相关，以年龄、人口规模或用户参与程度来衡量。其次，我们发现在线社区跨平台采用类似的治理风格，强烈支持“弱”规范而不是“强”要求。这些发现表明，在线社区的设计者和创始人趋同于与成功自治相关的治理实践风格。通过对成功自治模式的深入了解，我们可以帮助更多社区克服自治挑战，并为其成员创造共享意义和集体赋权的强大体验。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了Minecraft、Reddit和World of Warcraft三个平台上8万个在线社区的治理系统成熟度与正式化程度的关系。
AI.motivation: 探索在线社区如何通过正式规则实现有效治理，分析社区成熟度与治理风格之间的关联，以指导成功自我管理的实践。
AI.method: 基于埃莉诺·奥斯特罗姆的制度分析框架，对三个平台的社区书面规则进行大规模量化分类与分析。
AI.result: 发现社区治理系统的正式化程度与成熟度（年龄、规模、用户参与度）呈正相关，且跨平台社区普遍偏好‘弱’规范而非‘强’要求。
AI.conclusion: 在线社区治理实践存在共性模式，理解这些模式可帮助社区克服自我治理挑战，增强成员的集体赋权感。

authors_text: Gokul Swamy,Sanjiban Choudhury,J. Andrew Bagnell,Zhiwei Steven Wu
title: Causal Imitation Learning under Temporally Correlated Noise
title_zh: 时间相关噪声下的因果模仿学习
abstract: We develop algorithms for imitation learning from policy data that was corrupted by temporally correlated noise in expert actions. When noise affects multiple timesteps of recorded data, it can manifest as spurious correlations between states and actions that a learner might latch on to, leading to poor policy performance. To break up these spurious correlations, we apply modern variants of the instrumental variable regression (IVR) technique of econometrics, enabling us to recover the underlying policy without requiring access to an interactive expert. In particular, we present two techniques, one of a generative-modeling flavor (DoubIL) that can utilize access to a simulator, and one of a game-theoretic flavor (ResiduIL) that can be run entirely offline. We find both of our algorithms compare favorably to behavioral cloning on simulated control tasks.
summary: We develop algorithms for imitation learning from policy data that was corrupted by temporally correlated noise in expert actions. When noise affects multiple timesteps of recorded data, it can manifest as spurious correlations between states and actions that a learner might latch on to, leading to poor policy performance. To break up these spurious correlations, we apply modern variants of the instrumental variable regression (IVR) technique of econometrics, enabling us to recover the underlying policy without requiring access to an interactive expert. In particular, we present two techniques, one of a generative-modeling flavor (DoubIL) that can utilize access to a simulator, and one of a game-theoretic flavor (ResiduIL) that can be run entirely offline. We find both of our algorithms compare favorably to behavioral cloning on simulated control tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了从被专家行为中的时间相关噪声破坏的策略数据中进行模仿学习的算法。当噪声影响记录数据的多个时间步长时，它可能表现为学习者可能会抓住的状态和动作之间的虚假相关性，从而导致政策绩效不佳。为了打破这些虚假的相关性，我们应用了计量经济学工具变量回归（IVR）技术的现代变体，使我们能够在不需要接触交互式专家的情况下恢复基本政策。特别是，我们提出了两种技术，一种是可以利用模拟器访问的生成建模风格（DoubIL），另一种是可以完全离线运行的博弈论风格（ResiduIL）。我们发现我们的两种算法在模拟控制任务上都优于行为克隆。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种算法解决因专家动作中存在时间相关噪声导致的模仿学习问题，通过打破虚假关联恢复真实策略。
AI.motivation: 专家动作中的时间相关噪声会导致状态与动作间的虚假关联，使学习器误判策略，从而影响性能，且传统方法需依赖交互式专家。
AI.method: 采用计量经济学中的工具变量回归（IVR）技术，提出基于生成模型的DoubIL（需模拟器）和基于博弈论的ResiduIL（纯离线）两种方法，消除噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在模拟控制任务中，两种算法均优于行为克隆方法，有效恢复了无噪声情况下的策略性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过IVR技术成功缓解了时间相关噪声带来的虚假关联问题，为无交互式专家场景提供了在线与离线解决方案。

authors_text: Hanieh Shabanian,Madhusudhanan Balasubramanian
title: Multi-Resolution Factor Graph Based Stereo Correspondence Algorithm
title_zh: 基于多分辨率因子图的立体对应算法
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures and 2 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.11077
comments: 18 pages, 4 figures and 2 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.11077
abstract: A dense depth-map of a scene at an arbitrary view orientation can be estimated from dense view correspondences among multiple lower-dimensional views of the scene. These low-dimensional view correspondences are dependent on the geometrical relationship among the views and the scene. Determining dense view correspondences is difficult in part due to presence of homogeneous regions in the scene and due to presence of occluded regions and illumination differences among the views. We present a new multi-resolution factor graph-based stereo matching algorithm (MR-FGS) that utilizes both intra- and inter-resolution dependencies among the views as well as among the disparity estimates. The proposed framework allows exchange of information among multiple resolutions of the correspondence problem and is useful for handling larger homogeneous regions in a scene. The MR-FGS algorithm was evaluated qualitatively and quantitatively using stereo pairs in the Middlebury stereo benchmark dataset based on commonly used performance measures. When compared to a recently developed factor graph model (FGS), the MR-FGS algorithm provided more accurate disparity estimates without requiring the commonly used post-processing procedure known as the left-right consistency check. The multi-resolution dependency constraint within the factor-graph model significantly improved contrast along depth boundaries in the MR-FGS generated disparity maps.

abstract_zh: 可以根据场景的多个低维视图之间的密集视图对应来估计任意视图方向的场景的密集深度图。这些低维视图对应关系取决于视图和场景之间的几何关系。确定密集视图对应是困难的，部分原因是场景中存在均匀区域以及视图之间存在遮挡区域和照明差异。我们提出了一种新的基于多分辨率因子图的立体匹配算法（MR-FGS），该算法利用视图之间以及视差估计之间的分辨率内和分辨率间依赖性。所提出的框架允许在对应问题的多个分辨率之间交换信息，并且对于处理场景中较大的同质区域非常有用。根据常用的性能指标，使用 Middlebury 立体基准数据集中的立体对对 MR-FGS 算法进行定性和定量评估。与最近开发的因子图模型 (FGS) 相比，MR-FGS 算法提供了更准确的视差估计，而不需要常用的后处理程序（称为左右一致性检查）。因子图模型中的多分辨率依赖性约束显着改善了 MR-FGS 生成的视差图中沿深度边界的对比度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多分辨率因子图的立体匹配算法，用于估计场景的密集深度图。
AI.motivation: 由于场景中存在均匀区域、遮挡区域和光照差异，确定密集视图对应关系具有挑战性，因此需要一种更有效的立体匹配算法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种多分辨率因子图立体匹配算法（MR-FGS），利用视图和视差估计的内外分辨率依赖关系，通过因子图模型在多分辨率之间交换信息。
AI.result: 与最近开发的因子图模型（FGS）相比，MR-FGS算法在Middlebury立体基准数据集上提供了更准确的视差估计，且无需常用的左右一致性检查后处理步骤。
AI.conclusion: 多分辨率依赖约束显著提高了MR-FGS生成的视差图在深度边界处的对比度，表明该算法在处理复杂场景时具有优越性。
