authors_text: Fatima Zahrah,Jason R. C. Nurse,Michael Goldsmith
title: A Comparison of Online Hate on Reddit and 4chan: A Case Study of the 2020 US Election
title_zh: Reddit 和 4chan 上的网络仇恨比较：以 2020 年美国大选为例
comment: 2022 ACM Symposium on Applied Computing (SAC'22)
comments: 2022 ACM Symposium on Applied Computing (SAC'22)
abstract: The rapid integration of the Internet into our daily lives has led to many benefits but also to a number of new, wide-spread threats such as online hate, trolling, bullying, and generally aggressive behaviours. While research has traditionally explored online hate, in particular, on one platform, the reality is that such hate is a phenomenon that often makes use of multiple online networks. In this article, we seek to advance the discussion into online hate by harnessing a comparative approach, where we make use of various Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to computationally analyse hateful content from Reddit and 4chan relating to the 2020 US Presidential Elections. Our findings show how content and posting activity can differ depending on the platform being used. Through this, we provide initial comparison into the platform-specific behaviours of online hate, and how different platforms can serve specific purposes. We further provide several avenues for future research utilising a cross-platform approach so as to gain a more comprehensive understanding of the global hate ecosystem.
summary: The rapid integration of the Internet into our daily lives has led to many benefits but also to a number of new, wide-spread threats such as online hate, trolling, bullying, and generally aggressive behaviours. While research has traditionally explored online hate, in particular, on one platform, the reality is that such hate is a phenomenon that often makes use of multiple online networks. In this article, we seek to advance the discussion into online hate by harnessing a comparative approach, where we make use of various Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to computationally analyse hateful content from Reddit and 4chan relating to the 2020 US Presidential Elections. Our findings show how content and posting activity can differ depending on the platform being used. Through this, we provide initial comparison into the platform-specific behaviours of online hate, and how different platforms can serve specific purposes. We further provide several avenues for future research utilising a cross-platform approach so as to gain a more comprehensive understanding of the global hate ecosystem.
abstract_zh: 互联网迅速融入我们的日常生活，带来了许多好处，但也带来了许多新的、广泛的威胁，例如网上仇恨、恶搞、欺凌和普遍的攻击行为。虽然研究传统上探讨了在线仇恨，特别是在一个平台上，但现实情况是，这种仇恨是一种经常利用多个在线网络的现象。在本文中，我们寻求通过利用比较方法来推进对在线仇恨的讨论，其中我们利用各种自然语言处理 (NLP) 技术来计算分析来自 Reddit 和 4chan 的与 2020 年美国总统选举相关的仇恨内容。我们的研究结果表明，内容和发布活动可能因所使用的平台而异。通过这一点，我们对特定平台的在线仇恨行为进行了初步比较，以及不同平台如何服务于特定目的。我们进一步利用跨平台方法为未来研究提供了多种途径，以便更全面地了解全球仇恨生态系统。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过比较Reddit和4chan平台上关于2020年美国大选的仇恨内容，分析不同平台上的网络仇恨特征。
AI.motivation: 传统研究多聚焦单一平台，但网络仇恨实际跨平台传播，需通过比较分析揭示平台差异及行为特征。
AI.method: 采用自然语言处理（NLP）技术，对Reddit和4chan的用户内容进行计算分析，比较两者在2020年大选期间的仇恨内容差异。
AI.result: 发现不同平台在内容类型、表达方式及用户行为上存在显著差异，且各平台在传播仇恨中扮演不同角色。
AI.conclusion: 跨平台比较有助于理解网络仇恨生态，未来需进一步结合多平台数据深化研究。

authors_text: Luigi Gresele,Julius von Kügelgen,Jonas M. Kübler,Elke Kirschbaum,Bernhard Schölkopf,Dominik Janzing
title: Causal Inference Through the Structural Causal Marginal Problem
title_zh: 通过结构性因果边际问题进行因果推断
comment: 32 pages (9 pages main paper + bibliography and appendix), 6 figures
comments: 32 pages (9 pages main paper + bibliography and appendix), 6 figures
abstract: We introduce an approach to counterfactual inference based on merging information from multiple datasets. We consider a causal reformulation of the statistical marginal problem: given a collection of marginal structural causal models (SCMs) over distinct but overlapping sets of variables, determine the set of joint SCMs that are counterfactually consistent with the marginal ones. We formalise this approach for categorical SCMs using the response function formulation and show that it reduces the space of allowed marginal and joint SCMs. Our work thus highlights a new mode of falsifiability through additional variables, in contrast to the statistical one via additional data.
summary: We introduce an approach to counterfactual inference based on merging information from multiple datasets. We consider a causal reformulation of the statistical marginal problem: given a collection of marginal structural causal models (SCMs) over distinct but overlapping sets of variables, determine the set of joint SCMs that are counterfactually consistent with the marginal ones. We formalise this approach for categorical SCMs using the response function formulation and show that it reduces the space of allowed marginal and joint SCMs. Our work thus highlights a new mode of falsifiability through additional variables, in contrast to the statistical one via additional data.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种基于合并多个数据集信息的反事实推理方法。我们考虑统计边际问题的因果重新表述：给定一组不同但重叠的变量集上的边际结构因果模型（SCM），确定与边际模型反事实一致的联合 SCM 集合。我们使用响应函数公式将这种方法形式化用于分类 SCM，并表明它减少了允许的边际和联合 SCM 的空间。因此，我们的工作强调了一种通过附加变量进行证伪的新模式，与通过附加数据进行统计的证伪模式形成鲜明对比。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多数据集信息合并的反事实推理方法，通过结构因果边缘问题确定与边际结构因果模型（SCMs）反事实一致的联合SCMs。
AI.motivation: 传统统计方法依赖额外数据提升模型可证伪性，而本文旨在通过引入额外变量构建新的可证伪性模式，增强因果关系验证的有效性。
AI.method: 采用响应函数公式形式化方法，整合不同变量集的边际SCMs，通过约束联合SCMs空间实现因果推断。
AI.result: 该方法显著缩小了允许的边际与联合SCMs范围，并证明了通过额外变量可实现不同于传统统计的可证伪性验证。
AI.conclusion: 本文为因果推断提供了新框架，强调变量选择对模型可证伪性的重要性，而不仅是数据量的增加。

search_text: Causal Inference Through the Structural Causal Marginal Problem 通过结构性因果边际问题进行因果推断 We introduce an approach to counterfactual inference based on merging information from multiple datasets. We consider a causal reformulation of the statistical marginal problem: given a collection of marginal structural causal models (SCMs) over distinct but overlapping sets of variables, determine the set of joint SCMs that are counterfactually consistent with the marginal ones. We formalise this approach for categorical SCMs using the response function formulation and show that it reduces the space of allowed marginal and joint SCMs. Our work thus highlights a new mode of falsifiability through additional variables, in contrast to the statistical one via additional data. 我们引入了一种基于合并多个数据集信息的反事实推理方法。我们考虑统计边际问题的因果重新表述：给定一组不同但重叠的变量集上的边际结构因果模型（SCM），确定与边际模型反事实一致的联合 SCM 集合。我们使用响应函数公式将这种方法形式化用于分类 SCM，并表明它减少了允许的边际和联合 SCM 的空间。因此，我们的工作强调了一种通过附加变量进行证伪的新模式，与通过附加数据进行统计的证伪模式形成鲜明对比。 本文提出一种基于多数据集信息合并的反事实推理方法，通过结构因果边缘问题确定与边际结构因果模型（SCMs）反事实一致的联合SCMs。 Luigi Gresele,Julius von Kügelgen,Jonas M. Kübler,Elke Kirschbaum,Bernhard Schölkopf,Dominik Janzing cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Vladislav Dorofeev,Petro Trokhimchuk
title: Computer sciences and synthesis: retrospective and perspective
title_zh: 计算机科学与综合：回顾与展望
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.09762
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.09762
abstract: The problem of synthesis in computer sciences, including cybernetics, artificial intelligence and system analysis, is analyzed. Main methods of realization this problem are discussed. Ways of search universal method of creation universal synthetic science are represented. As example of such universal method polymetric analysis is given. Perspective of further development of this research, including application polymetric method for the resolution main problems of computer sciences, is analyzed too.
summary: The problem of synthesis in computer sciences, including cybernetics, artificial intelligence and system analysis, is analyzed. Main methods of realization this problem are discussed. Ways of search universal method of creation universal synthetic science are represented. As example of such universal method polymetric analysis is given. Perspective of further development of this research, including application polymetric method for the resolution main problems of computer sciences, is analyzed too.
abstract_zh: 分析了计算机科学中的综合问题，包括控制论、人工智能和系统分析。讨论了实现该问题的主要方法。代表了探索创建通用综合科学的通用方法的方式。作为这种通用方法的例子，给出了聚合分析。还分析了本研究进一步发展的前景，包括应用聚合方法解决计算机科学的主要问题。

AI.tldr: 分析计算机科学中的合成问题，并探讨建立通用合成科学的方法，以多度分析为例进行说明。
AI.motivation: 推动计算机科学各领域（如人工智能、系统分析）的整合，寻找解决复杂问题的通用方法。
AI.method: 通过多度分析方法，探讨不同领域的合成问题，并分析其应用前景。
AI.result: 提出多度分析作为潜在的通用方法，并指出其在解决计算机科学核心问题中的应用前景。
AI.conclusion: 多度分析为构建通用合成科学提供了可行途径，未来需进一步验证其在实际问题中的有效性。

authors_text: Suraj Srinivas,Andrey Kuzmin,Markus Nagel,Mart van Baalen,Andrii Skliar,Tijmen Blankevoort
title: Cyclical Pruning for Sparse Neural Networks
title_zh: 稀疏神经网络的循环剪枝
abstract: Current methods for pruning neural network weights iteratively apply magnitude-based pruning on the model weights and re-train the resulting model to recover lost accuracy. In this work, we show that such strategies do not allow for the recovery of erroneously pruned weights. To enable weight recovery, we propose a simple strategy called \textit{cyclical pruning} which requires the pruning schedule to be periodic and allows for weights pruned erroneously in one cycle to recover in subsequent ones. Experimental results on both linear models and large-scale deep neural networks show that cyclical pruning outperforms existing pruning algorithms, especially at high sparsity ratios. Our approach is easy to tune and can be readily incorporated into existing pruning pipelines to boost performance.
summary: Current methods for pruning neural network weights iteratively apply magnitude-based pruning on the model weights and re-train the resulting model to recover lost accuracy. In this work, we show that such strategies do not allow for the recovery of erroneously pruned weights. To enable weight recovery, we propose a simple strategy called \textit{cyclical pruning} which requires the pruning schedule to be periodic and allows for weights pruned erroneously in one cycle to recover in subsequent ones. Experimental results on both linear models and large-scale deep neural networks show that cyclical pruning outperforms existing pruning algorithms, especially at high sparsity ratios. Our approach is easy to tune and can be readily incorporated into existing pruning pipelines to boost performance.
abstract_zh: 当前用于修剪神经网络权重的方法对模型权重迭代地应用基于幅度的修剪，并重新训练所得模型以恢复损失的准确性。在这项工作中，我们表明这种策略不允许恢复错误修剪的权重。为了实现权重恢复，我们提出了一种称为 \textit{周期性剪枝} 的简单策略，它要求剪枝时间表是周期性的，并允许在一个周期中错误剪枝的权重在后续周期中恢复。线性模型和大规模深度神经网络的实验结果表明，循环剪枝优于现有的剪枝算法，特别是在高稀疏率下。我们的方法易于调整，并且可以轻松合并到现有的修剪管道中以提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为循环剪枝的新方法，通过周期性调整剪枝计划使被错误剪枝的权重在后续周期中恢复，从而提升稀疏神经网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有迭代剪枝方法无法恢复被错误剪枝的权重，导致高稀疏度下模型性能下降，需设计支持权重恢复的剪枝策略。
AI.method: 设计周期性剪枝计划，允许在后续周期中恢复先前被错误剪枝的权重，无需额外训练步骤。
AI.result: 在多个线性模型和大规模深度网络实验中，循环剪枝在高稀疏度下优于现有算法，且调参简单可集成到现有流程。
AI.conclusion: 循环剪枝有效解决了传统方法的权重恢复缺陷，在保持稀疏性的同时提升模型性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Aparna Khare,Eunjung Han,Yuguang Yang,Andreas Stolcke
title: ASR-Aware End-to-end Neural Diarization
title_zh: ASR 感知的端到端神经二值化
comment: To appear in ICASSP 2022
comments: To appear in ICASSP 2022
abstract: We present a Conformer-based end-to-end neural diarization (EEND) model that uses both acoustic input and features derived from an automatic speech recognition (ASR) model. Two categories of features are explored: features derived directly from ASR output (phones, position-in-word and word boundaries) and features derived from a lexical speaker change detection model, trained by fine-tuning a pretrained BERT model on the ASR output. Three modifications to the Conformer-based EEND architecture are proposed to incorporate the features. First, ASR features are concatenated with acoustic features. Second, we propose a new attention mechanism called contextualized self-attention that utilizes ASR features to build robust speaker representations. Finally, multi-task learning is used to train the model to minimize classification loss for the ASR features along with diarization loss. Experiments on the two-speaker English conversations of Switchboard+SRE data sets show that multi-task learning with position-in-word information is the most effective way of utilizing ASR features, reducing the diarization error rate (DER) by 20% relative to the baseline.
summary: We present a Conformer-based end-to-end neural diarization (EEND) model that uses both acoustic input and features derived from an automatic speech recognition (ASR) model. Two categories of features are explored: features derived directly from ASR output (phones, position-in-word and word boundaries) and features derived from a lexical speaker change detection model, trained by fine-tuning a pretrained BERT model on the ASR output. Three modifications to the Conformer-based EEND architecture are proposed to incorporate the features. First, ASR features are concatenated with acoustic features. Second, we propose a new attention mechanism called contextualized self-attention that utilizes ASR features to build robust speaker representations. Finally, multi-task learning is used to train the model to minimize classification loss for the ASR features along with diarization loss. Experiments on the two-speaker English conversations of Switchboard+SRE data sets show that multi-task learning with position-in-word information is the most effective way of utilizing ASR features, reducing the diarization error rate (DER) by 20% relative to the baseline.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于 Conformer 的端到端神经二值化 (EEND) 模型，该模型使用声学输入和从自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型派生的特征。探讨了两类特征：直接从 ASR 输出（音素、词内位置和词边界）导出的特征，以及从词汇说话者变化检测模型导出的特征，通过在 ASR 输出上微调预训练的 BERT 模型来进行训练。建议对基于 Conformer 的 EEND 架构进行三种修改以合并这些功能。首先，ASR 特征与声学特征相连接。其次，我们提出了一种称为上下文自注意力的新注意力机制，它利用 ASR 特征来构建强大的说话者表示。最后，使用多任务学习来训练模型，以最大限度地减少 ASR 特征的分类损失和二值化损失。 Switchboard+SRE 数据集的双语者英语对话实验表明，利用词内位置信息进行多任务学习是利用 ASR 特征的最有效方式，相对于基线，二值化错误率 (DER) 降低了 20%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自动语音识别（ASR）特征的端到端神经说话人分割模型，通过改进Conformer架构提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人分割模型仅依赖声学特征，难以捕捉语义信息。结合ASR特征可提供词边界、音素等语义线索，有助于提升分割准确性。
AI.method: 基于Conformer架构，提出三类改进：1）拼接ASR特征与声学特征；2）设计利用ASR特征的上下文自注意力机制；3）通过多任务学习联合优化ASR分类损失与分割损失。
AI.result: 在Switchboard+SRE双人对话数据集上，采用词内位置信息的多任务学习方案使分割错误率（DER）相较基线下降20%。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习框架有效整合ASR特征，其中词内位置信息对提升分割性能贡献最大，验证了语义特征在说话人分割任务中的价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自动语音识别（ASR）特征的端到端神经说话人分割模型，通过改进Conformer架构提升分割效果。
ai_content.motivation: 传统说话人分割模型仅依赖声学特征，难以捕捉语义信息。结合ASR特征可提供词边界、音素等语义线索，有助于提升分割准确性。

ai_content.result: 在Switchboard+SRE双人对话数据集上，采用词内位置信息的多任务学习方案使分割错误率（DER）相较基线下降20%。

search_text: ASR-Aware End-to-end Neural Diarization ASR 感知的端到端神经二值化 We present a Conformer-based end-to-end neural diarization (EEND) model that uses both acoustic input and features derived from an automatic speech recognition (ASR) model. Two categories of features are explored: features derived directly from ASR output (phones, position-in-word and word boundaries) and features derived from a lexical speaker change detection model, trained by fine-tuning a pretrained BERT model on the ASR output. Three modifications to the Conformer-based EEND architecture are proposed to incorporate the features. First, ASR features are concatenated with acoustic features. Second, we propose a new attention mechanism called contextualized self-attention that utilizes ASR features to build robust speaker representations. Finally, multi-task learning is used to train the model to minimize classification loss for the ASR features along with diarization loss. Experiments on the two-speaker English conversations of Switchboard+SRE data sets show that multi-task learning with position-in-word information is the most effective way of utilizing ASR features, reducing the diarization error rate (DER) by 20% relative to the baseline. 我们提出了一种基于 Conformer 的端到端神经二值化 (EEND) 模型，该模型使用声学输入和从自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型派生的特征。探讨了两类特征：直接从 ASR 输出（音素、词内位置和词边界）导出的特征，以及从词汇说话者变化检测模型导出的特征，通过在 ASR 输出上微调预训练的 BERT 模型来进行训练。建议对基于 Conformer 的 EEND 架构进行三种修改以合并这些功能。首先，ASR 特征与声学特征相连接。其次，我们提出了一种称为上下文自注意力的新注意力机制，它利用 ASR 特征来构建强大的说话者表示。最后，使用多任务学习来训练模型，以最大限度地减少 ASR 特征的分类损失和二值化损失。 Switchboard+SRE 数据集的双语者英语对话实验表明，利用词内位置信息进行多任务学习是利用 ASR 特征的最有效方式，相对于基线，二值化错误率 (DER) 降低了 20%。 本文提出一种结合自动语音识别（ASR）特征的端到端神经说话人分割模型，通过改进Conformer架构提升分割效果。 Aparna Khare,Eunjung Han,Yuguang Yang,Andreas Stolcke cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: David Johnson,Mohammad Alsharid,Rasheed El-Bouri,Nigel Mehdi,Farah Shamout,Alexandre Szenicer,David Toman,Saqr Binghalib
title: An Experience Report of Executive-Level Artificial Intelligence Education in the United Arab Emirates
title_zh: 阿联酋高管级人工智能教育经验报告
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables, accepted to EAAI-22: The 12th Symposium on Educational Advances in Artificial Intelligence
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables, accepted to EAAI-22: The 12th Symposium on Educational Advances in Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Teaching artificial intelligence (AI) is challenging. It is a fast moving field and therefore difficult to keep people updated with the state-of-the-art. Educational offerings for students are ever increasing, beyond university degree programs where AI education traditionally lay. In this paper, we present an experience report of teaching an AI course to business executives in the United Arab Emirates (UAE). Rather than focusing only on theoretical and technical aspects, we developed a course that teaches AI with a view to enabling students to understand how to incorporate it into existing business processes. We present an overview of our course, curriculum and teaching methods, and we discuss our reflections on teaching adult learners, and to students in the UAE.
summary: Teaching artificial intelligence (AI) is challenging. It is a fast moving field and therefore difficult to keep people updated with the state-of-the-art. Educational offerings for students are ever increasing, beyond university degree programs where AI education traditionally lay. In this paper, we present an experience report of teaching an AI course to business executives in the United Arab Emirates (UAE). Rather than focusing only on theoretical and technical aspects, we developed a course that teaches AI with a view to enabling students to understand how to incorporate it into existing business processes. We present an overview of our course, curriculum and teaching methods, and we discuss our reflections on teaching adult learners, and to students in the UAE.
abstract_zh: 教授人工智能 (AI) 具有挑战性。这是一个快速发展的领域，因此很难让人们了解最先进的技术。为学生提供的教育服务不断增加，超出了传统上人工智能教育的大学学位课程的范围。在本文中，我们提出了一份向阿拉伯联合酋长国（UAE）的企业高管教授人工智能课程的经验报告。我们不只关注理论和技术方面，而是开发了一门教授人工智能的课程，旨在让学生了解如何将其纳入现有业务流程。我们概述了我们的课程、课程和教学方法，并讨论了我们对成人学习者和阿联酋学生的教学反思。

AI.tldr: 本文报告了在阿联酋为商业高管设计并实施人工智能课程的经验，重点在于如何将AI整合到现有业务流程中，而非仅侧重理论和技术。
AI.motivation: 由于AI领域发展迅速，传统教育难以及时更新，且高管需要将AI应用于实际业务，而非仅学习理论，因此需要开发针对性的课程。
AI.method: 设计了一门针对高管的AI课程，结合实际案例和教学方法，重点教授AI在业务流程中的应用，并反思成人教育的教学策略。
AI.result: 课程帮助高管理解AI的实际应用，提升了其将AI整合到业务流程的能力，并获得了对成人学习者的教学经验。
AI.conclusion: 针对高管的AI教育应侧重实际应用，而非理论，这种课程设计有效提升了学员的业务整合能力，为类似教育项目提供了参考。

authors_text: Julian Yarkony,Amelia Regan
title: Principled Graph Management
title_zh: 原则性图管理
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.01070
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.01070
abstract: Graph Generation is a recently introduced enhanced Column Generation algorithm for solving expanded Linear Programming relaxations of mixed integer linear programs without weakening the expanded relaxations which characterize these methods. To apply Graph Generation we must be able to map any given column generated during pricing to a small directed acyclic graph for which any path from source to sink describes a feasible column. This structure is easily satisfied for vehicle routing, crew scheduling and various logistics problems where pricing is a constrained shortest path problem. The construction of such graphs trades off the size/diversity of a subset of columns modeled by the graphs versus the additional computational time required to solve the problems induced by larger graphs. Graph Generation (GG) has two computational bottlenecks. The first is pricing. Pricing in GG and Column Generation (CG) is identical because of the structure of the problems solved. The second bottleneck is the restricted master problem (RMP), which is more computationally intensive in GG than in CG given the same number of columns generated. By design GG converges in fewer iterations than CG, and hence requires fewer calls to pricing. Therefore, when the computation time of GG is dominated by pricing, as opposed to solving the RMP, GG converges much faster than CG in terms of time. However GG need not converge faster than CG when the GG RMP, rather than pricing, dominates computation. In this paper we introduce Principled Graph Management (PGM), which is an algorithm to solve the GG RMP rapidly by exploiting its special structure. We demonstrate the effectiveness of PGM inside a GG solution to the classical Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem. We demonstrate that PGM solves the GG RMP hundreds of times faster than the baseline solver and that the improvement in speed increases with problem size.

The construction of such graphs trades off the size/diversity of a subset of columns modeled by the graphs versus the additional computational time required to solve the problems induced by larger graphs. By design GG converges in fewer iterations than CG, and hence requires fewer calls to pricing. Therefore, when the computation time of GG is dominated by pricing, as opposed to solving the RMP, GG converges much faster than CG in terms of time. However GG need not converge faster than CG when the GG RMP, rather than pricing, dominates computation. abstract_zh: 图生成是最近引入的增强列生成算法，用于求解混合整数线性规划的扩展线性规划松弛，而不削弱表征这些方法的扩展松弛。要应用图生成，我们必须能够将定价期间生成的任何给定列映射到小型有向无环图，其中从源到接收器的任何路径都描述了可行的列。这种结构很容易满足车辆路线、人员调度和定价是约束最短路径问题的各种物流问题。此类图的构建需要权衡由图建模的列子集的大小/多样性与解决较大图引起的问题所需的额外计算时间。图生成（GG）有两个计算瓶颈。首先是定价。由于所解决问题的结构不同，GG 和列生成 (CG) 的定价是相同的。第二个瓶颈是受限主问题（RMP），在生成相同数量的列的情况下，GG 中的计算量比 CG 中的计算量更大。根据设计，GG 比 CG 收敛的迭代次数更少，因此需要更少的定价调用。因此，当GG的计算时间以定价为主时，与求解RMP相反，GG在时间上比CG收敛得快得多。然而，当 GG RMP（而不是定价）主导计算时，GG 不需要比 CG 收敛得更快。本文介绍原理图管理（PGM），它是一种利用其特殊结构快速求解GG RMP的算法。我们展示了 PGM 在经典容量车辆路径问题的 GG 解决方案中的有效性。我们证明，PGM 求解 GG RMP 的速度比基线求解器快数百倍，并且速度的提高随着问题规模的增大而增加。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为原理化图管理（PGM）的算法，用于快速解决图生成（GG）中的受限主问题（RMP），以提高求解混合整数线性规划问题的效率。
AI.motivation: 图生成（GG）在解决混合整数线性规划问题时，受限主问题（RMP）的计算开销较大，成为其计算瓶颈，限制了算法效率的进一步提升。
AI.method: 通过利用GG中RMP的特殊结构，设计PGM算法以高效求解RMP，从而减少计算时间。
AI.result: 实验表明，PGM在经典容量车辆路径问题中将GG的RMP求解速度提升了数百倍，且随着问题规模增大，速度优势更加显著。
AI.conclusion: PGM有效解决了GG中的RMP瓶颈，显著提升了大规模问题的求解效率，为相关优化问题提供了更高效的解决方案。

We demonstrate that PGM solves the GG RMP hundreds of times faster than the baseline solver and that the improvement in speed increases with problem size. 图生成是最近引入的增强列生成算法，用于求解混合整数线性规划的扩展线性规划松弛，而不削弱表征这些方法的扩展松弛。要应用图生成，我们必须能够将定价期间生成的任何给定列映射到小型有向无环图，其中从源到接收器的任何路径都描述了可行的列。这种结构很容易满足车辆路线、人员调度和定价是约束最短路径问题的各种物流问题。此类图的构建需要权衡由图建模的列子集的大小/多样性与解决较大图引起的问题所需的额外计算时间。图生成（GG）有两个计算瓶颈。首先是定价。由于所解决问题的结构不同，GG 和列生成 (CG) 的定价是相同的。第二个瓶颈是受限主问题（RMP），在生成相同数量的列的情况下，GG 中的计算量比 CG 中的计算量更大。根据设计，GG 比 CG 收敛的迭代次数更少，因此需要更少的定价调用。因此，当GG的计算时间以定价为主时，与求解RMP相反，GG在时间上比CG收敛得快得多。然而，当 GG RMP（而不是定价）主导计算时，GG 不需要比 CG 收敛得更快。本文介绍原理图管理（PGM），它是一种利用其特殊结构快速求解GG RMP的算法。我们展示了 PGM 在经典容量车辆路径问题的 GG 解决方案中的有效性。我们证明，PGM 求解 GG RMP 的速度比基线求解器快数百倍，并且速度的提高随着问题规模的增大而增加。 本文提出了一种称为原理化图管理（PGM）的算法，用于快速解决图生成（GG）中的受限主问题（RMP），以提高求解混合整数线性规划问题的效率。 Julian Yarkony,Amelia Regan math.OC,cs.DS

authors_text: Zhaowei Zhu,Jialu Wang,Yang Liu
title: Beyond Images: Label Noise Transition Matrix Estimation for Tasks with Lower-Quality Features
title_zh: 超越图像：具有较低质量特征的任务的标签噪声转移矩阵估计
comment: ICML 2022
comments: ICML 2022
abstract: The label noise transition matrix, denoting the transition probabilities from clean labels to noisy labels, is crucial for designing statistically robust solutions. Existing estimators for noise transition matrices, e.g., using either anchor points or clusterability, focus on computer vision tasks that are relatively easier to obtain high-quality representations. We observe that tasks with lower-quality features fail to meet the anchor-point or clusterability condition, due to the coexistence of both uninformative and informative representations. To handle this issue, we propose a generic and practical information-theoretic approach to down-weight the less informative parts of the lower-quality features. This improvement is crucial to identifying and estimating the label noise transition matrix. The salient technical challenge is to compute the relevant information-theoretical metrics using only noisy labels instead of clean ones. We prove that the celebrated $f$-mutual information measure can often preserve the order when calculated using noisy labels. We then build our transition matrix estimator using this distilled version of features. The necessity and effectiveness of the proposed method are also demonstrated by evaluating the estimation error on a varied set of tabular data and text classification tasks with lower-quality features. Code is available at github.com/UCSC-REAL/BeyondImages.
summary: The label noise transition matrix, denoting the transition probabilities from clean labels to noisy labels, is crucial for designing statistically robust solutions. Existing estimators for noise transition matrices, e.g., using either anchor points or clusterability, focus on computer vision tasks that are relatively easier to obtain high-quality representations. We observe that tasks with lower-quality features fail to meet the anchor-point or clusterability condition, due to the coexistence of both uninformative and informative representations. To handle this issue, we propose a generic and practical information-theoretic approach to down-weight the less informative parts of the lower-quality features. This improvement is crucial to identifying and estimating the label noise transition matrix. The salient technical challenge is to compute the relevant information-theoretical metrics using only noisy labels instead of clean ones. We prove that the celebrated $f$-mutual information measure can often preserve the order when calculated using noisy labels. We then build our transition matrix estimator using this distilled version of features. The necessity and effectiveness of the proposed method are also demonstrated by evaluating the estimation error on a varied set of tabular data and text classification tasks with lower-quality features. Code is available at github.com/UCSC-REAL/BeyondImages.
abstract_zh: 标签噪声转换矩阵表示从干净标签到噪声标签的转换概率，对于设计统计稳健的解决方案至关重要。现有的噪声转移矩阵估计器（例如，使用锚点或可聚类性）专注于相对更容易获得高质量表示的计算机视觉任务。我们观察到，由于无信息和信息表示的共存，具有较低质量特征的任务无法满足锚点或可聚类性条件。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种通用且实用的信息论方法来减轻低质量特征中信息量较少的部分的权重。这种改进对于识别和估计标签噪声转移矩阵至关重要。突出的技术挑战是仅使用嘈杂的标签而不是干净的标签来计算相关的信息理论指标。我们证明，著名的 $f$-互信息度量在使用噪声标签计算时通常可以保留顺序。然后，我们使用这个特征的精炼版本构建我们的转换矩阵估计器。通过评估各种表格数据和具有较低质量特征的文本分类任务的估计误差，也证明了该方法的必要性和有效性。代码可在 github.com/UCSC-REAL/BeyondImages 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息论的方法，用于估计标签噪声转移矩阵，特别针对具有低质量特征的任务。
AI.motivation: 现有标签噪声转移矩阵估计方法依赖高质量特征，但低质量特征任务中存在非信息与信息表示共存的问题，导致传统方法失效。
AI.method: 通过信息论框架降权低质量特征中的非信息部分，利用噪声标签计算的f-互信息保持顺序性，构建转移矩阵估计器。
AI.result: 在多个表格数据和文本分类任务中验证了方法的有效性，证明其能有效降低估计误差。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低质量特征场景下的标签噪声建模提供了新思路，具有广泛的应用价值。

authors_text: Aaron Allred,Lauren J. Abbott,Alireza Doostan,Kurt Maute
title: Automated processing of X-ray computed tomography images via panoptic segmentation for modeling woven composite textiles
title_zh: 通过全景分割自动处理 X 射线计算机断层扫描图像，用于对机织复合纺织品进行建模
abstract: A new, machine learning-based approach for automatically generating 3D digital geometries of woven composite textiles is proposed to overcome the limitations of existing analytical descriptions and segmentation methods. In this approach, panoptic segmentation is leveraged to produce instance segmented semantic masks from X-ray computed tomography (CT) images. This effort represents the first deep learning based automated process for segmenting unique yarn instances in a woven composite textile. Furthermore, it improves on existing methods by providing instance-level segmentation on low contrast CT datasets. Frame-to-frame instance tracking is accomplished via an intersection-over-union (IoU) approach adopted from video panoptic segmentation for assembling a 3D geometric model. A corrective recognition algorithm is developed to improve the recognition quality (RQ). The panoptic quality (PQ) metric is adopted to provide a new universal evaluation metric for reconstructed woven composite textiles. It is found that the panoptic segmentation network generalizes well to new CT images that are similar to the training set but does not extrapolate well to CT images of differing geometry, texture, and contrast. The utility of this approach is demonstrated by capturing yarn flow directions, contact regions between individual yarns, and the spatially varying cross-sectional areas of the yarns.
summary: A new, machine learning-based approach for automatically generating 3D digital geometries of woven composite textiles is proposed to overcome the limitations of existing analytical descriptions and segmentation methods. In this approach, panoptic segmentation is leveraged to produce instance segmented semantic masks from X-ray computed tomography (CT) images. This effort represents the first deep learning based automated process for segmenting unique yarn instances in a woven composite textile. Furthermore, it improves on existing methods by providing instance-level segmentation on low contrast CT datasets. Frame-to-frame instance tracking is accomplished via an intersection-over-union (IoU) approach adopted from video panoptic segmentation for assembling a 3D geometric model. A corrective recognition algorithm is developed to improve the recognition quality (RQ). The panoptic quality (PQ) metric is adopted to provide a new universal evaluation metric for reconstructed woven composite textiles. It is found that the panoptic segmentation network generalizes well to new CT images that are similar to the training set but does not extrapolate well to CT images of differing geometry, texture, and contrast. The utility of this approach is demonstrated by capturing yarn flow directions, contact regions between individual yarns, and the spatially varying cross-sectional areas of the yarns.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种基于机器学习的新方法，用于自动生成机织复合纺织品的 3D 数字几何形状，以克服现有分析描述和分割方法的局限性。在这种方法中，利用全景分割从 X 射线计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像生成实例分割的语义掩模。这项工作代表了第一个基于深度学习的自动化过程，用于分割机织复合纺织品中的独特纱线实例。此外，它还通过在低对比度 CT 数据集上提供实例级分割来改进现有方法。帧到帧的实例跟踪是通过从视频全景分割中采用的交叉联合 (IoU) 方法来完成的，用于组装 3D 几何模型。开发了一种校正识别算法来提高识别质量（RQ）。采用全景质量（PQ）指标为重构机织复合纺织品提供新的通用评估指标。研究发现，全景分割网络可以很好地推广到与训练集相似的新 CT 图像，但不能很好地外推到不同几何、纹理和对比度的 CT 图像。通过捕获纱线流动方向、单根纱线之间的接触区域以及纱线的空间变化横截面积来证明该方法的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自动处理X射线CT图像方法，用于建模编织复合纺织品的3D数字几何结构。
AI.motivation: 现有分析方法和分割技术难以准确描述编织复合材料的复杂结构，尤其在低对比度CT数据中无法实现实例级分割。
AI.method: 采用全景分割技术生成CT图像的实例分割语义掩膜，结合帧间IoU追踪算法构建3D几何模型，并开发校正算法提升识别质量。
AI.result: 模型在相似训练集CT图像上表现良好，但对几何、纹理和对比度差异较大的图像泛化能力不足，成功捕捉了纱线流动方向和接触区域等关键特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为编织复合材料建模提供了新思路，但需进一步优化以应对CT图像的多样性，提出的PQ指标为评估重建质量提供了统一标准。

authors_text: Bryan Lim,Maxime Allard,Luca Grillotti,Antoine Cully
title: Accelerated Quality-Diversity through Massive Parallelism
title_zh: 通过大规模并行加速质量多样性
abstract: Quality-Diversity (QD) optimization algorithms are a well-known approach to generate large collections of diverse and high-quality solutions. However, derived from evolutionary computation, QD algorithms are population-based methods which are known to be data-inefficient and requires large amounts of computational resources. This makes QD algorithms slow when used in applications where solution evaluations are computationally costly. A common approach to speed up QD algorithms is to evaluate solutions in parallel, for instance by using physical simulators in robotics. Yet, this approach is limited to several dozen of parallel evaluations as most physics simulators can only be parallelized more with a greater number of CPUs. With recent advances in simulators that run on accelerators, thousands of evaluations can now be performed in parallel on single GPU/TPU. In this paper, we present QDax, an accelerated implementation of MAP-Elites which leverages massive parallelism on accelerators to make QD algorithms more accessible. We show that QD algorithms are ideal candidates to take advantage of progress in hardware acceleration. We demonstrate that QD algorithms can scale with massive parallelism to be run at interactive timescales without any significant effect on the performance. Results across standard optimization functions and four neuroevolution benchmark environments shows that experiment runtimes are reduced by two factors of magnitudes, turning days of computation into minutes. More surprising, we observe that reducing the number of generations by two orders of magnitude, and thus having significantly shorter lineage does not impact the performance of QD algorithms. These results show that QD can now benefit from hardware acceleration, which contributed significantly to the bloom of deep learning.
summary: Quality-Diversity (QD) optimization algorithms are a well-known approach to generate large collections of diverse and high-quality solutions. However, derived from evolutionary computation, QD algorithms are population-based methods which are known to be data-inefficient and requires large amounts of computational resources. This makes QD algorithms slow when used in applications where solution evaluations are computationally costly. A common approach to speed up QD algorithms is to evaluate solutions in parallel, for instance by using physical simulators in robotics. Yet, this approach is limited to several dozen of parallel evaluations as most physics simulators can only be parallelized more with a greater number of CPUs. With recent advances in simulators that run on accelerators, thousands of evaluations can now be performed in parallel on single GPU/TPU. In this paper, we present QDax, an accelerated implementation of MAP-Elites which leverages massive parallelism on accelerators to make QD algorithms more accessible. We show that QD algorithms are ideal candidates to take advantage of progress in hardware acceleration. We demonstrate that QD algorithms can scale with massive parallelism to be run at interactive timescales without any significant effect on the performance. Results across standard optimization functions and four neuroevolution benchmark environments shows that experiment runtimes are reduced by two factors of magnitudes, turning days of computation into minutes. More surprising, we observe that reducing the number of generations by two orders of magnitude, and thus having significantly shorter lineage does not impact the performance of QD algorithms. These results show that QD can now benefit from hardware acceleration, which contributed significantly to the bloom of deep learning.
abstract_zh: 质量多样性 (QD) 优化算法是一种众所周知的方法，可生成大量多样化的高质量解决方案。然而，源自进化计算的 QD 算法是基于群体的方法，众所周知，这种方法数据效率低下，并且需要大量的计算资源。这使得 QD 算法在解决方案评估计算成本较高的应用中使用时会变慢。加速 QD 算法的常见方法是并行评估解决方案，例如通过在机器人技术中使用物理模拟器。然而，这种方法仅限于数十次并行评估，因为大多数物理模拟器只能通过更多数量的 CPU 进行更多并行化。随着在加速器上运行的模拟器的最新进展，现在可以在单个 GPU/TPU 上并行执行数千个评估。在本文中，我们介绍了 QDax，它是 MAP-Elites 的加速实现，它利用加速器上的大规模并行性来使 QD 算法更易于访问。我们证明 QD 算法是利用硬件加速进步的理想候选算法。我们证明了 QD 算法可以通过大规模并行性进行扩展，以便在交互式时间尺度上运行，而不会对性能产生任何重大影响。标准优化函数和四个神经进化基准环境的结果表明，实验运行时间减少了两个数量级，将数天的计算时间缩短为几分钟。更令人惊讶的是，我们观察到将代数减少两个数量级，从而显着缩短谱系并不会影响 QD 算法的性能。这些结果表明，QD 现在可以受益于硬件加速，这对深度学习的蓬勃发展做出了重大贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QDax，通过在加速器（如GPU/TPU）上实现大规模并行计算，加速质量多样性（QD）优化算法。
AI.motivation: 传统QD算法计算资源消耗大，难以应对高成本的解决方案评估，而现有并行方法受限于CPU数量，无法充分挖掘硬件加速潜力。
AI.method: 开发QDax框架，利用GPU/TPU的并行计算能力，对MAP-Elites算法进行加速改造，实现数千次并行评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，计算时间缩短两个数量级（天级到分钟级），且减少99%代数后性能无显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 硬件加速使QD算法具备实时性，为其在复杂场景的应用提供了可行性，类似深度学习的硬件红利效应。

authors_text: Jianye Hao,Jiawen Lu,Xijun Li,Xialiang Tong,Xiang Xiang,Mingxuan Yuan,Hankz Hankui Zhuo
title: Introduction to The Dynamic Pickup and Delivery Problem Benchmark -- ICAPS 2021 Competition
title_zh: 动态取货和配送问题基准介绍——ICAPS 2021竞赛
abstract: The Dynamic Pickup and Delivery Problem (DPDP) is an essential problem within the logistics domain. So far, research on this problem has mainly focused on using artificial data which fails to reflect the complexity of real-world problems. In this draft, we would like to introduce a new benchmark from real business scenarios as well as a simulator supporting the dynamic evaluation. The benchmark and simulator have been published and successfully supported the ICAPS 2021 Dynamic Pickup and Delivery Problem competition participated by 152 teams.
summary: The Dynamic Pickup and Delivery Problem (DPDP) is an essential problem within the logistics domain. So far, research on this problem has mainly focused on using artificial data which fails to reflect the complexity of real-world problems. In this draft, we would like to introduce a new benchmark from real business scenarios as well as a simulator supporting the dynamic evaluation. The benchmark and simulator have been published and successfully supported the ICAPS 2021 Dynamic Pickup and Delivery Problem competition participated by 152 teams.
abstract_zh: 动态取货和配送问题（DPDP）是物流领域的一个重要问题。迄今为止，对该问题的研究主要集中在使用人工数据，无法反映现实问题的复杂性。在本草案中，我们希望引入来自真实业务场景的新基准以及支持动态评估的模拟器。该基准测试和模拟器已发布，并成功支持了 152 个团队参加的 ICAPS 2021 动态取货和送货问题竞赛。

AI.tldr: 介绍动态取送货问题（DPDP）的新基准及模拟器，用于更真实地评估解决方案
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖人工数据，无法反映现实复杂性，需真实基准和模拟器提升评估效果
AI.method: 基于真实业务场景构建基准，并开发支持动态评估的模拟器
AI.result: 基准与模拟器已发布，成功应用于ICAPS 2021竞赛，吸引152支队伍参与
AI.conclusion: 该基准与模拟器为DPDP研究提供真实测试平台，推动算法优化与实际应用

authors_text: Meike Neuwohner
title: Passing the Limits of Pure Local Search for Weighted $k$-Set Packing
title_zh: 超越加权 $k$-Set 打包的纯本地搜索的限制
comment: 56 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.03555, arXiv:2106.03545
comments: 56 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.03555, arXiv:2106.03545
abstract: We study the weighted $k$-Set Packing problem: Given a collection $S$ of sets, each of cardinality at most $k$, together with a positive weight function $w:\mathcal{S}\rightarrow\mathbb{Q}_{>0}$, the task is to compute a disjoint sub-collection $A\subseteq \mathcal{S}$ of maximum total weight. For $k\leq 2$, the weighted $k$-Set Packing problem can be solved in polynomial time, but for $k\geq 3$, it becomes $NP$-hard. Recently, Neuwohner has shown how to obtain approximation guarantees of $\frac{k+ε_k}{2}$ with $\lim_{k\rightarrow\infty}ε_k=0$. She further showed her result to be asymptotically best possible in that no algorithm considering local improvements of logarithmically bounded size with respect to some fixed power of the weight function can yield an approximation guarantee better than $\frac{k}{2}$. In this paper, we finally show how to beat the threshold of $\frac{k}{2}$ for the weighted $k$-Set Packing problem by $Ω(k)$. We achieve this by combining local search with the application of a black box algorithm for the unweighted $k$-Set Packing problem to carefully chosen sub-instances. In doing so, we manage to link the approximation ratio for general weights to the one achievable in the unweighted case and we obtain guarantees of at most $\frac{k+1}{2}-2\cdot 10^{-4}$ for all $k\geq 4$.
summary: We study the weighted $k$-Set Packing problem: Given a collection $S$ of sets, each of cardinality at most $k$, together with a positive weight function $w:\mathcal{S}\rightarrow\mathbb{Q}_{>0}$, the task is to compute a disjoint sub-collection $A\subseteq \mathcal{S}$ of maximum total weight. For $k\leq 2$, the weighted $k$-Set Packing problem can be solved in polynomial time, but for $k\geq 3$, it becomes $NP$-hard. Recently, Neuwohner has shown how to obtain approximation guarantees of $\frac{k+ε_k}{2}$ with $\lim_{k\rightarrow\infty}ε_k=0$. She further showed her result to be asymptotically best possible in that no algorithm considering local improvements of logarithmically bounded size with respect to some fixed power of the weight function can yield an approximation guarantee better than $\frac{k}{2}$. In this paper, we finally show how to beat the threshold of $\frac{k}{2}$ for the weighted $k$-Set Packing problem by $Ω(k)$. We achieve this by combining local search with the application of a black box algorithm for the unweighted $k$-Set Packing problem to carefully chosen sub-instances. In doing so, we manage to link the approximation ratio for general weights to the one achievable in the unweighted case and we obtain guarantees of at most $\frac{k+1}{2}-2\cdot 10^{-4}$ for all $k\geq 4$.
abstract_zh: 我们研究加权$k$-集合打包问题：给定集合$S$，每个集合的基数至多为$k$，以及正权重函数$w:\mathcal{S}\rightarrow\mathbb{Q}_{>0}$，任务是计算最大总权重的不相交子集合$A\subseteq \mathcal{S}$。对于$k\leq 2$，加权$k$-Set Packing问题可以在多项式时间内解决，但对于$k\geq 3$，它变得$NP$-hard。最近，Neuwohner 展示了如何使用 $\lim_{k\rightarrow\infty}ε_k=0$ 获得 $\frac{k+ε_k}{2}$ 的近似保证。她进一步表明，她的结果是渐近最好的，因为考虑到权重函数的某些固定幂的对数有界大小的局部改进，没有算法可以产生比 $\frac{k}{2}$ 更好的近似保证。在本文中，我们最终展示了如何通过 $Ω(k)$ 来克服加权 $k$-Set Packing 问题的 $\frac{k}{2}$ 阈值。我们通过将本地搜索与针对仔细选择的子实例的未加权 $k$-Set Packing 问题的黑盒算法的应用相结合来实现这一目标。这样做，我们设法将一般权重的近似比率与未加权情况下可实现的近似比率联系起来，并且对于所有 $k\geq 4$，我们获得最多 $\frac{k+1}{2}-2\cdot 10^{-4}$ 的保证。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在突破纯局部搜索在带权k-集合包装问题中的k/2近似比限制，提出更优的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有算法能实现(k+ε_k)/2的近似比，但无法超越k/2的阈值，因此需要新的方法突破这一限制。
AI.method: 结合局部搜索与针对无权重子问题的黑箱算法，将一般权重的近似比与无权重情况下的结果关联起来。
AI.result: 成功突破k/2阈值，达到(k+1)/2 - 2×10^-4的近似比，适用于k≥4的所有情况。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效突破了纯局部搜索的限制，证明了其局限性，并为更优算法设计提供了新思路。

motivation: 尽管已有算法能实现(k+ε_k)/2的近似比，但无法超越k/2的阈值，因此需要新的方法突破这一限制。
method: 结合局部搜索与针对无权重子问题的黑箱算法，将一般权重的近似比与无权重情况下的结果关联起来。
result: 成功突破k/2阈值，达到(k+1)/2 - 2×10^-4的近似比，适用于k≥4的所有情况。
conclusion: 该方法有效突破了纯局部搜索的限制，证明了其局限性，并为更优算法设计提供了新思路。
search_text: Passing the Limits of Pure Local Search for Weighted $k$-Set Packing 超越加权 $k$-Set 打包的纯本地搜索的限制 We study the weighted $k$-Set Packing problem: Given a collection $S$ of sets, each of cardinality at most $k$, together with a positive weight function $w:\mathcal{S}\rightarrow\mathbb{Q}_{>0}$, the task is to compute a disjoint sub-collection $A\subseteq \mathcal{S}$ of maximum total weight. For $k\leq 2$, the weighted $k$-Set Packing problem can be solved in polynomial time, but for $k\geq 3$, it becomes $NP$-hard. Recently, Neuwohner has shown how to obtain approximation guarantees of $\frac{k+ε_k}{2}$ with $\lim_{k\rightarrow\infty}ε_k=0$. She further showed her result to be asymptotically best possible in that no algorithm considering local improvements of logarithmically bounded size with respect to some fixed power of the weight function can yield an approximation guarantee better than $\frac{k}{2}$. In this paper, we finally show how to beat the threshold of $\frac{k}{2}$ for the weighted $k$-Set Packing problem by $Ω(k)$. We achieve this by combining local search with the application of a black box algorithm for the unweighted $k$-Set Packing problem to carefully chosen sub-instances. In doing so, we manage to link the approximation ratio for general weights to the one achievable in the unweighted case and we obtain guarantees of at most $\frac{k+1}{2}-2\cdot 10^{-4}$ for all $k\geq 4$. 我们研究加权$k$-集合打包问题：给定集合$S$，每个集合的基数至多为$k$，以及正权重函数$w:\mathcal{S}\rightarrow\mathbb{Q}_{>0}$，任务是计算最大总权重的不相交子集合$A\subseteq \mathcal{S}$。对于$k\leq 2$，加权$k$-Set Packing问题可以在多项式时间内解决，但对于$k\geq 3$，它变得$NP$-hard。最近，Neuwohner 展示了如何使用 $\lim_{k\rightarrow\infty}ε_k=0$ 获得 $\frac{k+ε_k}{2}$ 的近似保证。她进一步表明，她的结果是渐近最好的，因为考虑到权重函数的某些固定幂的对数有界大小的局部改进，没有算法可以产生比 $\frac{k}{2}$ 更好的近似保证。在本文中，我们最终展示了如何通过 $Ω(k)$ 来克服加权 $k$-Set Packing 问题的 $\frac{k}{2}$ 阈值。我们通过将本地搜索与针对仔细选择的子实例的未加权 $k$-Set Packing 问题的黑盒算法的应用相结合来实现这一目标。这样做，我们设法将一般权重的近似比率与未加权情况下可实现的近似比率联系起来，并且对于所有 $k\geq 4$，我们获得最多 $\frac{k+1}{2}-2\cdot 10^{-4}$ 的保证。 本文旨在突破纯局部搜索在带权k-集合包装问题中的k/2近似比限制，提出更优的近似算法。 Meike Neuwohner cs.DS

authors_text: Pranav Madadi,Jeongho Jeon,Joonyoung Cho,Caleb Lo,Juho Lee,Jianzhong Zhang
title: PolarDenseNet: A Deep Learning Model for CSI Feedback in MIMO Systems
title_zh: PolarDenseNet：MIMO 系统中 CSI 反馈的深度学习模型
abstract: In multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) systems, the high-resolution channel information (CSI) is required at the base station (BS) to ensure optimal performance, especially in the case of multi-user MIMO (MU-MIMO) systems. In the absence of channel reciprocity in frequency division duplex (FDD) systems, the user needs to send the CSI to the BS. Often the large overhead associated with this CSI feedback in FDD systems becomes the bottleneck in improving the system performance. In this paper, we propose an AI-based CSI feedback based on an auto-encoder architecture that encodes the CSI at UE into a low-dimensional latent space and decodes it back at the BS by effectively reducing the feedback overhead while minimizing the loss during recovery. Our simulation results show that the AI-based proposed architecture outperforms the state-of-the-art high-resolution linear combination codebook using the DFT basis adopted in the 5G New Radio (NR) system.
summary: In multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) systems, the high-resolution channel information (CSI) is required at the base station (BS) to ensure optimal performance, especially in the case of multi-user MIMO (MU-MIMO) systems. In the absence of channel reciprocity in frequency division duplex (FDD) systems, the user needs to send the CSI to the BS. Often the large overhead associated with this CSI feedback in FDD systems becomes the bottleneck in improving the system performance. In this paper, we propose an AI-based CSI feedback based on an auto-encoder architecture that encodes the CSI at UE into a low-dimensional latent space and decodes it back at the BS by effectively reducing the feedback overhead while minimizing the loss during recovery. Our simulation results show that the AI-based proposed architecture outperforms the state-of-the-art high-resolution linear combination codebook using the DFT basis adopted in the 5G New Radio (NR) system.
abstract_zh: 在多输入多输出 (MIMO) 系统中，基站 (BS) 需要高分辨率信道信息 (CSI) 以确保最佳性能，特别是在多用户 MIMO (MU-MIMO) 系统中。在频分双工（FDD）系统中缺乏信道互易性的情况下，用户需要将CSI发送到BS。 FDD系统中与CSI反馈相关的大量开销常常成为提高系统性能的瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于自动编码器架构的基于人工智能的CSI反馈，该架构将UE处的CSI编码到低维潜在空间中，并通过有效减少反馈开销同时最小化恢复过程中的损失将其解码回BS处。我们的仿真结果表明，基于人工智能的架构优于 5G 新无线电 (NR) 系统中采用的 DFT 基础的最先进的高分辨率线性组合码本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自编码器的AI驱动CSI反馈方法，通过压缩信道状态信息（CSI）以降低反馈开销。
AI.motivation: 在FDD系统中，CSI反馈的高开销成为多用户MIMO系统性能提升的瓶颈，需寻找高效压缩方案。
AI.method: 设计PolarDenseNet自编码器架构，将用户端CSI编码为低维潜在空间表示，并在基站端解码恢复，实现高效压缩与低失真。
AI.result: 仿真表明，该方法在反馈开销减少的同时，优于5G NR系统中采用DFT基的高分辨率线性组合码本方案。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的CSI压缩框架能有效降低反馈开销并提升恢复精度，为FDD-MU-MIMO系统提供更优解决方案。

authors_text: Weiming Xiang,Zhongzhu Shao
title: Approximate Bisimulation Relations for Neural Networks and Application to Assured Neural Network Compression
title_zh: 神经网络的近似互模拟关系及其在保证神经网络压缩中的应用
abstract: In this paper, we propose a concept of approximate bisimulation relation for feedforward neural networks. In the framework of approximate bisimulation relation, a novel neural network merging method is developed to compute the approximate bisimulation error between two neural networks based on reachability analysis of neural networks. The developed method is able to quantitatively measure the distance between the outputs of two neural networks with the same inputs. Then, we apply the approximate bisimulation relation results to perform neural networks model reduction and compute the compression precision, i.e., assured neural networks compression. At last, using the assured neural network compression, we accelerate the verification processes of ACAS Xu neural networks to illustrate the effectiveness and advantages of our proposed approximate bisimulation approach.
summary: In this paper, we propose a concept of approximate bisimulation relation for feedforward neural networks. In the framework of approximate bisimulation relation, a novel neural network merging method is developed to compute the approximate bisimulation error between two neural networks based on reachability analysis of neural networks. The developed method is able to quantitatively measure the distance between the outputs of two neural networks with the same inputs. Then, we apply the approximate bisimulation relation results to perform neural networks model reduction and compute the compression precision, i.e., assured neural networks compression. At last, using the assured neural network compression, we accelerate the verification processes of ACAS Xu neural networks to illustrate the effectiveness and advantages of our proposed approximate bisimulation approach.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了前馈神经网络的近似互模拟关系的概念。在近似互模拟关系的框架下，提出了一种新的神经网络合并方法，基于神经网络的可达性分析来计算两个神经网络之间的近似互模拟误差。所开发的方法能够定量测量具有相同输入的两个神经网络的输出之间的距离。然后，我们应用近似互模拟关系结果来执行神经网络模型简化并计算压缩精度，即有保证的神经网络压缩。最后，使用有保证的神经网络压缩，我们加速了 ACAS Xu 神经网络的验证过程，以说明我们提出的近似互模拟方法的有效性和优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经网络的近似双模拟关系概念，并基于此开发模型压缩方法以保证压缩精度。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络压缩方法缺乏对压缩后精度的量化保证，需通过理论分析确保模型简化后的可靠性。
AI.method: 基于近似双模拟关系框架，通过可达性分析计算神经网络间输出误差，结合模型合并实现压缩精度可验证的网络简化。
AI.result: 成功加速ACAS Xu神经网络的验证过程，验证了方法在保证压缩精度方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 近似双模拟关系为神经网络压缩提供了可量化保证的理论基础，显著提升了验证效率。

authors_text: Ibrahim Cinaroglu,Yalin Bastanlar
title: Training Semantic Descriptors for Image-Based Localization
title_zh: 训练基于图像的定位的语义描述符
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, Accepted and Presented at Workshop on Perception for Autonomous Driving (PAD) / ECCV 2020
comments: 4 pages, 4 figures, Accepted and Presented at Workshop on Perception for Autonomous Driving (PAD) / ECCV 2020
abstract: Vision based solutions for the localization of vehicles have become popular recently. We employ an image retrieval based visual localization approach. The database images are kept with GPS coordinates and the location of the retrieved database image serves as an approximate position of the query image. We show that localization can be performed via descriptors solely extracted from semantically segmented images. It is reliable especially when the environment is subjected to severe illumination and seasonal changes. Our experiments reveal that the localization performance of a semantic descriptor can increase up to the level of state-of-the-art RGB image based methods.
summary: Vision based solutions for the localization of vehicles have become popular recently. We employ an image retrieval based visual localization approach. The database images are kept with GPS coordinates and the location of the retrieved database image serves as an approximate position of the query image. We show that localization can be performed via descriptors solely extracted from semantically segmented images. It is reliable especially when the environment is subjected to severe illumination and seasonal changes. Our experiments reveal that the localization performance of a semantic descriptor can increase up to the level of state-of-the-art RGB image based methods.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的车辆定位解决方案最近变得流行。我们采用基于图像检索的视觉定位方法。数据库图像保存有GPS坐标，检索到的数据库图像的位置作为查询图像的大致位置。我们表明，可以通过仅从语义分割图像中提取的描述符来执行定位。特别是在环境光照和季节变化剧烈的情况下，它非常可靠。我们的实验表明，语义描述符的定位性能可以提高到最先进的基于 RGB 图像的方法的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义分割图像的描述符训练方法，用于图像基于定位。
AI.motivation: 基于视觉的车辆定位方法在近年来变得流行。传统的基于RGB图像的方法在环境光照和季节变化下性能下降，因此需要一种更鲁棒的定位方法。
AI.method: 本文采用基于图像检索的视觉定位方法，利用语义分割图像提取描述符，并使用带有GPS坐标的数据库图像进行定位。
AI.result: 实验表明，语义描述符的定位性能可以达到最先进的RGB图像方法的水平，尤其在光照和季节变化较大的环境中表现可靠。
AI.conclusion: 语义分割图像提取的描述符在图像基于定位任务中具有良好的性能，特别是在复杂环境条件下。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义分割图像的描述符训练方法，用于图像基于定位。
ai_content.motivation: 基于视觉的车辆定位方法在近年来变得流行。传统的基于RGB图像的方法在环境光照和季节变化下性能下降，因此需要一种更鲁棒的定位方法。
ai_content.method: 本文采用基于图像检索的视觉定位方法，利用语义分割图像提取描述符，并使用带有GPS坐标的数据库图像进行定位。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，语义描述符的定位性能可以达到最先进的RGB图像方法的水平，尤其在光照和季节变化较大的环境中表现可靠。
ai_content.conclusion: 语义分割图像提取的描述符在图像基于定位任务中具有良好的性能，特别是在复杂环境条件下。

search_text: Training Semantic Descriptors for Image-Based Localization 训练基于图像的定位的语义描述符 Vision based solutions for the localization of vehicles have become popular recently. We employ an image retrieval based visual localization approach. The database images are kept with GPS coordinates and the location of the retrieved database image serves as an approximate position of the query image. We show that localization can be performed via descriptors solely extracted from semantically segmented images. It is reliable especially when the environment is subjected to severe illumination and seasonal changes. Our experiments reveal that the localization performance of a semantic descriptor can increase up to the level of state-of-the-art RGB image based methods. 基于视觉的车辆定位解决方案最近变得流行。我们采用基于图像检索的视觉定位方法。数据库图像保存有GPS坐标，检索到的数据库图像的位置作为查询图像的大致位置。我们表明，可以通过仅从语义分割图像中提取的描述符来执行定位。特别是在环境光照和季节变化剧烈的情况下，它非常可靠。我们的实验表明，语义描述符的定位性能可以提高到最先进的基于 RGB 图像的方法的水平。 本文提出了一种基于语义分割图像的描述符训练方法，用于图像基于定位。 Ibrahim Cinaroglu,Yalin Bastanlar cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Farnaz Khun Jush,Markus Biele,Peter M. Dueppenbecker,Andreas Maier
title: Deep Learning for Ultrasound Speed-of-Sound Reconstruction: Impacts of Training Data Diversity on Stability and Robustness
title_zh: 超声声速重建的深度学习：训练数据多样性对稳定性和鲁棒性的影响
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2023:007
comments: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2023:007
abstract: Ultrasound b-mode imaging is a qualitative approach and diagnostic quality strongly depends on operators' training and experience. Quantitative approaches can provide information about tissue properties; therefore, can be used for identifying various tissue types, e.g., speed-of-sound in the tissue can be used as a biomarker for tissue malignancy, especially in breast imaging. Recent studies showed the possibility of speed-of-sound reconstruction using deep neural networks that are fully trained on simulated data. However, because of the ever-present domain shift between simulated and measured data, the stability and performance of these models in real setups are still under debate. In prior works, for training data generation, tissue structures were modeled as simplified geometrical structures which does not reflect the complexity of the real tissues. In this study, we proposed a new simulation setup for training data generation based on Tomosynthesis images. We combined our approach with the simplified geometrical model and investigated the impacts of training data diversity on the stability and robustness of an existing network architecture. We studied the sensitivity of the trained network to different simulation parameters, e.g., echogenicity, number of scatterers, noise, and geometry. We showed that the network trained with the joint set of data is more stable on out-of-domain simulated data as well as measured phantom data.
summary: Ultrasound b-mode imaging is a qualitative approach and diagnostic quality strongly depends on operators' training and experience. Quantitative approaches can provide information about tissue properties; therefore, can be used for identifying various tissue types, e.g., speed-of-sound in the tissue can be used as a biomarker for tissue malignancy, especially in breast imaging. Recent studies showed the possibility of speed-of-sound reconstruction using deep neural networks that are fully trained on simulated data. However, because of the ever-present domain shift between simulated and measured data, the stability and performance of these models in real setups are still under debate. In prior works, for training data generation, tissue structures were modeled as simplified geometrical structures which does not reflect the complexity of the real tissues. In this study, we proposed a new simulation setup for training data generation based on Tomosynthesis images. We combined our approach with the simplified geometrical model and investigated the impacts of training data diversity on the stability and robustness of an existing network architecture. We studied the sensitivity of the trained network to different simulation parameters, e.g., echogenicity, number of scatterers, noise, and geometry. We showed that the network trained with the joint set of data is more stable on out-of-domain simulated data as well as measured phantom data.
abstract_zh: 超声 B 型成像是一种定性方法，诊断质量很大程度上取决于操作员的培训和经验。定量方法可以提供有关组织特性的信息；因此，可用于识别各种组织类型，例如，组织中的声速可用作组织恶性肿瘤的生物标志物，特别是在乳腺成像中。最近的研究表明，使用经过模拟数据充分训练的深度神经网络进行声速重建的可能性。然而，由于模拟数据和测量数据之间始终存在域转移，这些模型在实际设置中的稳定性和性能仍然存在争议。在之前的工作中，为了生成训练数据，组织结构被建模为简化的几何结构，这不能反映真实组织的复杂性。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于断层合成图像的训练数据生成的新模拟设置。我们将我们的方法与简化的几何模型相结合，并研究了训练数据多样性对现有网络架构的稳定性和鲁棒性的影响。我们研究了经过训练的网络对不同模拟参数的敏感性，例如回声性、散射体数量、噪声和几何形状。我们表明，使用联合数据集训练的网络在域外模拟数据以及测量的虚拟数据上更加稳定。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度学习在超声波声速重建中的应用，探讨训练数据多样性对模型稳定性与鲁棒性的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统超声B模式成像依赖操作者经验，而定量声速重建需解决模拟数据与真实数据间的领域偏移问题，现有简化模型难以反映真实组织复杂性。
AI.method: 基于断层摄影图像设计新模拟框架，结合简化几何模型生成多样化训练数据，并分析网络对不同参数（如回声强度、散射体数量等）的敏感性。
AI.result: 联合数据训练的网络在域外模拟数据及实际测量数据中表现出更高稳定性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 训练数据多样性显著提升模型泛化能力，为超声定量成像提供更可靠的数据生成方法。

However, because of the ever-present domain shift between simulated and measured data, the stability and performance of these models in real setups are still under debate. In this study, we proposed a new simulation setup for training data generation based on Tomosynthesis images. authors_text: Xuefeng Du,Zhaoning Wang,Mu Cai,Yixuan Li
title: VOS: Learning What You Don't Know by Virtual Outlier Synthesis
title_zh: VOS：通过虚拟异常值合成学习您不知道的内容
comment: ICLR 2022
comments: ICLR 2022
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection has received much attention lately due to its importance in the safe deployment of neural networks. One of the key challenges is that models lack supervision signals from unknown data, and as a result, can produce overconfident predictions on OOD data. Previous approaches rely on real outlier datasets for model regularization, which can be costly and sometimes infeasible to obtain in practice. In this paper, we present VOS, a novel framework for OOD detection by adaptively synthesizing virtual outliers that can meaningfully regularize the model's decision boundary during training. Specifically, VOS samples virtual outliers from the low-likelihood region of the class-conditional distribution estimated in the feature space. Alongside, we introduce a novel unknown-aware training objective, which contrastively shapes the uncertainty space between the ID data and synthesized outlier data. VOS achieves competitive performance on both object detection and image classification models, reducing the FPR95 by up to 9.36% compared to the previous best method on object detectors. Code is available at https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/vos.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection has received much attention lately due to its importance in the safe deployment of neural networks. One of the key challenges is that models lack supervision signals from unknown data, and as a result, can produce overconfident predictions on OOD data. Previous approaches rely on real outlier datasets for model regularization, which can be costly and sometimes infeasible to obtain in practice. In this paper, we present VOS, a novel framework for OOD detection by adaptively synthesizing virtual outliers that can meaningfully regularize the model's decision boundary during training. Specifically, VOS samples virtual outliers from the low-likelihood region of the class-conditional distribution estimated in the feature space. Alongside, we introduce a novel unknown-aware training objective, which contrastively shapes the uncertainty space between the ID data and synthesized outlier data. VOS achieves competitive performance on both object detection and image classification models, reducing the FPR95 by up to 9.36% compared to the previous best method on object detectors. Code is available at https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/vos.
abstract_zh: 分布外（OOD）检测由于其在神经网络安全部署中的重要性而最近受到了广泛关注。关键挑战之一是模型缺乏来自未知数据的监督信号，因此可能对 OOD 数据产生过度自信的预测。以前的方法依赖于真实的离群数据集来进行模型正则化，这可能成本高昂，有时在实践中无法实现。在本文中，我们提出了 VOS，这是一种通过自适应合成虚拟异常值进行 OOD 检测的新颖框架，可以在训练期间有意义地规范模型的决策边界。具体来说，VOS 从特征空间中估计的类条件分布的低似然区域中对虚拟异常值进行采样。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的未知感知训练目标，它对比地塑造了 ID 数据和合成异常数据之间的不确定性空间。 VOS 在目标检测和图像分类模型上都实现了具有竞争力的性能，与之前目标检测器上的最佳方法相比，FPR95 降低了高达 9.36%。代码可在 https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/vos 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VOS框架，通过合成虚拟异常数据来提升神经网络的分布外检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法依赖真实异常数据进行正则化，但获取成本高且实际应用中难以获得，导致模型在未知数据上易产生过自信预测。
AI.method: VOS在特征空间中从类条件分布的低概率区域合成虚拟异常样本，并设计对比学习目标以区分正常数据与合成异常的不确定性空间。
AI.result: VOS在目标检测和图像分类任务中均取得竞争力结果，使目标检测器的FPR95指标相比最佳方法降低9.36%。
AI.conclusion: VOS通过无需真实异常数据的虚拟合成方法，有效提升了模型对未知分布的检测能力，具有实际应用价值。

Alongside, we introduce a novel unknown-aware training objective, which contrastively shapes the uncertainty space between the ID data and synthesized outlier data. VOS achieves competitive performance on both object detection and image classification models, reducing the FPR95 by up to 9.36% compared to the previous best method on object detectors. Code is available at https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/vos. 分布外（OOD）检测由于其在神经网络安全部署中的重要性而最近受到了广泛关注。关键挑战之一是模型缺乏来自未知数据的监督信号，因此可能对 OOD 数据产生过度自信的预测。以前的方法依赖于真实的离群数据集来进行模型正则化，这可能成本高昂，有时在实践中无法实现。在本文中，我们提出了 VOS，这是一种通过自适应合成虚拟异常值进行 OOD 检测的新颖框架，可以在训练期间有意义地规范模型的决策边界。具体来说，VOS 从特征空间中估计的类条件分布的低似然区域中对虚拟异常值进行采样。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的未知感知训练目标，它对比地塑造了 ID 数据和合成异常数据之间的不确定性空间。 VOS 在目标检测和图像分类模型上都实现了具有竞争力的性能，与之前目标检测器上的最佳方法相比，FPR95 降低了高达 9.36%。代码可在 https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/vos 获取。 本文提出VOS框架，通过合成虚拟异常数据来提升神经网络的分布外检测能力。 Xuefeng Du,Zhaoning Wang,Mu Cai,Yixuan Li cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Mikhail Pautov,Olesya Kuznetsova,Nurislam Tursynbek,Aleksandr Petiushko,Ivan Oseledets
title: Smoothed Embeddings for Certified Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 用于经过认证的少样本学习的平滑嵌入
comment: ef:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 35 (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: ef:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 35 (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Randomized smoothing is considered to be the state-of-the-art provable defense against adversarial perturbations. However, it heavily exploits the fact that classifiers map input objects to class probabilities and do not focus on the ones that learn a metric space in which classification is performed by computing distances to embeddings of classes prototypes. In this work, we extend randomized smoothing to few-shot learning models that map inputs to normalized embeddings. We provide analysis of Lipschitz continuity of such models and derive robustness certificate against $\ell_2$-bounded perturbations that may be useful in few-shot learning scenarios. Our theoretical results are confirmed by experiments on different datasets.
summary: Randomized smoothing is considered to be the state-of-the-art provable defense against adversarial perturbations. However, it heavily exploits the fact that classifiers map input objects to class probabilities and do not focus on the ones that learn a metric space in which classification is performed by computing distances to embeddings of classes prototypes. In this work, we extend randomized smoothing to few-shot learning models that map inputs to normalized embeddings. We provide analysis of Lipschitz continuity of such models and derive robustness certificate against $\ell_2$-bounded perturbations that may be useful in few-shot learning scenarios. Our theoretical results are confirmed by experiments on different datasets.
abstract_zh: 随机平滑被认为是最先进的、可证明的对抗性扰动防御方法。然而，它大量利用了这样一个事实：分类器将输入对象映射到类概率，而不关注学习度量空间的分类器，在度量空间中，通过计算到类原型嵌入的距离来执行分类。在这项工作中，我们将随机平滑扩展到将输入映射到归一化嵌入的少样本学习模型。我们对此类模型的 Lipschitz 连续性进行了分析，并得出针对 $\ell_2$ 有限扰动的鲁棒性证书，这在少数样本学习场景中可能有用。我们的理论结果通过不同数据集的实验得到了证实。

AI.tldr: 本文将随机平滑方法扩展到少样本学习模型，以提升其对对抗扰动的鲁棒性，并提供理论保证。
AI.motivation: 传统随机平滑方法主要针对概率分类器，而少样本学习依赖于嵌入空间的距离计算，需适应此类模型并提供鲁棒性保证。
AI.method: 通过分析模型的Lipschitz连续性，推导针对ℓ2扰动的鲁棒性证书，并在多个数据集上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验验证了理论分析的有效性，证明了方法在不同数据集上的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效提升了少样本学习模型的鲁棒性，为该领域提供了新的理论支持和实用方案。

authors_text: Pau de Jorge,Adel Bibi,Riccardo Volpi,Amartya Sanyal,Philip H. S. Torr,Grégory Rogez,Puneet K. Dokania
title: Make Some Noise: Reliable and Efficient Single-Step Adversarial Training
title_zh: 制造一些噪音：可靠且高效的单步对抗训练
comment: Published in NeurIPS 2022
comments: Published in NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Recently, Wong et al. showed that adversarial training with single-step FGSM leads to a characteristic failure mode named Catastrophic Overfitting (CO), in which a model becomes suddenly vulnerable to multi-step attacks. Experimentally they showed that simply adding a random perturbation prior to FGSM (RS-FGSM) could prevent CO. However, Andriushchenko and Flammarion observed that RS-FGSM still leads to CO for larger perturbations, and proposed a computationally expensive regularizer (GradAlign) to avoid it. In this work, we methodically revisit the role of noise and clipping in single-step adversarial training. Contrary to previous intuitions, we find that using a stronger noise around the clean sample combined with \textit{not clipping} is highly effective in avoiding CO for large perturbation radii. We then propose Noise-FGSM (N-FGSM) that, while providing the benefits of single-step adversarial training, does not suffer from CO. Empirical analyses on a large suite of experiments show that N-FGSM is able to match or surpass the performance of previous state-of-the-art GradAlign, while achieving 3x speed-up. Code can be found in https://github.com/pdejorge/N-FGSM
summary: Recently, Wong et al. showed that adversarial training with single-step FGSM leads to a characteristic failure mode named Catastrophic Overfitting (CO), in which a model becomes suddenly vulnerable to multi-step attacks. Experimentally they showed that simply adding a random perturbation prior to FGSM (RS-FGSM) could prevent CO. However, Andriushchenko and Flammarion observed that RS-FGSM still leads to CO for larger perturbations, and proposed a computationally expensive regularizer (GradAlign) to avoid it. In this work, we methodically revisit the role of noise and clipping in single-step adversarial training. Contrary to previous intuitions, we find that using a stronger noise around the clean sample combined with \textit{not clipping} is highly effective in avoiding CO for large perturbation radii. We then propose Noise-FGSM (N-FGSM) that, while providing the benefits of single-step adversarial training, does not suffer from CO. Empirical analyses on a large suite of experiments show that N-FGSM is able to match or surpass the performance of previous state-of-the-art GradAlign, while achieving 3x speed-up. Code can be found in https://github.com/pdejorge/N-FGSM
abstract_zh: 最近，Wong 等人。研究表明，单步 FGSM 的对抗性训练会导致一种称为灾难性过度拟合（CO）的特征性故障模式，其中模型突然变得容易受到多步攻击。通过实验，他们表明，简单地在 FGSM (RS-FGSM) 之前添加随机扰动就可以防止 CO。然而，Andriushchenko 和 Flammarion 观察到，RS-FGSM 仍然会导致较大扰动的 CO，并提出了一种计算成本高昂的正则化器 (GradAlign) 来避免它。在这项工作中，我们系统地重新审视了噪声和削波在单步对抗训练中的作用。与之前的直觉相反，我们发现在干净样本周围使用更强的噪声结合 \textit{not Clipping} 可以非常有效地避免大扰动半径的 CO。然后，我们提出了 Noise-FGSM (N-FGSM)，它在提供单步对抗训练的优点的同时，不会受到 CO 的影响。对大量实验的实证分析表明，N-FGSM 能够匹配或超越之前最先进的 GradAlign 的性能，同时实现 3 倍的加速。代码可以在 https://github.com/pdejorge/N-FGSM 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为N-FGSM的单步对抗训练方法，通过引入更强的噪声和避免裁剪来防止灾难性过拟合（CO），从而提升模型鲁棒性和训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有单步FGSM对抗训练方法在面对大扰动半径时易出现灾难性过拟合（CO），而改进方法如RS-FGSM和GradAlign分别存在效果不足或计算成本高的问题。
AI.method: 通过系统分析噪声和裁剪的作用，发现使用更强噪声并取消裁剪能有效避免CO，据此提出N-FGSM方法。
AI.result: N-FGSM在多个实验中表现优于GradAlign，且训练速度提升3倍，同时保持单步对抗训练的优势。
AI.conclusion: N-FGSM通过优化噪声策略和训练机制，成功解决了单步对抗训练中的CO问题，实现了高效可靠的模型鲁棒性提升。

search_text: Make Some Noise: Reliable and Efficient Single-Step Adversarial Training 制造一些噪音：可靠且高效的单步对抗训练 Recently, Wong et al. showed that adversarial training with single-step FGSM leads to a characteristic failure mode named Catastrophic Overfitting (CO), in which a model becomes suddenly vulnerable to multi-step attacks. Experimentally they showed that simply adding a random perturbation prior to FGSM (RS-FGSM) could prevent CO. However, Andriushchenko and Flammarion observed that RS-FGSM still leads to CO for larger perturbations, and proposed a computationally expensive regularizer (GradAlign) to avoid it. In this work, we methodically revisit the role of noise and clipping in single-step adversarial training. Contrary to previous intuitions, we find that using a stronger noise around the clean sample combined with \textit{not clipping} is highly effective in avoiding CO for large perturbation radii. We then propose Noise-FGSM (N-FGSM) that, while providing the benefits of single-step adversarial training, does not suffer from CO. Empirical analyses on a large suite of experiments show that N-FGSM is able to match or surpass the performance of previous state-of-the-art GradAlign, while achieving 3x speed-up. authors_text: Muhammad Usman,Youcheng Sun,Divya Gopinath,Corina S. Pasareanu
title: AntidoteRT: Run-time Detection and Correction of Poison Attacks on Neural Networks
title_zh: AntidoteRT：神经网络中毒攻击的运行时检测和纠正
abstract: We study backdoor poisoning attacks against image classification networks, whereby an attacker inserts a trigger into a subset of the training data, in such a way that at test time, this trigger causes the classifier to predict some target class. %There are several techniques proposed in the literature that aim to detect the attack but only a few also propose to defend against it, and they typically involve retraining the network which is not always possible in practice. We propose lightweight automated detection and correction techniques against poisoning attacks, which are based on neuron patterns mined from the network using a small set of clean and poisoned test samples with known labels. The patterns built based on the mis-classified samples are used for run-time detection of new poisoned inputs. For correction, we propose an input correction technique that uses a differential analysis to identify the trigger in the detected poisoned images, which is then reset to a neutral color. Our detection and correction are performed at run-time and input level, which is in contrast to most existing work that is focused on offline model-level defenses. We demonstrate that our technique outperforms existing defenses such as NeuralCleanse and STRIP on popular benchmarks such as MNIST, CIFAR-10, and GTSRB against the popular BadNets attack and the more complex DFST attack.
summary: We study backdoor poisoning attacks against image classification networks, whereby an attacker inserts a trigger into a subset of the training data, in such a way that at test time, this trigger causes the classifier to predict some target class. %There are several techniques proposed in the literature that aim to detect the attack but only a few also propose to defend against it, and they typically involve retraining the network which is not always possible in practice. We propose lightweight automated detection and correction techniques against poisoning attacks, which are based on neuron patterns mined from the network using a small set of clean and poisoned test samples with known labels. The patterns built based on the mis-classified samples are used for run-time detection of new poisoned inputs. For correction, we propose an input correction technique that uses a differential analysis to identify the trigger in the detected poisoned images, which is then reset to a neutral color. Our detection and correction are performed at run-time and input level, which is in contrast to most existing work that is focused on offline model-level defenses. We demonstrate that our technique outperforms existing defenses such as NeuralCleanse and STRIP on popular benchmarks such as MNIST, CIFAR-10, and GTSRB against the popular BadNets attack and the more complex DFST attack.
abstract_zh: 我们研究针对图像分类网络的后门中毒攻击，攻击者将触发器插入训练数据的子集中，这样在测试时，该触发器会导致分类器预测某些目标类别。文献中提出了几种旨在检测攻击的技术，但只有少数技术也提出了防御攻击的技术，并且它们通常涉及重新训练网络，但这在实践中并不总是可行。我们提出了针对中毒攻击的轻量级自动检测和纠正技术，这些技术基于使用一小组带有已知标签的干净和中毒测试样本从网络中挖掘的神经元模式。基于错误分类样本构建的模式用于新的中毒输入的运行时检测。为了进行校正，我们提出了一种输入校正技术，该技术使用差分分析来识别检测到的中毒图像中的触发因素，然后将其重置为中性颜色。我们的检测和纠正是在运行时和输入级别执行的，这与大多数专注于离线模型级防御的现有工作形成鲜明对比。我们证明，在针对流行的 BadNets 攻击和更复杂的 DFST 攻击的流行基准（例如 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 GTSRB）上，我们的技术优于 NeuralCleanse 和 STRIP 等现有防御措施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AntidoteRT方法，实现对神经网络投毒攻击的实时检测与修正。
AI.motivation: 现有投毒攻击防御方法依赖模型重训练，存在实际应用限制，需轻量级实时检测方案。
AI.method: 基于少量干净/中毒测试样本挖掘神经元模式，利用误分类样本构建检测模型；通过微分分析定位触发器并重置为中性颜色实现修正。
AI.result: 在MNIST/CIFAR-10/GTSRB数据集上优于NeuralCleanse和STRIP，有效防御BadNets和DFST攻击。
AI.conclusion: 提出无需重训练的实时输入级防御框架，为实际部署提供可行解决方案。

search_text: AntidoteRT: Run-time Detection and Correction of Poison Attacks on Neural Networks AntidoteRT：神经网络中毒攻击的运行时检测和纠正 We study backdoor poisoning attacks against image classification networks, whereby an attacker inserts a trigger into a subset of the training data, in such a way that at test time, this trigger causes the classifier to predict some target class. %There are several techniques proposed in the literature that aim to detect the attack but only a few also propose to defend against it, and they typically involve retraining the network which is not always possible in practice. We propose lightweight automated detection and correction techniques against poisoning attacks, which are based on neuron patterns mined from the network using a small set of clean and poisoned test samples with known labels. The patterns built based on the mis-classified samples are used for run-time detection of new poisoned inputs. For correction, we propose an input correction technique that uses a differential analysis to identify the trigger in the detected poisoned images, which is then reset to a neutral color. Our detection and correction are performed at run-time and input level, which is in contrast to most existing work that is focused on offline model-level defenses. We demonstrate that our technique outperforms existing defenses such as NeuralCleanse and STRIP on popular benchmarks such as MNIST, CIFAR-10, and GTSRB against the popular BadNets attack and the more complex DFST attack. 我们研究针对图像分类网络的后门中毒攻击，攻击者将触发器插入训练数据的子集中，这样在测试时，该触发器会导致分类器预测某些目标类别。文献中提出了几种旨在检测攻击的技术，但只有少数技术也提出了防御攻击的技术，并且它们通常涉及重新训练网络，但这在实践中并不总是可行。我们提出了针对中毒攻击的轻量级自动检测和纠正技术，这些技术基于使用一小组带有已知标签的干净和中毒测试样本从网络中挖掘的神经元模式。基于错误分类样本构建的模式用于新的中毒输入的运行时检测。为了进行校正，我们提出了一种输入校正技术，该技术使用差分分析来识别检测到的中毒图像中的触发因素，然后将其重置为中性颜色。我们的检测和纠正是在运行时和输入级别执行的，这与大多数专注于离线模型级防御的现有工作形成鲜明对比。我们证明，在针对流行的 BadNets 攻击和更复杂的 DFST 攻击的流行基准（例如 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 GTSRB）上，我们的技术优于 NeuralCleanse 和 STRIP 等现有防御措施。 本文提出AntidoteRT方法，实现对神经网络投毒攻击的实时检测与修正。 Muhammad Usman,Youcheng Sun,Divya Gopinath,Corina S. Pasareanu cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Shmuel Onn
title: Matching Orderable and Separable Hypergraphs
title_zh: 匹配可排序和可分离的超图
abstract: A perfect matching in a hypergraph is a set of edges that partition the set of vertices. We study the complexity of deciding the existence of a perfect matching in orderable and separable hypergraphs. We show that the class of orderable hypergraphs is strictly contained in the class of separable hypergraphs. Accordingly, we show that for each fixed $k$, deciding perfect matching for orderable $k$-hypergraphs is polynomial time doable, but for each fixed $k\geq 3$, it is NP-complete for separable hypergraphs.
summary: A perfect matching in a hypergraph is a set of edges that partition the set of vertices. We study the complexity of deciding the existence of a perfect matching in orderable and separable hypergraphs. We show that the class of orderable hypergraphs is strictly contained in the class of separable hypergraphs. Accordingly, we show that for each fixed $k$, deciding perfect matching for orderable $k$-hypergraphs is polynomial time doable, but for each fixed $k\geq 3$, it is NP-complete for separable hypergraphs.
abstract_zh: 超图中的完美匹配是划分顶点集的一组边。我们研究了确定可排序和可分离超图中完美匹配是否存在的复杂性。我们证明可排序超图类严格包含在可分离超图类中。因此，我们表明，对于每个固定的$k$，决定可排序的$k$超图的完美匹配是多项式时间可行的，但对于每个固定的$k\geq 3$，对于可分离的超图来说是NP完全的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究可排序超图与可分离超图中完美匹配问题的计算复杂度差异。
AI.motivation: 理解不同超图类别的完美匹配判定问题复杂度，有助于区分结构特性对算法难度的影响。
AI.method: 通过复杂性理论分析与归约技术，比较两类超图的计算复杂度边界。
AI.result: 可排序k-超图完美匹配问题多项式可解，而可分离k-超图（k≥3）为NP完全问题，且前者是后者的严格子集。
AI.conclusion: 超图结构特性显著影响完美匹配问题的计算难度，为算法设计提供理论区分依据。

authors_text: Nikunj Arora,Markku Suomalainen,Matti Pouke,Evan G. Center,Katherine J. Mimnaugh,Alexis P. Chambers,Sakaria Pouke,Steven M. LaValle
title: Augmenting Immersive Telepresence Experience with a Virtual Body
title_zh: 通过虚拟身体增强沉浸式远程呈现体验
comment: Accepted for publication in Transactions in Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG), to be presented in IEEE VR 2022
comments: Accepted for publication in Transactions in Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG), to be presented in IEEE VR 2022
abstract: We propose augmenting immersive telepresence by adding a virtual body, representing the user's own arm motions, as realized through a head-mounted display and a 360-degree camera. Previous research has shown the effectiveness of having a virtual body in simulated environments; however, research on whether seeing one's own virtual arms increases presence or preference for the user in an immersive telepresence setup is limited. We conducted a study where a host introduced a research lab while participants wore a head-mounted display which allowed them to be telepresent at the host's physical location via a 360-degree camera, either with or without a virtual body. We first conducted a pilot study of 20 participants, followed by a pre-registered 62 participant confirmatory study. Whereas the pilot study showed greater presence and preference when the virtual body was present, the confirmatory study failed to replicate these results, with only behavioral measures suggesting an increase in presence. After analyzing the qualitative data and modeling interactions, we suspect that the quality and style of the virtual arms, and the contrast between animation and video, led to individual differences in reactions to the virtual body which subsequently moderated feelings of presence.
summary: We propose augmenting immersive telepresence by adding a virtual body, representing the user's own arm motions, as realized through a head-mounted display and a 360-degree camera. Previous research has shown the effectiveness of having a virtual body in simulated environments; however, research on whether seeing one's own virtual arms increases presence or preference for the user in an immersive telepresence setup is limited. We conducted a study where a host introduced a research lab while participants wore a head-mounted display which allowed them to be telepresent at the host's physical location via a 360-degree camera, either with or without a virtual body. We first conducted a pilot study of 20 participants, followed by a pre-registered 62 participant confirmatory study. Whereas the pilot study showed greater presence and preference when the virtual body was present, the confirmatory study failed to replicate these results, with only behavioral measures suggesting an increase in presence. After analyzing the qualitative data and modeling interactions, we suspect that the quality and style of the virtual arms, and the contrast between animation and video, led to individual differences in reactions to the virtual body which subsequently moderated feelings of presence.
abstract_zh: 我们建议通过添加虚拟身体来增强沉浸式远程呈现，虚拟身体代表用户自己的手臂运动，通过头戴式显示器和 360 度摄像头实现。之前的研究已经证明了在模拟环境中拥有虚拟身体的有效性；然而，关于在沉浸式远程呈现设置中看到自己的虚拟手臂是否会增加用户的临场感或偏好的研究还很有限。我们进行了一项研究，主持人介绍了一个研究实验室，而参与者则佩戴头戴式显示器，这使得他们可以通过 360 度摄像头远程呈现在主持人的物理位置，无论有或没有虚拟身体。我们首先进行了 20 名参与者的试点研究，随后进行了预先注册的 62 名参与者的验证性研究。虽然试点研究显示虚拟身体存在时存在感更强，偏好也更高，但验证性研究未能复制这些结果，只有行为测量表明存在感增加。在分析定性数据和建模交互后，我们怀疑虚拟手臂的质量和风格，以及动画和视频之间的对比，导致了对虚拟身体反应的个体差异，从而调节了存在感。

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨通过添加虚拟身体（用户手臂动作的虚拟映射）来增强沉浸式远程临场体验的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管虚拟身体在模拟环境中被证明有效，但其在沉浸式远程临场设置中对用户临场感和偏好影响的研究尚不充分。
AI.method: 通过头戴式显示器和360度摄像头实现远程临场，让参与者在有或无虚拟手臂的情况下参与实验，包括20人的预实验和62人的预注册验证实验。
AI.result: 预实验显示虚拟身体提升临场感和偏好，但验证实验未复现结果，仅行为指标显示临场感提升；定性分析表明虚拟手臂质量、动画与视频对比度导致个体差异。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟身体的效果受虚拟手臂呈现质量及动画与视频差异影响，需进一步优化设计以提升一致性。
