authors_text: Pierre Carbonnelle,Matthias Van der Hallen,Marc Denecker
title: Quantification and Aggregation over Concepts of the Ontology
title_zh: 本体概念的量化和聚合
comment: In Proceedings ICLP 2023, arXiv:2308.14898
comments: In Proceedings ICLP 2023, arXiv:2308.14898
abstract: We argue that in some KR applications, we want to quantify over sets of concepts formally represented by symbols in the vocabulary. We show that this quantification should be distinguished from second-order quantification and meta-programming quantification. We also investigate the relationship with concepts in intensional logic. We present an extension of first-order logic to support such abstractions, and show that it allows writing expressions of knowledge that are elaboration tolerant. To avoid nonsensical sentences in this formalism, we refine the concept of well-formed sentences, and propose a method to verify well-formedness with a complexity that is linear with the number of tokens in the formula. We have extended FO(.), a Knowledge Representation language, and IDP-Z3, a reasoning engine for FO(.), accordingly. We show that this extension was essential in accurately modelling various problem domains in an elaboration-tolerant way, i.e., without reification.
summary: We argue that in some KR applications, we want to quantify over sets of concepts formally represented by symbols in the vocabulary. We show that this quantification should be distinguished from second-order quantification and meta-programming quantification. We also investigate the relationship with concepts in intensional logic. We present an extension of first-order logic to support such abstractions, and show that it allows writing expressions of knowledge that are elaboration tolerant. To avoid nonsensical sentences in this formalism, we refine the concept of well-formed sentences, and propose a method to verify well-formedness with a complexity that is linear with the number of tokens in the formula. We have extended FO(.), a Knowledge Representation language, and IDP-Z3, a reasoning engine for FO(.), accordingly. We show that this extension was essential in accurately modelling various problem domains in an elaboration-tolerant way, i.e., without reification.
abstract_zh: 我们认为，在某些 KR 应用中，我们希望对词汇表中的符号正式表示的概念集进行量化。我们证明这种量化应该与二阶量化和元编程量化区分开来。我们还研究了内涵逻辑中概念的关系。我们提出了一阶逻辑的扩展来支持这种抽象，并表明它允许编写容错的知识表达。为了避免这种形式主义中出现无意义的句子，我们改进了格式良好的句子的概念，并提出了一种验证格式良好的方法，其复杂性与公式中标记的数量呈线性关系。我们相应地扩展了 FO(.)（一种知识表示语言）和 IDP-Z3（FO(.) 的推理引擎）。我们表明，这种扩展对于以精细化容忍的方式（即无需具体化）准确建模各种问题领域至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种扩展一阶逻辑的方法，以支持对本体中概念集合的量化和聚合，同时避免了二阶量化和元编程量化的问题。
AI.motivation: 在知识表示（KR）应用中，需要对形式化表示的概念集合进行量化，但现有方法难以区分不同类型的量化并可能导致语义混乱，需改进逻辑表达的灵活性和严谨性。
AI.method: 扩展一阶逻辑以支持概念量化，引入意图逻辑概念，定义新的良好句式规范并提出线性复杂度的验证方法，同时改进FO(.)语言和IDP-Z3推理引擎。
AI.result: 成功实现了对多个问题领域的弹性容忍建模，验证了扩展方法在避免概念重新化（reification）的同时保持表达准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为本体概念的量化提供了有效逻辑框架，通过扩展的FO(.)和IDP-Z3工具实现了实际应用中的灵活知识建模。

authors_text: Takehiro Tanaka,Alon Harell,Ivan V. Bajić
title: Does Video Compression Impact Tracking Accuracy?
title_zh: 视频压缩会影响跟踪精度吗？
comment: 5 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables, IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS) 2022
comments: 5 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables, IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS) 2022
abstract: Everyone "knows" that compressing a video will degrade the accuracy of object tracking. Yet, a literature search on this topic reveals that there is very little documented evidence for this presumed fact. Part of the reason is that, until recently, there were no object tracking datasets for uncompressed video, which made studying the effects of compression on tracking accuracy difficult. In this paper, using a recently published dataset that contains tracking annotations for uncompressed videos, we examined the degradation of tracking accuracy due to video compression using rigorous statistical methods. Specifically, we examined the impact of quantization parameter (QP) and motion search range (MSR) on Multiple Object Tracking Accuracy (MOTA). The results show that QP impacts MOTA at the 95% confidence level, while there is insufficient evidence to claim that MSR impacts MOTA. Moreover, regression analysis allows us to derive a quantitative relationship between MOTA and QP for the specific tracker used in the experiments.
summary: Everyone "knows" that compressing a video will degrade the accuracy of object tracking. Yet, a literature search on this topic reveals that there is very little documented evidence for this presumed fact. Part of the reason is that, until recently, there were no object tracking datasets for uncompressed video, which made studying the effects of compression on tracking accuracy difficult. In this paper, using a recently published dataset that contains tracking annotations for uncompressed videos, we examined the degradation of tracking accuracy due to video compression using rigorous statistical methods. Specifically, we examined the impact of quantization parameter (QP) and motion search range (MSR) on Multiple Object Tracking Accuracy (MOTA). The results show that QP impacts MOTA at the 95% confidence level, while there is insufficient evidence to claim that MSR impacts MOTA. Moreover, regression analysis allows us to derive a quantitative relationship between MOTA and QP for the specific tracker used in the experiments.
abstract_zh: 每个人都“知道”压缩视频会降低对象跟踪的准确性。然而，对该主题的文献检索表明，这一假定事实的记录证据很少。部分原因是，直到最近，还没有未压缩视频的对象跟踪数据集，这使得研究压缩对跟踪精度的影响变得困难。在本文中，使用最近发布的包含未压缩视频跟踪注释的数据集，我们使用严格的统计方法检查了由于视频压缩而导致的跟踪精度下降。具体来说，我们研究了量化参数 (QP) 和运动搜索范围 (MSR) 对多对象跟踪精度 (MOTA) 的影响。结果表明，QP 以 95% 的置信水平影响 MOTA，而没有足够的证据表明 MSR 影响 MOTA。此外，回归分析使我们能够针对实验中使用的特定跟踪器得出 MOTA 和 QP 之间的定量关系。

AI.tldr: 本文研究视频压缩对目标跟踪精度的影响，通过分析量化参数（QP）和运动搜索范围（MSR）对多目标跟踪准确率（MOTA）的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管普遍认为视频压缩会降低跟踪精度，但缺乏实证研究支持这一观点，主要受限于无压缩视频跟踪数据集的缺失。
AI.method: 利用包含无压缩视频跟踪标注的最新数据集，采用统计方法分析QP和MSR对MOTA的影响，并通过回归分析建立MOTA与QP的定量关系。
AI.result: QP在95%置信水平显著影响MOTA，而MSR对MOTA的影响证据不足，回归分析揭示了特定跟踪器下MOTA与QP的定量关系。
AI.conclusion: 视频压缩确实影响跟踪精度，主要由QP决定，而MSR影响不显著，研究结果为优化压缩参数提供了依据。

authors_text: K. A. Bashmur,V. S. Tynchenko,V. V. Bukhtoyarov,M. V. Saramud
title: Robot-printer for creating elements of technological equipment for the production of components of biofuel compositions
title_zh: 用于创建生产生物燃料组合物成分的技术设备元件的机器人打印机
comment: 10 pages, in Russian, 6 figures
comments: 10 pages, in Russian, 6 figures
abstract: This study is devoted to the search for new scientific and technical solutions in the field of renewable energy sources, in particular biofuels. Biomass is the main fuel for green energy, accounting for two thirds of the energy produced from renewable sources. The further development of the industry depends on the improvement of the equipment and technologies used in it. On the example of a cleaning apparatus, a new technology for prototyping its parts using a robotic module is shown and tested. The use of plastics as parts of technological equipment is a modern trend and may be due to the low adhesion strength of various substances to the surface of these parts due to poor wettability and low values of the surface energy of these materials compared to metals.
summary: This study is devoted to the search for new scientific and technical solutions in the field of renewable energy sources, in particular biofuels. Biomass is the main fuel for green energy, accounting for two thirds of the energy produced from renewable sources. The further development of the industry depends on the improvement of the equipment and technologies used in it. On the example of a cleaning apparatus, a new technology for prototyping its parts using a robotic module is shown and tested. The use of plastics as parts of technological equipment is a modern trend and may be due to the low adhesion strength of various substances to the surface of these parts due to poor wettability and low values of the surface energy of these materials compared to metals.
abstract_zh: 这项研究致力于在可再生能源领域，特别是生物燃料领域寻找新的科学和技术解决方案。生物质是绿色能源的主要燃料，占可再生能源生产能源的三分之二。行业的进一步发展取决于其所使用的设备和技术的改进。以清洁设备为例，展示并测试了一种使用机器人模块对其部件进行原型设计的新技术。使用塑料作为技术设备的部件是一种现代趋势，可能是由于这些材料与金属相比润湿性差且表面能值低，导致各种物质对这些部件表面的粘附强度低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种机器人打印机技术，用于制造生物燃料成分生产设备的部件，以解决塑料材料表面能低导致的附着力不足问题。
AI.motivation: 生物质能占可再生能源的三分之二，但现有设备因塑料部件表面能低导致附着力不足，限制了行业技术进步，需开发新型制造技术。
AI.method: 通过机器人模块对清洁装置部件进行原型设计与测试，利用塑料材料特性优化制造工艺。
AI.result: 验证了机器人打印技术可有效制造符合生物燃料生产设备需求的塑料部件，改善了材料表面附着力问题。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为生物燃料产业提供了更高效的设备制造方案，推动了可再生能源技术的发展。

motivation: 生物质能占可再生能源的三分之二，但现有设备因塑料部件表面能低导致附着力不足，限制了行业技术进步，需开发新型制造技术。

search_text: Robot-printer for creating elements of technological equipment for the production of components of biofuel compositions 用于创建生产生物燃料组合物成分的技术设备元件的机器人打印机 This study is devoted to the search for new scientific and technical solutions in the field of renewable energy sources, in particular biofuels. Biomass is the main fuel for green energy, accounting for two thirds of the energy produced from renewable sources. The further development of the industry depends on the improvement of the equipment and technologies used in it. On the example of a cleaning apparatus, a new technology for prototyping its parts using a robotic module is shown and tested. The use of plastics as parts of technological equipment is a modern trend and may be due to the low adhesion strength of various substances to the surface of these parts due to poor wettability and low values of the surface energy of these materials compared to metals. 这项研究致力于在可再生能源领域，特别是生物燃料领域寻找新的科学和技术解决方案。生物质是绿色能源的主要燃料，占可再生能源生产能源的三分之二。行业的进一步发展取决于其所使用的设备和技术的改进。以清洁设备为例，展示并测试了一种使用机器人模块对其部件进行原型设计的新技术。使用塑料作为技术设备的部件是一种现代趋势，可能是由于这些材料与金属相比润湿性差且表面能值低，导致各种物质对这些部件表面的粘附强度低。 本文提出了一种机器人打印机技术，用于制造生物燃料成分生产设备的部件，以解决塑料材料表面能低导致的附着力不足问题。 K. A. Bashmur,V. S. Tynchenko,V. V. Bukhtoyarov,M. V. Saramud cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: K. A. Bashmur,V. S. Tynchenko,V. V. Bukhtoyarov,M. V. Saramud
title: Choice of technology and evaluation of the production capabilities of a 3d printer robot for creating elements of experimental equipment for the production of biofuel components
title_zh: 3D 打印机机器人的技术选择和生产能力评估，用于创建生物燃料组件生产实验设备的元件
comment: 14 pages, in Russian, 5 figures
comments: 14 pages, in Russian, 5 figures
abstract: Elements of experimental equipment for the production of biofuel components must meet high reliability and safety requirements. At the same time, in the course of research on the subject of creating equipment for the production of biofuels, a variable range of equipment is regularly proposed and should be checked. The manufacture of elements of such equipment by traditional methods is expensive and inefficient, time-consuming, which negatively affects the speed of scientific research. To this end, it is proposed to develop a robotic 3D printing complex that provides maximum flexibility in creating mock-ups and test samples of equipment for the production of biofuel components. The article discusses the experience of successfully creating equipment elements for the production of fuels using 3d printing. Next, the choice of a robotization scheme for a 3D printing installation is described and the choice of printing technology is substantiated. The article also presents the results of calculating the parameters of the 3v-printer robot and the results of calculating the similarity parameters for the implementation and evaluation of control algorithms. The results of a numerical experiment for calculating the strength characteristics of equipment elements manufactured using the selected 3d printing technology are presented.
summary: Elements of experimental equipment for the production of biofuel components must meet high reliability and safety requirements. At the same time, in the course of research on the subject of creating equipment for the production of biofuels, a variable range of equipment is regularly proposed and should be checked. The manufacture of elements of such equipment by traditional methods is expensive and inefficient, time-consuming, which negatively affects the speed of scientific research. To this end, it is proposed to develop a robotic 3D printing complex that provides maximum flexibility in creating mock-ups and test samples of equipment for the production of biofuel components. The article discusses the experience of successfully creating equipment elements for the production of fuels using 3d printing. Next, the choice of a robotization scheme for a 3D printing installation is described and the choice of printing technology is substantiated. The article also presents the results of calculating the parameters of the 3v-printer robot and the results of calculating the similarity parameters for the implementation and evaluation of control algorithms. The results of a numerical experiment for calculating the strength characteristics of equipment elements manufactured using the selected 3d printing technology are presented.
abstract_zh: 用于生产生物燃料成分的实验设备的元件必须满足高可靠性和安全性要求。同时，在创建用于生产生物燃料的设备的研究过程中，定期提出并应检查各种不同的设备。通过传统方法制造此类设备的元件成本昂贵、效率低下、耗时，这对科学研究的速度产生负面影响。为此，建议开发一种机器人 3D 打印综合体，在创建生物燃料组件生产设备的模型和测试样品方面提供最大的灵活性。本文讨论了使用 3D 打印成功创建用于生产燃料的设备元件的经验。接下来，描述了 3D 打印装置的机器人化方案的选择，并证实了打印技术的选择。本文还介绍了 3v 打印机机器人参数的计算结果以及用于控制算法的实现和评估的相似性参数的计算结果。介绍了计算使用所选 3D 打印技术制造的设备元件的强度特性的数值实验结果。

AI.tldr: 开发用于制造生物燃料组件实验设备元件的3D打印机机器人，并评估其生产能力。
AI.motivation: 传统制造方法成本高、效率低且耗时，影响生物燃料生产设备研发速度，需通过3D打印技术实现灵活快速制造。
AI.method: 分析3D打印技术应用经验，选择机器人化方案与打印工艺，计算3v打印机参数及控制算法相似性参数，开展强度特性数值实验。
AI.result: 完成3D打印机机器人参数设计，验证控制算法相似性，通过数值实验确认所选技术可满足设备元件强度要求。
AI.conclusion: 3D打印机器人系统可有效满足生物燃料生产设备元件的高可靠性需求，显著提升研发效率与灵活性。

authors_text: Yifu Wang,Wenqing Jiang,Kun Huang,Sören Schwertfeger,Laurent Kneip
title: Accurate calibration of multi-perspective cameras from a generalization of the hand-eye constraint
title_zh: 从手眼约束的推广来精确校准多视角相机
comment: accepted in the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), Philadelphia (PA), USA
comments: accepted in the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), Philadelphia (PA), USA
abstract: Multi-perspective cameras are quickly gaining importance in many applications such as smart vehicles and virtual or augmented reality. However, a large system size or absence of overlap in neighbouring fields-of-view often complicate their calibration. We present a novel solution which relies on the availability of an external motion capture system. Our core contribution consists of an extension to the hand-eye calibration problem which jointly solves multi-eye-to-base problems in closed form. We furthermore demonstrate its equivalence to the multi-eye-in-hand problem. The practical validity of our approach is supported by our experiments, indicating that the method is highly efficient and accurate, and outperforms existing closed-form alternatives.
summary: Multi-perspective cameras are quickly gaining importance in many applications such as smart vehicles and virtual or augmented reality. However, a large system size or absence of overlap in neighbouring fields-of-view often complicate their calibration. We present a novel solution which relies on the availability of an external motion capture system. Our core contribution consists of an extension to the hand-eye calibration problem which jointly solves multi-eye-to-base problems in closed form. We furthermore demonstrate its equivalence to the multi-eye-in-hand problem. The practical validity of our approach is supported by our experiments, indicating that the method is highly efficient and accurate, and outperforms existing closed-form alternatives.
abstract_zh: 多视角相机在智能车辆和虚拟或增强现实等许多应用中迅速变得越来越重要。然而，较大的系统尺寸或相邻视场不存在重叠通常会使校准变得复杂。我们提出了一种新颖的解决方案，该解决方案依赖于外部动作捕捉系统的可用性。我们的核心贡献包括对手眼校准问题的扩展，该问题以封闭形式共同解决多眼到基础问题。我们还证明了它与多眼手问题的等价性。我们的方法的实际有效性得到了实验的支持，表明该方法高效且准确，并且优于现有的封闭式替代方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于手眼约束推广的多视角相机精确标定方法，解决大系统规模或视场无重叠场景下的标定难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多视角相机系统时面临系统规模大或相邻视场无重叠导致的标定复杂性问题，亟需高效准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入外部运动捕捉系统，扩展传统手眼标定问题，联合求解多眼到基座的闭式解，并证明其与多眼在手中的等价性。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在效率和精度上优于现有闭式方法，具有实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 提出的标定方法有效解决了多视角相机系统的标定难题，为智能车辆和虚拟现实等应用提供了可靠技术支撑。

authors_text: Syed Adnan Yusuf,Abdulmalik Ali Aldawsari,Riad Souissi
title: Automotive Parts Assessment: Applying Real-time Instance-Segmentation Models to Identify Vehicle Parts
title_zh: 汽车零部件评估：应用实时实例分割模型来识别汽车零部件
abstract: The problem of automated car damage assessment presents a major challenge in the auto repair and damage assessment industry. The domain has several application areas ranging from car assessment companies such as car rentals and body shops to accidental damage assessment for car insurance companies. In vehicle assessment, the damage can take any form including scratches, minor and major dents to missing parts. More often, the assessment area has a significant level of noise such as dirt, grease, oil or rush that makes an accurate identification challenging. Moreover, the identification of a particular part is the first step in the repair industry to have an accurate labour and part assessment where the presence of different car models, shapes and sizes makes the task even more challenging for a machine-learning model to perform well. To address these challenges, this research explores and applies various instance segmentation methodologies to evaluate the best performing models. The scope of this work focusses on two genres of real-time instance segmentation models due to their industrial significance, namely SipMask and Yolact. These methodologies are evaluated against a previously reported car parts dataset (DSMLR) and an internally curated dataset extracted from local car repair workshops. The Yolact-based part localization and segmentation method performed well when compared to other real-time instance mechanisms with a mAP of 66.5. For the workshop repair dataset, SipMask++ reported better accuracies for object detection with a mAP of 57.0 with outcomes for AP_IoU=.50and AP_IoU=.75 reporting 72.0 and 67.0 respectively while Yolact was found to be a better performer for AP_s with 44.0 and 2.6 for object detection and segmentation categories respectively.
summary: The problem of automated car damage assessment presents a major challenge in the auto repair and damage assessment industry. The domain has several application areas ranging from car assessment companies such as car rentals and body shops to accidental damage assessment for car insurance companies. In vehicle assessment, the damage can take any form including scratches, minor and major dents to missing parts. More often, the assessment area has a significant level of noise such as dirt, grease, oil or rush that makes an accurate identification challenging. Moreover, the identification of a particular part is the first step in the repair industry to have an accurate labour and part assessment where the presence of different car models, shapes and sizes makes the task even more challenging for a machine-learning model to perform well. To address these challenges, this research explores and applies various instance segmentation methodologies to evaluate the best performing models. The scope of this work focusses on two genres of real-time instance segmentation models due to their industrial significance, namely SipMask and Yolact. These methodologies are evaluated against a previously reported car parts dataset (DSMLR) and an internally curated dataset extracted from local car repair workshops. The Yolact-based part localization and segmentation method performed well when compared to other real-time instance mechanisms with a mAP of 66.5. For the workshop repair dataset, SipMask++ reported better accuracies for object detection with a mAP of 57.0 with outcomes for AP_IoU=.50and AP_IoU=.75 reporting 72.0 and 67.0 respectively while Yolact was found to be a better performer for AP_s with 44.0 and 2.6 for object detection and segmentation categories respectively.
abstract_zh: 自动汽车损坏评估问题给汽车维修和损坏评估行业带来了重大挑战。该域有多个应用领域，从汽车租赁和车身维修店等汽车评估公司到汽车保险公司的意外损坏评估。在车辆评估中，损坏可以采取任何形式，包括划痕、缺失零件的小凹痕和大凹痕。更常见的是，评估区域存在大量噪音，例如污垢、油脂、油或灯芯草，这使得准确识别具有挑战性。此外，识别特定零件是维修行业进行准确的劳动力和零件评估的第一步，其中不同车型、形状和尺寸的存在使得机器学习模型表现良好的任务更具挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，本研究探索并应用各种实例分割方法来评估性能最佳的模型。由于其工业意义，这项工作的范围集中于两种类型的实时实例分割模型，即 SipMask 和 Yolact。这些方法根据之前报告的汽车零部件数据集 (DSMLR) 和从当地汽车维修车间提取的内部整理数据集进行评估。与其他实时实例机制相比，基于 Yolact 的零件定位和分割方法表现良好，mAP 为 66.5。对于车间修复数据集，SipMask++ 报告了更好的目标检测准确度，mAP 为 57.0，AP_IoU=.50 和 AP_IoU=.75 的结果分别报告 72.0 和 67.0，而 Yolact 被发现在 AP_s 方面表现更好，目标检测和分割类别分别为 44.0 和 2.6。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究将实时实例分割模型应用于汽车零部件识别，以解决汽车损伤评估中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 汽车损伤评估面临环境噪声和多车型差异的挑战，需准确识别零部件以支持维修和保险评估。
AI.method: 对比SipMask和Yolact两种实时实例分割模型，在DSMLR数据集和本地维修数据集上进行性能评估。
AI.result: Yolact在mAP指标上表现最佳（66.5），而SipMask++在AP_IoU=.50和.75指标上分别达到72.0和67.0。
AI.conclusion: Yolact更适合整体检测任务，SipMask++在特定分割指标上表现更优，需根据实际需求选择模型。

search_text: Automotive Parts Assessment: Applying Real-time Instance-Segmentation Models to Identify Vehicle Parts 汽车零部件评估：应用实时实例分割模型来识别汽车零部件 The problem of automated car damage assessment presents a major challenge in the auto repair and damage assessment industry. The domain has several application areas ranging from car assessment companies such as car rentals and body shops to accidental damage assessment for car insurance companies. In vehicle assessment, the damage can take any form including scratches, minor and major dents to missing parts. More often, the assessment area has a significant level of noise such as dirt, grease, oil or rush that makes an accurate identification challenging. Moreover, the identification of a particular part is the first step in the repair industry to have an accurate labour and part assessment where the presence of different car models, shapes and sizes makes the task even more challenging for a machine-learning model to perform well. To address these challenges, this research explores and applies various instance segmentation methodologies to evaluate the best performing models. The scope of this work focusses on two genres of real-time instance segmentation models due to their industrial significance, namely SipMask and Yolact. These methodologies are evaluated against a previously reported car parts dataset (DSMLR) and an internally curated dataset extracted from local car repair workshops. The Yolact-based part localization and segmentation method performed well when compared to other real-time instance mechanisms with a mAP of 66.5. For the workshop repair dataset, SipMask++ reported better accuracies for object detection with a mAP of 57.0 with outcomes for AP_IoU=.50and AP_IoU=.75 reporting 72.0 and 67.0 respectively while Yolact was found to be a better performer for AP_s with 44.0 and 2.6 for object detection and segmentation categories respectively. 自动汽车损坏评估问题给汽车维修和损坏评估行业带来了重大挑战。该域有多个应用领域，从汽车租赁和车身维修店等汽车评估公司到汽车保险公司的意外损坏评估。在车辆评估中，损坏可以采取任何形式，包括划痕、缺失零件的小凹痕和大凹痕。更常见的是，评估区域存在大量噪音，例如污垢、油脂、油或灯芯草，这使得准确识别具有挑战性。此外，识别特定零件是维修行业进行准确的劳动力和零件评估的第一步，其中不同车型、形状和尺寸的存在使得机器学习模型表现良好的任务更具挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，本研究探索并应用各种实例分割方法来评估性能最佳的模型。由于其工业意义，这项工作的范围集中于两种类型的实时实例分割模型，即 SipMask 和 Yolact。这些方法根据之前报告的汽车零部件数据集 (DSMLR) 和从当地汽车维修车间提取的内部整理数据集进行评估。与其他实时实例机制相比，基于 Yolact 的零件定位和分割方法表现良好，mAP 为 66.5。对于车间修复数据集，SipMask++ 报告了更好的目标检测准确度，mAP 为 57.0，AP_IoU=.50 和 AP_IoU=.75 的结果分别报告 72.0 和 67.0，而 Yolact 被发现在 AP_s 方面表现更好，目标检测和分割类别分别为 44.0 和 2.6。 该论文研究将实时实例分割模型应用于汽车零部件识别，以解决汽车损伤评估中的挑战。 Syed Adnan Yusuf,Abdulmalik Ali Aldawsari,Riad Souissi cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Rodolfo Valiente,Behrad Toghi,Ramtin Pedarsani,Yaser P. Fallah
title: Robustness and Adaptability of Reinforcement Learning based Cooperative Autonomous Driving in Mixed-autonomy Traffic
title_zh: 混合自主交通中基于强化学习的协同自动驾驶的鲁棒性和适应性
abstract: Building autonomous vehicles (AVs) is a complex problem, but enabling them to operate in the real world where they will be surrounded by human-driven vehicles (HVs) is extremely challenging. Prior works have shown the possibilities of creating inter-agent cooperation between a group of AVs that follow a social utility. Such altruistic AVs can form alliances and affect the behavior of HVs to achieve socially desirable outcomes. We identify two major challenges in the co-existence of AVs and HVs. First, social preferences and individual traits of a given human driver, e.g., selflessness and aggressiveness are unknown to an AV, and it is almost impossible to infer them in real-time during a short AV-HV interaction. Second, contrary to AVs that are expected to follow a policy, HVs do not necessarily follow a stationary policy and therefore are extremely hard to predict. To alleviate the above-mentioned challenges, we formulate the mixed-autonomy problem as a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) problem and propose a decentralized framework and reward function for training cooperative AVs. Our approach enables AVs to learn the decision-making of HVs implicitly from experience, optimizes for a social utility while prioritizing safety and allowing adaptability; robustifying altruistic AVs to different human behaviors and constraining them to a safe action space. Finally, we investigate the robustness, safety and sensitivity of AVs to various HVs behavioral traits and present the settings in which the AVs can learn cooperative policies that are adaptable to different situations.
summary: Building autonomous vehicles (AVs) is a complex problem, but enabling them to operate in the real world where they will be surrounded by human-driven vehicles (HVs) is extremely challenging. Prior works have shown the possibilities of creating inter-agent cooperation between a group of AVs that follow a social utility. Such altruistic AVs can form alliances and affect the behavior of HVs to achieve socially desirable outcomes. We identify two major challenges in the co-existence of AVs and HVs. First, social preferences and individual traits of a given human driver, e.g., selflessness and aggressiveness are unknown to an AV, and it is almost impossible to infer them in real-time during a short AV-HV interaction. Second, contrary to AVs that are expected to follow a policy, HVs do not necessarily follow a stationary policy and therefore are extremely hard to predict. To alleviate the above-mentioned challenges, we formulate the mixed-autonomy problem as a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) problem and propose a decentralized framework and reward function for training cooperative AVs. Our approach enables AVs to learn the decision-making of HVs implicitly from experience, optimizes for a social utility while prioritizing safety and allowing adaptability; robustifying altruistic AVs to different human behaviors and constraining them to a safe action space. Finally, we investigate the robustness, safety and sensitivity of AVs to various HVs behavioral traits and present the settings in which the AVs can learn cooperative policies that are adaptable to different situations.
abstract_zh: 建造自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 是一个复杂的问题，但让它们在被人类驾驶车辆 (HV) 包围的现实世界中运行却极具挑战性。之前的工作已经展示了在遵循社会效用的一组自动驾驶汽车之间创建代理间合作的可能性。这种无私的 AV 可以结成联盟并影响 HV 的行为，以实现社会理想的结果。我们确定了自动驾驶汽车和高压汽车共存的两大挑战。首先，自动驾驶汽车不知道特定人类驾驶员的社会偏好和个人特征，例如无私和攻击性，并且几乎不可能在短暂的自动驾驶汽车与高压汽车交互过程中实时推断它们。其次，与预计遵循政策的自动驾驶汽车相反，高压汽车不一定遵循固定政策，因此极难预测。为了缓解上述挑战，我们将混合自主问题表述为多智能体强化学习（MARL）问题，并提出了一个用于训练协作自动驾驶的去中心化框架和奖励函数。我们的方法使自动驾驶汽车能够从经验中隐式学习高压汽车的决策，优化社会公用事业，同时优先考虑安全性并允许适应性；增强利他自动驾驶汽车对不同人类行为的鲁棒性，并将其限制在安全的行动空间内。最后，我们研究了 AV 对各种 HV 行为特征的鲁棒性、安全性和敏感性，并提出了 AV 可以学习适应不同情况的合作策略的设置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多智能体强化学习（MARL）的去中心化框架，解决混合自主交通中自动驾驶车辆（AVs）与人类驾驶车辆（HVs）协作时的鲁棒性与适应性问题。
AI.motivation: AVs在与HVs共存时面临两大挑战：无法实时推断人类驾驶者的社会偏好及个性特征，且HVs行为不可预测，现有方法难以有效应对。
AI.method: 将混合自主交通建模为MARL问题，设计去中心化框架与奖励函数，使AVs通过经验隐式学习HVs决策，在优化社会效用的同时保障安全并适应不同场景。
AI.result: 验证了AVs在不同人类行为模式下的鲁棒性、安全性与敏感性，展示了其学习适应多样化交通情境的合作策略的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了AVs在混合交通环境中的协作性能，为应对复杂多变的现实交通场景提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Younes Karimi,Anna Squicciarini,Shomir Wilson
title: Automated Detection of Doxing on Twitter
title_zh: 自动检测 Twitter 上的人肉搜索
comment: 24 pages, 1 figure. Accepted in the 25th ACM Conference on Computer-Supported Cooperative Work and Social Computing (ACM CSCW 2022)
comments: 24 pages, 1 figure. Accepted in the 25th ACM Conference on Computer-Supported Cooperative Work and Social Computing (ACM CSCW 2022)
abstract: Doxing refers to the practice of disclosing sensitive personal information about a person without their consent. This form of cyberbullying is an unpleasant and sometimes dangerous phenomenon for online social networks. Although prior work exists on automated identification of other types of cyberbullying, a need exists for methods capable of detecting doxing on Twitter specifically. We propose and evaluate a set of approaches for automatically detecting second- and third-party disclosures on Twitter of sensitive private information, a subset of which constitutes doxing. We summarize our findings of common intentions behind doxing episodes and compare nine different approaches for automated detection based on string-matching and one-hot encoded heuristics, as well as word and contextualized string embedding representations of tweets. We identify an approach providing 96.86% accuracy and 97.37% recall using contextualized string embeddings and conclude by discussing the practicality of our proposed methods.
summary: Doxing refers to the practice of disclosing sensitive personal information about a person without their consent. This form of cyberbullying is an unpleasant and sometimes dangerous phenomenon for online social networks. Although prior work exists on automated identification of other types of cyberbullying, a need exists for methods capable of detecting doxing on Twitter specifically. We propose and evaluate a set of approaches for automatically detecting second- and third-party disclosures on Twitter of sensitive private information, a subset of which constitutes doxing. We summarize our findings of common intentions behind doxing episodes and compare nine different approaches for automated detection based on string-matching and one-hot encoded heuristics, as well as word and contextualized string embedding representations of tweets. We identify an approach providing 96.86% accuracy and 97.37% recall using contextualized string embeddings and conclude by discussing the practicality of our proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 人肉搜索是指未经某人同意而披露其敏感个人信息的做法。对于在线社交网络来说，这种形式的网络欺凌是一种令人不快、有时甚至是危险的现象。尽管先前的工作涉及自动识别其他类型的网络欺凌，但仍然需要能够专门检测 Twitter 上的人肉搜索的方法。我们提出并评估了一套自动检测 Twitter 上第二方和第三方披露的敏感私人信息的方法，其中一部分构成了人肉搜索。我们总结了人肉搜索事件背后的共同意图的发现，并比较了基于字符串匹配和单热编码启发式的自动检测的九种不同方法，以及推文的单词和上下文字符串嵌入表示。我们确定了一种使用上下文字符串嵌入提供 96.86% 准确率和 97.37% 召回率的方法，并通过讨论我们提出的方法的实用性得出结论。

AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏针对推特平台的Doxing检测，且该行为可能对用户造成危险
AI.method: 采用字符串匹配、独热编码启发式规则，以及词和上下文化字符串嵌入表示进行检测
AI.result: 基于上下文化字符串嵌入的方法达到96.86%准确率和97.37%召回率
AI.conclusion: 上下文化嵌入方法在检测Doxing中表现优异，具有实际应用潜力

search_text: Automated Detection of Doxing on Twitter 自动检测 Twitter 上的人肉搜索 Doxing refers to the practice of disclosing sensitive personal information about a person without their consent. This form of cyberbullying is an unpleasant and sometimes dangerous phenomenon for online social networks. Although prior work exists on automated identification of other types of cyberbullying, a need exists for methods capable of detecting doxing on Twitter specifically. We propose and evaluate a set of approaches for automatically detecting second- and third-party disclosures on Twitter of sensitive private information, a subset of which constitutes doxing. We summarize our findings of common intentions behind doxing episodes and compare nine different approaches for automated detection based on string-matching and one-hot encoded heuristics, as well as word and contextualized string embedding representations of tweets. We identify an approach providing 96.86% accuracy and 97.37% recall using contextualized string embeddings and conclude by discussing the practicality of our proposed methods. 人肉搜索是指未经某人同意而披露其敏感个人信息的做法。对于在线社交网络来说，这种形式的网络欺凌是一种令人不快、有时甚至是危险的现象。尽管先前的工作涉及自动识别其他类型的网络欺凌，但仍然需要能够专门检测 Twitter 上的人肉搜索的方法。我们提出并评估了一套自动检测 Twitter 上第二方和第三方披露的敏感私人信息的方法，其中一部分构成了人肉搜索。我们总结了人肉搜索事件背后的共同意图的发现，并比较了基于字符串匹配和单热编码启发式的自动检测的九种不同方法，以及推文的单词和上下文字符串嵌入表示。我们确定了一种使用上下文字符串嵌入提供 96.86% 准确率和 97.37% 召回率的方法，并通过讨论我们提出的方法的实用性得出结论。 开发自动化检测推特上Doxing（敏感信息泄露）的方法 Younes Karimi,Anna Squicciarini,Shomir Wilson cs.SI,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CR,cs.CY

authors_text: Younes Karimi,Anna Squicciarini,Peter K. Forster,Kira M. Leavitt
title: A Longitudinal Dataset of Twitter ISIS Users
title_zh: Twitter ISIS 用户的纵向数据集
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures; Submitted to the 16th International Conference on Web and Social Media (AAAI ICWSM-2022)
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures; Submitted to the 16th International Conference on Web and Social Media (AAAI ICWSM-2022)
abstract: We present a large longitudinal dataset of tweets from two sets of users that are suspected to be affiliated with ISIS. These sets of users are identified based on a prior study and a campaign aimed at shutting down ISIS Twitter accounts. These users have engaged with known ISIS accounts at least once during 2014-2015 and are still active as of 2021. Some of them have directly supported the ISIS users and their tweets by retweeting them, and some of the users that have quoted tweets of ISIS, have uncertain connections to ISIS seed accounts. This study and the dataset represent a unique approach to analyzing ISIS data. Although much research exists on ISIS online activities, few studies have focused on individual accounts. Our approach to validating accounts as well as developing a framework for differentiating accounts' functionality (e.g., propaganda versus operational planning) offers a foundation for future research. We perform some descriptive statistics and preliminary analyses on our collected data to provide deeper insight and highlight the significance and practicality of such analyses. We further discuss several cross-disciplinary potential use cases and research directions.
summary: We present a large longitudinal dataset of tweets from two sets of users that are suspected to be affiliated with ISIS. These sets of users are identified based on a prior study and a campaign aimed at shutting down ISIS Twitter accounts. These users have engaged with known ISIS accounts at least once during 2014-2015 and are still active as of 2021. Some of them have directly supported the ISIS users and their tweets by retweeting them, and some of the users that have quoted tweets of ISIS, have uncertain connections to ISIS seed accounts. This study and the dataset represent a unique approach to analyzing ISIS data. Although much research exists on ISIS online activities, few studies have focused on individual accounts. Our approach to validating accounts as well as developing a framework for differentiating accounts' functionality (e.g., propaganda versus operational planning) offers a foundation for future research. We perform some descriptive statistics and preliminary analyses on our collected data to provide deeper insight and highlight the significance and practicality of such analyses. We further discuss several cross-disciplinary potential use cases and research directions.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了来自两组疑似与 ISIS 有关联的用户的推文的大型纵向数据集。这些用户组是根据之前的研究和旨在关闭 ISIS 推特账户的活动确定的。这些用户在 2014 年至 2015 年期间至少与已知的 ISIS 账户进行过一次互动，并且截至 2021 年仍然活跃。其中一些用户通过转发直接支持 ISIS 用户及其推文，而一些引用 ISIS 推文的用户与 ISIS 种子账户之间存在不确定的联系。这项研究和数据集代表了分析 ISIS 数据的独特方法。尽管有很多关于 ISIS 在线活动的研究，但很少有研究关注个人账户。我们验证账户以及开发区分账户功能的框架（例如宣传与运营规划）的方法为未来的研究奠定了基础。我们对收集的数据进行一些描述性统计和初步分析，以提供更深入的见解并强调此类分析的意义和实用性。我们进一步讨论了几个跨学科的潜在用例和研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个涵盖2014-2021年的ISIS疑似关联用户推文纵向数据集，用于分析其网络行为特征。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注ISIS整体网络活动，缺乏对个体账户的深入分析，需建立验证机制和功能分类框架以支持后续研究。
AI.method: 基于前期研究和取缔行动识别用户，通过推文互动行为（转发、引用）验证关联性，并构建功能分类框架进行描述性统计与初步分析。
AI.result: 展示了用户活跃度、互动模式等统计结果，验证了数据集对分析ISIS网络传播机制的实用价值，并提出跨学科研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和验证框架为研究ISIS个体账户行为提供了新方法，可为反恐、网络舆情分析等领域提供参考。
